Grace has one shot to survive, protect her sister, and seize "The High Seat"—the council that rules the world. Hunted by four rival families vying for the throne, only one will emerge to claim ultimate power.

synopsis: 科學家們開發將人類意識「上身」進高度擬真的機器動物體內，讓使用者以動物的樣貌與牠們溝通互動。主角梅寶是一位熱愛動物的大學生，她藉此機會將意識「上身」入機器河狸體內，認識了河狸國王喬治，理解並學習動物界的生存法則，比方看似佛系的「池塘準則」等等…。在這過程中，她也意外看透陰謀鬥爭：當市長傑瑞計畫開發自然棲地、破壞動物家園時，梅寶決定挺身而出，她與動物同伴們能否成功挽救自然棲地?
synopsis_en: Scientists have developed a way to "upload" human consciousness into hyper-realistic robotic animals, allowing users to communicate and interact with wildlife from their perspective. Mabel, an animal-loving college student, takes this opportunity to inhabit a robotic beaver. Through this experience, she meets King George the beaver and begins to learn the laws of the animal kingdom, including the seemingly zen "Pond Code." During her journey, she uncovers a sinister conspiracy: Mayor Jerry plans to develop the natural habitat, threatening to destroy the animals' homes. Mabel decides to take a stand, but can she and her animal companions successfully save their sanctuary?

movie_title: 超級瑪利歐銀河電影版
synopsis: 【超級瑪利歐銀河電影版】是一部根據超級瑪利歐兄弟世界改編的動畫電影，故事延續【超級瑪利歐兄弟電影版】，該片於2023年締造全球13億美元的驚人票房紀錄。【超級瑪利歐銀河電影版】由再度回歸的導演亞倫霍瓦特以及麥可傑勒尼克執導，馬修福格也再度回擔任編劇，配樂師布萊恩泰勒也再度回歸編寫電影配樂。
synopsis_en: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie is an animated film based on the world of the Super Mario Bros. The story continues from The Super Mario Bros. Movie, which set a staggering global box office record of $1.3 billion in 2023. The Super Mario Galaxy Movie is directed by the returning duo Aaron Horvath and Michael Jelenic, with Matthew Fogel once again serving as screenwriter and composer Brian Tyler returning to craft the film's score.

Mabel, an animal-loving college student, takes this opportunity to inhabit a robotic beaver. Through this experience, she meets King George the beaver and begins to learn the laws of the animal kingdom, including the seemingly zen "Pond Code." During her journey, she uncovers a sinister conspiracy: Mayor Jerry plans to develop the natural habitat, threatening to destroy the animals' homes. Mabel decides to take a stand, but can she and her animal companions successfully save their sanctuary?

movie_title: 超級瑪利歐銀河電影版

synopsis: 柏林影展觀眾票選獎 改編自風靡全球、銷售突破30國的暢銷小說〈送書人〉，是一部溫暖、幽默、令人心情瞬間變亮的療癒系喜劇。電影講述一段跨越世代的奇妙友誼，也傳遞一個簡單卻強大的訊息：好故事能療癒人心，好書則永遠具備連繫人心的力量，獲德國影媒【Spielfilm】讚譽是「獻給文學愛好者的童話故事」。個性執著的送書人卡爾，生活就像鐘錶一樣地精準。每天，他踩著相同的步伐，將一本本包裝好的書，親手送到忠實顧客的家門口。他了解鎮上每個顧客的喜好，並以能為他們挑選到最合適的書而感到自豪。 有天，卡爾井然有序的生活卻突然遭人闖入。9歲的莎莎剛從失去母親悲傷走出來，決定加入卡爾的送書人小組。她不僅從送書和閱讀中找到慰藉，獨特的人生觀也幫卡爾敞開了心扉，一段意想不到的友誼就此展開。 一場突如其來的變故，讓卡爾失去了工作。原本熱鬧、充滿書香的小鎮也逐漸走向沉寂。就在顧客逐漸散落之際，莎莎決定靠自己最相信的力量：好書的魔力，能讓人們再次團聚一起。她與卡爾攜手合作，不僅為讀者們，也為他們自己，帶來了意義深遠的正面改變。 The 70-year old Carl Kollhoff works in a little bookshop in a small town, where he wraps up books to deliver them by foot. One day the 9-year old girl Schascha joins him on his delivering-tours. She calls him the "Buchspazierer".
tmdb_overview: 每天，卡爾都細心地將書籍包裝好，親自送到鎮上熟客手中。他了解每個顧客的喜好，並以能為他們挑選到最合適的書而感到自豪。有天，卡爾井然有序的生活突然遭人闖入。九歲的莎莎剛從失去母親的悲傷走出來，決定加入卡爾的送書隊伍。她不僅從送書和閱讀中找到了慰藉，莎莎獨特的人生觀也幫卡爾敞開了心扉，一段意想不到的友誼就此展開。
tmdb_overview_en: Carl’s life runs like clockwork: every day, he goes door-to-door delivering books to a handful of loyal customers. He knows their preferences and takes pride in selecting the perfect story for each of them. But his well-ordered life is turned upside down by a cheerful nine-year-old girl, Schascha, who decides to join him on his daily book round. Schascha’s unique outlook on life helps Carl to come out of his shell and realise that his customers are so much more than just that to him. But when Carl unexpectedly loses his job, this vibrant community starts to fall apart - and it will take the power of books and all Schascha’s determination to bring them back together again.

synopsis: 曾參與多次反抗軍運動的巴柏，為了養育女兒便漸漸淡出抗爭前線，沒想到他的反叛事蹟竟在多年後捲土重來，軍人史蒂芬在16年後突然找上門來，大動作展開搜捕巴柏的女兒。巴柏在無路可退的絕境下，只好聯絡過去的革命夥伴，並與女兒的老師一同展開拯救女兒的計畫。
synopsis_en: Barber, a veteran of numerous resistance movements, gradually stepped away from the front lines years ago to raise his daughter. Little did he know that his past would catch up with him sixteen years later when a soldier named Stephen suddenly appears, launching a massive operation to hunt down Barber’s daughter. Driven into a corner with nowhere to run, Barber is forced to reconnect with his former revolutionary comrades and team up with his daughter’s teacher to launch a daring rescue mission.

synopsis:
「誓死守護，我們的約定」
人死之後、輪迴之前，亡魂會來到名為「世外」的異界。陰間使者小鬼（鍾雪瑩 聲演）日復一日引渡亡魂，卻在某天遇見拒絕轉世的少女小妹（蔡曉童 聲演），意外揭開一段橫跨千年的宿命糾葛。當小妹前世的遺憾與忿恨被喚醒，一道足以毀滅人間與世外的詛咒也隨之復甦，迫使小鬼踏上一段危機四伏的救贖之旅，在守護與放手之間，做出最揪心艱難的選擇。
synopsis_en:
★ 2025 Golden Horse Award for Best Animated Feature

After death and before reincarnation, departed souls arrive at a mystical realm known as "The Beyond." Here, Spirit Guardians spend their days guiding souls toward their next lives. This cycle continues until a young Spirit Guardian, Little Ghost, encounters "Little Sister," a soul who refuses to move on. Through her, the once-emotionless Little Ghost begins to see The Beyond in a completely different light.

As he attempts to lead her toward rebirth, Little Ghost uncovers the regrets of her past life. Overwhelmed by fury, Little Sister triggers an irreversible curse. If she is completely consumed by her hatred, both The Beyond and the mortal realm will be reduced to ash along with her.

Little Ghost convinces the Celestial Maiden to grant Little Sister a final chance at redemption. The Maiden dispatches the formidable warrior Heitian to accompany them on a perilous quest spanning a thousand years. Despite the constant dangers, Little Ghost repeatedly risks his own life to save her, hoping only that Little Sister can let go of her past pain, forgive herself, and finally step lightly onto the path of reincarnation.

movie_title: 劇場版「暗殺教室」：我們的時光
movie_title_en: Assassination Classroom the Movie: Our Time
synopsis: 這是在 2 月底,考試已經結束即將迎來畢業的某一天。在政府愈加嚴苛的監視之下,三年 E 班的同學們回憶起和殺老師一同度過的這一整年。在碧琪老師身上亂畫的可洗式刺青塗鴉、游泳的特別課程、和 A 班同學間的鬥爭,還有情人節巧克力等等的回憶湧上心頭,教室裡充滿了討論懷念話題的談笑聲。而另一方面,僅管在寒假期間被暗殺者四人組追殺,殺老師仍舊一派輕鬆地躲過去了。
synopsis_en: It is a day in late February; exams have ended, and graduation is just around the corner. Under the government’s increasingly strict surveillance, the students of Class 3-E look back on the year they spent with Koro-sensei. Memories flood back—the washable tattoo graffiti they drew on Ms. Bitch, the special swimming lessons, the rivalry with Class A, and Valentine’s Day chocolates—filling the classroom with nostalgic laughter and chatter. Meanwhile, despite being hunted by a quartet of assassins during winter break, Koro-sensei evaded them with his usual effortless ease.

synopsis: 因為「過去曾有舞蹈經驗」臨時成軍的奇葩隊伍，包括：現任孤兒院輔導員、實則為傳說級的前殺手「戴亞」（佐久間大介 飾）；此次任務的召集人、風間組的二當家「熊城」（椎名桔平 飾）；討厭群體行動的冷酷殺手「桐生」（中本悠太／NCT 飾）；性格火爆卻富有義氣的殺手「阿新」（青柳翔 飾）；落魄的前黑道大叔「村雨」（小澤仁志 飾）。原本水火不容的殺手們逐漸被舞蹈的魅力吸引，不知不覺中成了名副其實的「舞林殺手」，一路過關斬將，朝冠軍之路晉級？！
synopsis_en:
Award-winning director Eiji Uchida strikes again with a genre-defying masterpiece that blends high-octane assassin action with the art of dance. A motley crew of professional assassins, each with vastly different ages and temperaments, accepts a high-stakes, big-money contract. Their target is the notorious mob boss Heizo Honjo, but there’s a catch: the only way to get close to him is by winning a dance competition!

With zero experience, no chemistry, and even less motivation, can this ragtag team actually compete in a serious dance tournament? Assembled solely because they supposedly had "prior dance experience," this eccentric squad features: Daiya, an orphanage counselor who is secretly a legendary ex-assassin; Kumashiro, the mission recruiter and second-in-command of the Kazama Syndicate; Kiryu, a cold-blooded lone wolf who hates working in groups; Arata, a hot-headed but fiercely loyal hitman; and Murasame, a washed-up former yakuza. 

Though they initially clash at every turn, these killers soon find themselves seduced by the rhythm, transforming into a formidable force of "dance-floor assassins." As they fight their way through the rounds, will they actually dance their way to the championship?

movie_title: 夏日大作戰 全新4K修復版
synopsis: 差點就能成為國際數學奧林匹亞競賽日本代表的高二生．小磯健二，接下了能進行購物、行政手續等多重功能的虛擬世界「OZ」的打工，擔任低階管理員，邊維護「OZ」的系統邊度過暑假。某日，健二所仰慕的前輩夏希請他一起回她在長野縣上田市的老家，沒想到夏希竟突然在親戚面前介紹自己是她的未婚夫。另一方面，虛擬世界「OZ」發生了恐怖的緊急事件，健二的管理員帳號被盜，導致整個系統發生問題，健二竟被懷疑是嫌犯，而虛擬世界的問題也為現實生活帶來了巨大危機！
synopsis_en: Kenji Koiso, a high school sophomore and math prodigy who narrowly missed representing Japan in the International Mathematical Olympiad, spends his summer working a part-time job as a low-level moderator for "OZ"—a massive virtual world used for everything from shopping to government administration. One day, his crush and senior, Natsuki, invites him to her family home in Ueda, Nagano. To his shock, she suddenly introduces him to her large extended family as her fiancé. Meanwhile, a catastrophic emergency strikes OZ when Kenji’s moderator account is hacked, throwing the entire system into chaos. As Kenji finds himself the prime suspect in a cyber-terrorism investigation, the disruptions in the virtual world begin to spill over into reality, triggering a massive global crisis.

synopsis: ★ 2025金馬獎最佳動畫片 人死後，輪迴之前，亡魂會來到一處奇異之地「世外」。靈守日復一日引領亡魂去投胎，直至一天，靈守小鬼遇上了不願轉世的小妹，讓不懂人類情感的小鬼看到了不再一樣的「世外」。在帶領小妹轉世的路途上，小鬼揭示了她前世的遺憾，令她無比震怒，觸發了難以逆轉的詛咒。若小妹完全被憤恨支配，不論世外、人間，將與她一同灰飛煙滅……。小鬼說服天女給小妹一個重生的機會，天女派武功高強的黑天與小鬼同行，踏上橫跨千年的征途，縱然在路上危機四伏，小鬼仍不惜多次捨身相救，只為了小妹能忘記過去的傷痛，並原諒自己，一身輕盈，走上輪迴轉世之路……。
tmdb_overview: 人死後，輪迴之前，亡魂會來到名為「世外」的奇異之境。靈守小鬼日復一日引領迷失的亡魂投胎，直至不願轉世的小妹出現，原本沒有悲喜的小鬼開始心神震盪。為拯救小妹，小鬼毅然決定踏上橫跨千年的淚途，展開一靈一鬼的雙向救贖。
tmdb_overview_en: After death, before reincarnation, the souls of the deceased transit through a fantastical realm known as, Another World. Gudo is a spirit that helps to guide these transient souls to their reincarnation. While guiding a young girl named Yuri, he learns that humans have emotions that he does not understand. Tasked by Goddess Mira to help Yuri control her rage and prevent her transformation into a monster, Gudo embarks on a perilous mission.

synopsis:
曾走過江湖的她們，現在要向深愛的人   用最閃耀的歌聲，唱出最難忘的表白
一群因命運錯誤的安排而被關入監獄的女性  她們在相處中彼此扶持，重新看見生命的希望
synopsis_en: Once women of the underworld, they now use their most brilliant voices to sing an unforgettable confession to the ones they love. Imprisoned by a cruel twist of fate, these women find strength in one another, supporting each other as they rediscover hope for the future.

movie_title: 超級瑪利歐銀河電影版
synopsis: 【超級瑪利歐銀河電影版】是一部根據超級瑪利歐兄弟世界改編的動畫電影，故事延續【超級瑪利歐兄弟電影版】，該片於2023年締造全球13億美元的驚人票房紀錄。【超級瑪利歐銀河電影版】由再度回歸的導演亞倫霍瓦特以及麥可傑勒尼克執導，馬修福格也再度回擔任編劇，配樂師布萊恩泰勒也再度回歸編寫電影配樂。

Movie, which set a staggering global box office record of $1.3 billion in 2023. The Super Mario Galaxy Movie is directed by the returning duo Aaron Horvath and Michael Jelenic, with Matthew Fogel once again serving as screenwriter and composer Brian Tyler returning to craft the film's score.

movie_title: 超級瑪利歐銀河電影版
synopsis: 【超級瑪利歐銀河電影版】是一部根據超級瑪利歐兄弟世界改編的動畫電影，故事延續【超級瑪利歐兄弟電影版】，該片於2023年締造全球13億美元的驚人票房紀錄。【超級瑪利歐銀河電影版】由再度回歸的導演亞倫霍瓦特以及麥可傑勒尼克執導，馬修福格也再度回擔任編劇，配樂師布萊恩泰勒也再度回歸編寫電影配樂。

Movie, which set a staggering global box office record of $1.3 billion in 2023. The Super Mario Galaxy Movie is directed by the returning duo Aaron Horvath and Michael Jelenic, with Matthew Fogel once again serving as screenwriter and composer Brian Tyler returning to craft the film's score.

movie_title: 秒速5公分 導演特別映像版

synopsis: 查理在咖啡廳邂逅艾瑪，一場笨拙的搭話開啟了兩年的甜蜜愛戀。正當兩人深信彼此是唯一、著手籌備婚禮時，一場好友聚會卻掀起波瀾。在「分享最糟糕往事」的遊戲中，艾瑪意外坦白一段不為人知的震撼過去。這份秘密讓全場難以置信，也讓查理開始重新審視這份關係。在步入禮堂的最後關頭，兩人的愛情正經受誠信與信任的嚴峻考驗。
synopsis_en: Charlie met Emma at a cafe, where a clumsy icebreaker sparked a two-year romance. Just as the two were convinced they had found "the one" and began planning their wedding, a gathering with friends turned their world upside down. During a game of "sharing your worst past," Emma unexpectedly confesses a shocking secret from her history. The revelation leaves everyone in disbelief and forces Charlie to re-examine their entire relationship. On the verge of walking down the aisle, their love faces a grueling test of honesty and trust.

synopsis: 諭明與依庭相識於極度安靜中的怦然，但幸福的婚姻沒有眷顧兩人。懷孕後的依庭背負童年暗影，在情緒風暴中墜落，諭明猜不透她，而這一切，似乎都與住進家中的岳父有關。《築巢人》導演沈可尚首部劇情長片，改編同名短篇小說，以寫實內斂的筆法，接住說不出口的憤怒與悲傷。張孝全、林依晨、金士傑同台飆戲，在壓抑窒息的日常中，直逼不被看見的緘默暗角。
synopsis_en:
★ Nominated for seven awards at the 62nd Golden Horse Awards, including Best New Director, Best Cinematography, Best Art Direction, and Best Leading Actor and Actress.

Yu-ming and Yi-ting first met in the "Deep Quiet Room" of their university library. They fell in love and married, expecting a stable life together. However, after Yi-ting becomes pregnant, past pressures and family shadows gradually resurface, fundamentally altering their relationship. When Yi-ting’s mobility-impaired father moves in, Yu-ming struggles to hold the family together, living through a suffocating existence of polite but distant formalities. Unable to truly understand Yi-ting’s inner world, it is only when Yu-ming reads the book she is currently editing that he realizes the burden she carries is far beyond anything he had ever imagined.

movie_title: 超級瑪利歐銀河電影版
超級瑪利歐銀河電影版

tmdb_overview: 在台灣工作的阿耀回到馬來西亞，與弟妹一起為父親舉辦喪禮，卻遇到宗教局人員突然來訪，帶走了父親的遺體。原來父親生前偷偷加入了回教，因此必須葬在回教墓園。不服氣的兄弟倆因而展開搶回遺體的旅程。過程中，阿耀回憶起小時候父親教他如何在這對華人不公平的社會狡猾求存，而妹妹水雲也發現了父親入回教的真正原因。
tmdb_overview_en: When Ah Yao returns to Malaysia for his father’s funeral, he expects grief, not chaos. But everything turns upside down when the religious police storm in, claiming his father—who secretly converted to Islam—must be buried in an Islamic cemetery. Refusing to let go, Ah Yao and his siblings set out on a wild, darkly comedic journey to reclaim the body, confronting cultural clashes, family secrets, and absurd obstacles along the way.

tmdb_overview: 查理在咖啡廳邂逅艾瑪，一場笨拙的搭話開啟了兩年的甜蜜愛戀。正當兩人深信彼此是唯一、著手籌備婚禮時，一場好友聚會卻掀起波瀾。在「分享最糟糕往事」的遊戲中，艾瑪意外坦白一段不為人知的震撼過去。這份祕密讓全場難以置信，也讓查理開始重新審視這份關係。在步入禮堂的最後關頭，兩人的愛情正受誠信與信任的嚴峻考驗。
tmdb_overview_en: A happily engaged couple is put to the test when an unexpected turn sends their wedding week off the rails.

movie_title: (英) 超級瑪利歐銀河電影版
秒速5公分 導演特別映像版
synopsis: 遠野貴樹和篠原明里在國小畢業後就分隔兩地。某日在大雪之中，貴樹終於決定要去跟明里見面……
synopsis_en: Takaki Tohno and Akari Shinohara were separated after graduating from elementary school. One day, amidst a heavy snowstorm, Takaki finally decides to go and see Akari...

movie_title: 超級瑪利歐銀河電影版

synopsis: 一名年輕女子（薩琪畢茲 飾）必須在惡魔邪教操控下的威吉大樓熬過一晚，逃過神秘扭曲的死亡陷阱巢穴，否則就會成為下一個祭品。恐怖片經典《牠》名導安迪馬希提坐鎮監製，與創意十足的導演基里爾索科洛夫攜手合作，打造出宛如一場史詩般的恐怖、驚悚、喜劇之戰，交織著殺戮與邪惡的黑色幽默，更以獨特另類的狂放姿態震撼登場。
synopsis_en: A young woman (Zazie Beetz) must survive a night in the Vedge building, navigating a den of mysterious and twisted death traps controlled by a demonic cult, or risk becoming their next sacrifice. Produced by Andy Muschietti, the acclaimed director of the horror classic *IT*, and visionary director Kirill Sokolov, this film is an epic collision of horror, suspense, and comedy. Interweaving carnage with wicked dark humor, it makes a bold and shocking debut with its unique, wild, and alternative style.

synopsis: 三歲那年，愛蜜莉的世界悄然展開。一次與巧克力的奇妙邂逅，點燃了她對萬物的好奇，也開啟了她看見世界的眼光。她與溫柔的家庭保母西尾小姐結下深厚情誼，隨著四季流轉，愛蜜莉在日常與自然的細語中，感知著愛、失落，與那些藏在靜謐家庭背後的情感波動。生活在戰後日本的異鄉時光，如夢似幻、如雨般輕柔，一點一滴滲進那尚未命名的情緒與心靈之流。
synopsis_en: At the age of three, Amélie’s world quietly began to unfold. A wondrous encounter with chocolate ignited her curiosity for all things, opening her eyes to the world around her. She formed a deep bond with her gentle nanny, Ms. Nishio. As the seasons turned, amidst the whispers of daily life and nature, Amélie began to sense love, loss, and the emotional currents hidden beneath the surface of her quiet home. Her years as a foreigner in post-war Japan were dreamlike and as soft as rain, seeping bit by bit into unnamed emotions and the stream of her consciousness.

movie_title: 超級瑪利歐銀河電影版
夏日大作戰 全新4K修復版
synopsis: 差點就能成為國際數學奧林匹亞競賽日本代表的高二生．小磯健二，接下了能進行購物、行政手續等多重功能的虛擬世界「OZ」的打工，擔任低階管理員，邊維護「OZ」的系統邊度過暑假。某日，健二所仰慕的前輩夏希請他一起回她在長野縣上田市的老家，沒想到夏希竟突然在親戚面前介紹自己是她的未婚夫。另一方面，虛擬世界「OZ」發生了恐怖的緊急事件，健二的管理員帳號被盜，導致整個系統發生問題，健二竟被懷疑是嫌犯，而虛擬世界的問題也為現實生活帶來了巨大危機！
synopsis_en: Kenji Koiso, a high school sophomore and math prodigy who narrowly missed representing Japan in the International Mathematical Olympiad, spends his summer working a part-time job as a low-level moderator for "OZ"—a massive virtual world used for everything from shopping to government administration. One day, his crush and senior, Natsuki, invites him to her family home in Ueda, Nagano. To his shock, she suddenly introduces him to her large extended family as her fiancé. Meanwhile, a catastrophic emergency strikes OZ when Kenji’s moderator account is hacked, throwing the entire system into chaos. As Kenji finds himself the prime suspect in a cyber-terrorism investigation, the disruptions in the virtual world begin to spill over into reality, triggering a massive global crisis.

movie_title: 讓建築歌唱～徐亞英的交響人生
movie_title_en: Tuning Architecture:The Life of Albert Xu in Sound
synopsis: 華裔建築聲學大師徐亞英長年與貝聿銘、法蘭克蓋瑞等多位普立茲克獎得主的建築大師合作，以隱形的聲學設計著稱，在世界各地設計和建造了近百座文化演出和藝術展覽性建築，而他晚年的集大成之作就在台灣的衛武營國家藝術文化中心，更是他最滿意之作。建築聲學是物理、音樂、建築及科學的總合，聲學家賦予音樂穿梭於經過設計的空間，讓美好的樂音能感動人心。我們跟隨著徐老師清瘦而穩健的步伐，重回他最具代表性的作品，如羅浮宮金字塔、盧森堡愛樂音樂廳等，娓娓道來他如何為建築師解決問題，成為波宗巴克口中的「Why not」先生……。
tmdb_title: Tuning Architecture: The Life of Albert Xu in Sound
tmdb_title_en: Tuning Architecture: The Life of Albert Xu in Sound
tmdb_title_local: 讓建築歌唱～徐亞英的交響人生
tmdb_original_title: 讓建築歌唱～徐亞英的交響人生
tmdb_overview: 華裔建築聲學大師徐亞英長年與貝聿銘、法蘭克蓋瑞等多位普立茲克獎得主的建築大師合作，以隱形的聲學設計著稱，在世界各地設計和建造了近百座文化演出和藝術展覽性建築，而他晚年的集大成之作就在台灣的衛武營國家藝術文化中心，更是他最滿意之作。建築聲學是物理、音樂、建築及科學的總合，聲學家賦予音樂穿梭於經過設計的空間，讓美好的樂音能感動人心。我們跟隨著徐老師清瘦而穩健的步伐，重回他最具代表性的作品，如羅浮宮金字塔、盧森堡愛樂音樂廳等，娓娓道來他如何為建築師解決問題，成爲波宗巴克口中的『Why not』先生。他對聲學的熱情也驅使他不辭勞苦地奔波於每個設計案工地，投入一甲子的光陰追求聲音美學與空間和諧。
synopsis_en:
Renowned Chinese-American architectural acoustics master Xu Yaying spent decades collaborating with Pritzker Prize-winning legends such as I.M. Pei and Frank Gehry. Celebrated for his "invisible" acoustic designs, Xu contributed to the design and construction of nearly a hundred cultural and artistic venues worldwide. His late-career magnum opus—and the project he takes the most pride in—is Taiwan’s National Kaohsiung Center for the Arts (Weiwuying).

Architectural acoustics is a synthesis of physics, music, architecture, and science. An acoustician enables music to flow through a meticulously designed space, ensuring that beautiful melodies can truly move the human heart. Following Xu’s lean yet steady footsteps, we revisit his most iconic masterpieces, including the Louvre Pyramid and the Philharmonie Luxembourg. He recounts his journey of solving complex challenges for architects, revealing how he earned the nickname "Mr. Why Not" from Christian de Portzamparc.

synopsis: ★ WEBTOON 超人氣療癒神作，大銀幕感動上映 ★ AKMU成員
synopsis_en:
★ Based on the true story of a guide dog's life! Relive the heartwarming animal cinema classic that moved millions.
★ A rare exploration of the guide dog theme, using a delicate narrative to sincerely portray the profound bond between humans and dogs.
★ A nuanced portrayal of the challenges faced by the visually impaired, witnessing the emotional journey from initial resistance to ultimate trust.

Five adorable Labrador puppies are born into a Tokyo household. One stands out from the rest, marked by a unique cross-shaped black birthmark on its belly. Since the puppies' father was a guide dog, their owner harbors a long-held hope that one of them will follow in his footsteps and become an exceptional guide dog. Because the mother was not a guide dog, the owner’s requests are repeatedly rejected. Undeterred, her persistence finally pays off when a trainer from a guide dog school reluctantly agrees to take one of the puppies for a trial. The puppy with the birthmark is the one chosen, marking the very first separation of its life.

Movie Trailer

synopsis: 查理在咖啡廳邂逅艾瑪，一場笨拙的搭話開啟了兩年的甜蜜愛戀。正當兩人深信彼此是唯一、著手籌備婚禮時，一場好友聚會卻掀起波瀾。在「分享最糟糕往事」的遊戲中，艾瑪意外坦白一段不為人知的震撼過去。這份秘密讓全場難以置信，也讓查理開始重新審視這份關係。在步入禮堂的最後關頭，兩人的愛情正經受誠信與信任的嚴峻考驗。
synopsis_en: Charlie met Emma at a cafe, where a clumsy icebreaker sparked a two-year romance. Just as the two were convinced they had found "the one" and began planning their wedding, a gathering with friends turned their world upside down. During a game of "sharing your worst past," Emma unexpectedly confesses a shocking secret from her history. The revelation leaves everyone in disbelief and forces Charlie to re-examine their entire relationship. On the verge of walking down the aisle, their love faces a grueling test of honesty and trust.

movie_title: 秒速5公分 導演特別映像版
synopsis: 遠野貴樹和篠原明里在國小畢業後就分隔兩地。某日在大雪之中，貴樹終於決定要去跟明里見面……
synopsis_en: Takaki Tohno and Akari Shinohara were separated after graduating from elementary school. One day, amidst a heavy snowstorm, Takaki finally decides to go and see Akari...

movie_title_en: Ready or Not 2: Here I Come

movie_title: 劇場版「暗殺教室」：我們的時光
movie_title_en: Assassination Classroom the Movie: Our Time
synopsis: 這是在 2 月底,考試已經結束即將迎來畢業的某一天。在政府愈加嚴苛的監視之下,三年 E 班的同學們回憶起和殺老師一同度過的這一整年。在碧琪老師身上亂畫的可洗式刺青塗鴉、游泳的特別課程、和 A 班同學間的鬥爭,還有情人節巧克力等等的回憶湧上心頭,教室裡充滿了討論懷念話題的談笑聲。而另一方面,僅管在寒假期間被暗殺者四人組追殺,殺老師仍舊一派輕鬆地躲過去了。
synopsis_en: It is a day in late February; exams have ended, and graduation is just around the corner. Under the government’s increasingly strict surveillance, the students of Class 3-E look back on the year they spent with Koro-sensei. Memories flood back—the washable tattoo graffiti they drew on Ms. Bitch, the special swimming lessons, the rivalry with Class A, and Valentine’s Day chocolates—filling the classroom with nostalgic laughter and chatter. Meanwhile, despite being hunted by a quartet of assassins during winter break, Koro-sensei evaded them with his usual effortless ease.

synopsis: 一群年齡、性格迥異的職業殺手，接下一單高額賞金的任務。他們的目標是幹掉黑道老大本條平藏，唯一能接觸他的方式，竟然是贏得舞蹈比賽！沒有經驗、沒有默契、也沒有幹勁，一支臨時拼湊的隊伍，竟要挑戰認真的舞蹈比賽？ 因為「過去曾有舞蹈經驗」臨時成軍的奇葩隊伍，包括：現任孤兒院輔導員、實則為傳說級的前殺手「戴亞」（佐久間大介 飾）；此次任務的召集人、風間組的二當家「熊城」（椎名桔平 飾）；討厭群體行動的冷酷殺手「桐生」（中本悠太／NCT 飾）；性格火爆卻富有義氣的殺手 「阿新」 （青柳翔 飾）；落魄的前黑道大叔「村雨」（小澤仁志 飾）。原本水火不容的殺手們逐漸被舞蹈的魅力吸引，不知不覺中成了名副其實的「舞林殺手」，一路過關斬將，朝冠軍之路晉級？！
synopsis_en:
★ Based on the true story of a guide dog's life! Relive the heartwarming animal cinema classic that moved millions.
★ A rare exploration of the guide dog theme, using a delicate narrative to sincerely portray the profound bond between humans and dogs.
★ A nuanced portrayal of the challenges faced by the visually impaired, witnessing the emotional journey from initial resistance to ultimate trust.

Five adorable Labrador puppies are born into a Tokyo household. One stands out from the rest, marked by a unique cross-shaped black birthmark on its belly. Since the puppies' father was a guide dog, their owner harbors a long-held hope that one of them will follow in his footsteps and become an exceptional guide dog. Because the mother was not a guide dog, the owner’s requests are repeatedly rejected. Undeterred, her persistence finally pays off when a trainer from a guide dog school reluctantly agrees to take one of the puppies for a trial. The puppy with the birthmark is the one chosen, marking the very first separation of its life.

Movie Trailer

movie_title: 超級瑪利歐銀河電影版
synopsis: 【超級瑪利歐銀河電影版】是一部根據超級瑪利歐兄弟世界改編的動畫電影，故事延續【超級瑪利歐兄弟電影版】，該片於2023年締造全球13億美元的驚人票房紀錄。【超級瑪利歐銀河電影版】由再度回歸的導演亞倫霍瓦特以及麥可傑勒尼克執導，馬修福格也再度回擔任編劇，配樂師布萊恩泰勒也再度回歸編寫電影配樂。
synopsis_en: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie is an animated film based on the world of the Super Mario Bros. The story continues from The Super Mario Bros. Movie, which set a staggering global box office record of $1.3 billion in 2023. The Super Mario Galaxy Movie is directed by the returning duo Aaron Horvath and Michael Jelenic, with Matthew Fogel once again serving as screenwriter and composer Brian Tyler returning to craft the film's score.

synopsis: 鋼琴系學生蘿拉（寶拉貝爾 飾）在一次週末出遊途中，她意外捲入車禍，雖然毫髮無傷但男友卻重傷過世，內心則被巨大的驚嚇與空虛籠罩。在德國鄉間遇見一名目睹事故的婦人，對方因蘿拉神似早逝的女兒，而溫柔地收留她進入宛如世外桃源的家庭。這個看似溫暖的避風港，實則充滿難以言明的替代與投射，婦人試圖將失去女兒的空缺，填補在蘿拉身上，而蘿拉也在被關懷與被期待之間，逐漸感到窒息。
synopsis_en: ★ A Cahiers du Cinéma Top 10 Film of 2025. While on a weekend getaway, piano student Laura is involved in a car accident. Though she emerges physically unscathed, her boyfriend is killed, leaving her consumed by shock and a profound sense of emptiness. In the German countryside, she encounters a woman who witnessed the crash. Struck by Laura’s resemblance to her own late daughter, the woman kindly takes her into her idyllic family home. However, this seemingly warm sanctuary is fraught with unspoken projections and substitutions. As the woman attempts to fill the void of her loss with Laura, the young student begins to feel suffocated by the weight of the care and expectations thrust upon her.

movie_title: 超級瑪利歐銀河電影版
夏日大作戰 全新4K修復版

synopsis: 一群年齡、性格迥異的職業殺手，接下一單高額賞金的任務。他們的目標是幹掉黑道老大本條平藏，唯一能接觸他的方式，竟然是贏得舞蹈比賽！沒有經驗、沒有默契、也沒有幹勁，一支臨時拼湊的隊伍，竟要挑戰認真的舞蹈比賽？ 因為「過去曾有舞蹈經驗」臨時成軍的奇葩隊伍，包括：現任孤兒院輔導員、實則為傳說級的前殺手「戴亞」（佐久間大介 飾）；此次任務的召集人、風間組的二當家「熊城」（椎名桔平 飾）；討厭群體行動的冷酷殺手「桐生」（中本悠太／NCT 飾）；性格火爆卻富有義氣的殺手「阿新」（青柳翔 飾）；落魄的前黑道大叔「村雨」（小澤仁志 飾）。原本水火不容的殺手們逐漸被舞蹈的魅力吸引，不知不覺中成了名副其實的「舞林殺手」，一路過關斬將，朝冠軍之路晉級？！
tmdb_overview: 一群年齡、性格迥異的職業殺手，接下一單高額賞金的任務，目標是幹掉黑道老大本條平藏，而唯一能接觸他的方式，竟然是贏得舞蹈比賽！沒有經驗、沒有默契、也沒有幹勁，一支臨時拼湊的隊伍，竟要挑戰認真的舞蹈比賽？
tmdb_overview_en: Former assassin Daiya has long left the criminal world, but he decides to take up a mission to kill a rival gang boss for a huge payday. The catch: To kill his target at a talent show, he must go undercover and perform in a pop dance group.

synopsis: 科學家們開發將人類意識「上身」進高度擬真的機器動物體內，讓使用者以動物的樣貌與牠們溝通互動。主角梅寶是一位熱愛動物的大學生，她藉此機會將意識「上身」入機器河狸體內，認識了河狸國王喬治，理解並學習動物界的生存法則，比方看似佛系的「池塘準則」等等…。在這過程中，她也意外看透陰謀鬥爭：當市長傑瑞計畫開發自然棲地、破壞動物家園時，梅寶決定挺身而出，她與動物同伴們能否成功挽救自然棲地?
synopsis_en: Scientists have developed a way to "upload" human consciousness into hyper-realistic robotic animals, allowing users to communicate and interact with wildlife from their perspective. Mabel, an animal-loving college student, takes this opportunity to inhabit a robotic beaver. Through this experience, she meets King George the beaver and begins to learn the laws of the animal kingdom, including the seemingly zen "Pond Code." During her journey, she uncovers a sinister conspiracy: Mayor Jerry plans to develop the natural habitat, threatening to destroy the animals' homes. Mabel decides to take a stand, but can she and her animal companions successfully save their sanctuary?

synopsis: 1580年，英國。貧困的拉丁語家教威廉莎士比亞遇見自由奔放的艾格妮絲，兩人深受對方吸引，展開一段熾熱戀情，並迅速步入婚姻，與三個孩子過著幸福的生活。但當遠在倫敦的威廉戲劇事業迅速發展之際，艾格妮絲卻必須獨自撐起他們的家庭。突如其來的悲劇，讓這對夫妻曾經堅不可摧的羈絆就此受到嚴峻考驗，而這段經歷，也造就了莎士比亞的不朽傑作────〈哈姆雷特〉。
synopsis_en: England, 1580. William Shakespeare, a struggling Latin tutor, meets the free-spirited Agnes. Deeply drawn to one another, they embark on a passionate romance and quickly marry, building a happy life with their three children. However, as William’s theatrical career flourishes in distant London, Agnes is left to anchor their home alone. When a sudden tragedy strikes, the couple’s once-unbreakable bond is pushed to its limits—an experience that would eventually inspire Shakespeare’s immortal masterpiece, *Hamlet*.

movie_title: 劇場版「暗殺教室」：我們的時光
movie_title_en: Assassination Classroom the Movie: Our Time

Through this experience, she meets King George the beaver and begins to learn the laws of the animal kingdom, including the seemingly zen "Pond Code." During her journey, she uncovers a sinister conspiracy: Mayor Jerry plans to develop the natural habitat, threatening to destroy the animals' homes. Mabel decides to take a stand, but can she and her animal companions successfully save their sanctuary?

movie_title: 超級瑪利歐銀河電影版
synopsis: 【超級瑪利歐銀河電影版】是一部根據超級瑪利歐兄弟世界改編的動畫電影，故事延續【超級瑪利歐兄弟電影版】，該片於2023年締造全球13億美元的驚人票房紀錄。【超級瑪利歐銀河電影版】由再度回歸的導演亞倫霍瓦特以及麥可傑勒尼克執導，馬修福格也再度回擔任編劇，配樂師布萊恩泰勒也再度回歸編寫電影配樂。
synopsis_en: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie is an animated film based on the world of the Super Mario Bros. The story continues from The Super Mario Bros. Movie, which set a staggering global box office record of $1.3 billion in 2023. The Super Mario Galaxy Movie is directed by the returning duo Aaron Horvath and Michael Jelenic, with Matthew Fogel once again serving as screenwriter and composer Brian Tyler returning to craft the film's score.

synopsis: 意想不到的人選，一場不可能完成的任務。
synopsis_en: An unexpected choice, an impossible mission.

synopsis: 馬來西亞地產商宋龍辰以泰國降頭術奪取土地經營權，致多人喪命。泰國記者Fon懷疑其中有異，展開調查。四名年輕自媒體人前往泰國拍攝民俗，返國後接連遭遇怪事甚至喪生，Fon推測他們受降頭迫害，遂尋求高僧白師傅協助。宋龍辰繼續借黑巫師擴張勢力，與白師傅展開黑白降頭之戰。
synopsis_en: Malaysian real estate mogul Song Longchen uses Thai black magic to seize land development rights, leaving a trail of bodies in his wake. Suspecting foul play, Thai journalist Fon launches an investigation. Meanwhile, four young content creators travel to Thailand to document local folklore, only to be plagued by terrifying supernatural occurrences and mysterious deaths upon their return. Fon deduces they have fallen victim to a curse and seeks the aid of the venerable Master Bai. As Song continues to expand his empire through a dark sorcerer, a climactic battle between black and white magic erupts.

movie_title: 再見了，可魯：數位經典重映
synopsis: 在東京一個溫暖的家庭裡，五隻拉布拉多幼犬悄然誕生。其中一隻格外與眾不同，不僅腹部有著獨特的十字黑色胎記，性格既溫順又聰明。女主人滿懷期盼，希望牠能成為守護視障者的導盲犬；經過不懈努力，終於將牠送往導盲犬訓練中心，開啟專業培訓之路。牠是「可魯」，第一次離開熟悉的家，也是生命中首度面對真正的考驗。在寄養家庭的悉心照顧下，可魯慢慢學會與人建立信任與默契，並準備面對嚴格的訓練與未知的挑戰。牠將透過與生俱來的忠誠，陪伴視障者渡邊（小林薰飾演）走過平凡日常中的每一個...
synopsis_en:
In a cozy home in Tokyo, five Labrador puppies are born. One among them stands out, possessing a unique cross-shaped black birthmark on his belly and a temperament that is both gentle and intelligent. Filled with hope, his owner dreams of him becoming a guide dog for the visually impaired. Through her tireless efforts, he is eventually sent to a training center to begin his professional journey.

His name is Quill. Leaving his familiar home for the first time, he faces the first true test of his life. Under the devoted care of a foster family, Quill gradually learns to build trust and a deep bond with humans, preparing himself for rigorous training and the challenges ahead. With his innate loyalty, he will accompany Watanabe (played by Kaoru Kobayashi), a visually impaired man, through every moment of their daily lives...

movie_title: 夏日大作戰 全新4K修復版
synopsis: 差點就能成為國際數學奧林匹亞競賽日本代表的高二生．小磯健二，接下了能進行購物、行政手續等多重功能的虛擬世界「OZ」的打工，擔任低階管理員，邊維護「OZ」的系統邊度過暑假。某日，健二所仰慕的前輩夏希請他一起回她在長野縣上田市的老家，沒想到夏希竟突然在親戚面前介紹自己是她的未婚夫。另一方面，虛擬世界「OZ」發生了恐怖的緊急事件，健二的管理員帳號被盜，導致整個系統發生問題，健二竟被懷疑是嫌犯，而虛擬世界的問題也為現實生活帶來了巨大危機！
synopsis_en: Kenji Koiso, a high school sophomore and math prodigy who narrowly missed representing Japan in the International Mathematical Olympiad, spends his summer working a part-time job as a low-level moderator for "OZ"—a massive virtual world used for everything from shopping to government administration. One day, his crush and senior, Natsuki, invites him to her family home in Ueda, Nagano. To his shock, she suddenly introduces him to her large extended family as her fiancé. Meanwhile, a catastrophic emergency strikes OZ when Kenji’s moderator account is hacked, throwing the entire system into chaos. As Kenji finds himself the prime suspect in a cyber-terrorism investigation, the disruptions in the virtual world begin to spill over into reality, triggering a massive global crisis.

synopsis: 意想不到的人選，一場不可能完成的任務。
synopsis_en: An unexpected choice, an impossible mission.

synopsis: 一對父子來到摩洛哥沙漠邊緣的銳舞派對，尋找謎樣失蹤的親人。在無盡的狂歡人群之中，他們跟隨一群派對青年，駛向無垠的荒漠深處。低頻節奏震盪、沙塵漫天飛揚，兩人朝著熾熱的大地一路前行，逐漸逼近那座在伊斯蘭傳說中，象徵天堂與地獄之間、纖細如髮絲的西拉特橋。
synopsis_en:
★ Spain’s Official Entry for Best International Feature Film at the 98th Academy Awards ★
★ Jury Prize, 2025 Cannes Film Festival ★

A father and son travel to the edge of the desert in southern Morocco in search of a long-lost relative. After handing out missing person flyers at a midnight rave, they are led by a group of young revelers deeper into the most desolate reaches of the desert. Swaying between the twilight, the music, and the dunes, they draw closer to the Sirāt—the hair-thin bridge of Islamic legend that spans the void between heaven and hell.

Blending intense electronic beats with sweeping desert landscapes, the film creates an immersive, near-religious experience. The viewing journey is a tapestry of rhythm and wilderness that explores the human condition at the fracture point between nature and civilization.

movie_title: 劇場版「暗殺教室」：我們的時光
movie_title_en: Assassination Classroom the Movie: Our Time

movie_title: 超級瑪利歐銀河電影版

movie_title_en: Assassination Classroom the Movie: Our Time
Ready or Not 2: Here I Come

movie_title: 超級瑪利歐銀河電影版
(英) 超級瑪利歐銀河電影版

tmdb_overview: 17歲的欣住在去哪都不超過30分鐘的澳門，她生活平凡，直到遇見學姐菲，才開始思考是否可以過更多彩的生活。22歲時，她在臺灣念新聞系，與女友晴同居，但畢業季讓她陷入困境，無法決定未來。34歲的欣在香港打拼，試圖擺脫一片導演的魔咒，但面對適婚女友貝的壓力，最終在假結婚狂想中領悟到做自己是最佳的生存之道。
tmdb_overview_en: At 17, Xin lived a simple life in Macau. She enjoyed exploring the “world” with her DV camera, understanding the value of ordinary life. However, everything changed when she met her senior schoolmate Fei, who brought a new rhythm to Xin’s life. At 22, Xin embraced a free life in Taiwan, studying journalism and living with her girlfriend, Qing. Despite seeming ordinary, her life was also marked by graduation uncertainties. Xin wanted to stay in Taiwan but faced obstacles, and returning to Macau meant confronting her family. At 34, Xin lived a busy life shuttling between Hong Kong and Macau. Anxious to break free from the curse of being an assistant director, she felt pressured by her eligible actress girlfriend, Bei, to become independent. Facing external worries and internal conflicts, Xin finally realized that embracing her true self and being carefree might be the best way to survive.

tmdb_overview: 每天，卡爾都細心地將書籍包裝好，親自送到鎮上熟客手中。他了解每個顧客的喜好，並以能為他們挑選到最合適的書而感到自豪。有天，卡爾井然有序的生活突然遭人闖入。九歲的莎莎剛從失去母親的悲傷走出來，決定加入卡爾的送書隊伍。她不僅從送書和閱讀中找到了慰藉，莎莎獨特的人生觀也幫卡爾敞開了心扉，一段意想不到的友誼就此展開。
tmdb_overview_en: Carl’s life runs like clockwork: every day, he goes door-to-door delivering books to a handful of loyal customers. He knows their preferences and takes pride in selecting the perfect story for each of them. But his well-ordered life is turned upside down by a cheerful nine-year-old girl, Schascha, who decides to join him on his daily book round. Schascha’s unique outlook on life helps Carl to come out of his shell and realise that his customers are so much more than just that to him. But when Carl unexpectedly loses his job, this vibrant community starts to fall apart - and it will take the power of books and all Schascha’s determination to bring them back together again.

movie_title: 超級瑪利歐銀河電影版

Fon deduces they have fallen victim to a curse and seeks the aid of the venerable Master Bai. As Song continues to expand his empire through a dark sorcerer, a climactic battle between black and white magic erupts.

synopsis: 科學家們開發將人類意識「上身」進高度擬真的機器動物體內，讓使用者以動物的樣貌與牠們溝通互動。主角梅寶是一位熱愛動物的大學生，她藉此機會將意識「上身」入機器河狸體內，認識了河狸國王喬治，理解並學習動物界的生存法則，比方看似佛系的「池塘準則」等等…。在這過程中，她也意外看透陰謀鬥爭：當市長傑瑞計畫開發自然棲地、破壞動物家園時，梅寶決定挺身而出，她與動物同伴們能否成功挽救自然棲地?
synopsis_en: Scientists have developed a way to "upload" human consciousness into hyper-realistic robotic animals, allowing users to communicate and interact with wildlife from their perspective. Mabel, an animal-loving college student, takes this opportunity to inhabit a robotic beaver. Through this experience, she meets King George the beaver and begins to learn the laws of the animal kingdom, including the seemingly zen "Pond Code." During her journey, she uncovers a sinister conspiracy: Mayor Jerry plans to develop the natural habitat, threatening to destroy the animals' homes. Mabel decides to take a stand, but can she and her animal companions successfully save their sanctuary?

movie_title: 夏日大作戰 全新4K修復版
超級瑪利歐銀河電影版
劇場版「暗殺教室」：我們的時光
movie_title_en: Assassination Classroom the Movie: Our Time
synopsis: 這是在 2 月底,考試已經結束即將迎來畢業的某一天。在政府愈加嚴苛的監視之下,三年 E 班的同學們回憶起和殺老師一同度過的這一整年。在碧琪老師身上亂畫的可洗式刺青塗鴉、游泳的特別課程、和 A 班同學間的鬥爭,還有情人節巧克力等等的回憶湧上心頭,教室裡充滿了討論懷念話題的談笑聲。而另一方面,僅管在寒假期間被暗殺者四人組追殺,殺老師仍舊一派輕鬆地躲過去了。
synopsis_en: It is a day in late February; exams have ended, and graduation is just around the corner. Under the government’s increasingly strict surveillance, the students of Class 3-E look back on the year they spent with Koro-sensei. Memories flood back—the washable tattoo graffiti they drew on Ms. Bitch, the special swimming lessons, the rivalry with Class A, and Valentine’s Day chocolates—filling the classroom with nostalgic laughter and chatter. Meanwhile, despite being hunted by a quartet of assassins during winter break, Koro-sensei evaded them with his usual effortless ease.

synopsis: 科學家們開發將人類意識「上身」進高度擬真的機器動物體內，讓使用者以動物的樣貌與牠們溝通互動。主角梅寶是一位熱愛動物的大學生，她藉此機會將意識「上身」入機器河狸體內，認識了河狸國王喬治，理解並學習動物界的生存法則，比方看似佛系的「池塘準則」等等…。在這過程中，她也意外看透陰謀鬥爭：當市長傑瑞計畫開發自然棲地、破壞動物家園時，梅寶決定挺身而出，她與動物同伴們能否成功挽救自然棲地?

During her journey, she uncovers a sinister conspiracy: Mayor Jerry plans to develop the natural habitat, threatening to destroy the animals' homes. Mabel decides to take a stand, but can she and her animal companions successfully save their sanctuary?

synopsis: ★《過境情謎》、《水漾的女人》、《野火蔓延時》德國名導克里斯汀佩佐四度攜手柏林影后寶拉貝爾最新力作 ★ 2025 坎城影展導演雙週單元世界首映、多倫多影展、釜山影展、紐約影展爭相邀請， 2025
synopsis_en:
★ Based on the true story of a guide dog's life! Relive the heartwarming animal cinema classic that moved millions.
★ A rare exploration of the guide dog theme, using a delicate narrative to sincerely portray the profound bond between humans and dogs.
★ A nuanced portrayal of the challenges faced by the visually impaired, witnessing the emotional journey from initial resistance to ultimate trust.

Five adorable Labrador puppies are born into a Tokyo household. One stands out from the rest, marked by a unique cross-shaped black birthmark on its belly. Since the puppies' father was a guide dog, their owner harbors a long-held hope that one of them will follow in his footsteps and become an exceptional guide dog. Because the mother was not a guide dog, the owner’s requests are repeatedly rejected. Undeterred, her persistence finally pays off when a trainer from a guide dog school reluctantly agrees to take one of the puppies for a trial. The puppy with the birthmark is the one chosen, marking the very first separation of its life.

Movie Trailer

synopsis:
長年在台灣工作的阿耀（魏雋展飾）返鄉，與弟妹一同處理父親的喪事，卻在葬禮過程中遭遇宗教局介入，企圖帶走父親遺體。面對突如其來的衝突，三兄妹各自展現截然不同的態度：哥哥阿耀選擇退讓、弟弟阿財（呂楊飾）正面衝撞、妹妹水雲（陳雪甄飾）則勉力維持儀式與秩序。
隨著喪事推進，塵封的家族往事逐漸浮現——關於走私、遷徙、疾病，以及始終無法取得的身分證。在記憶與現實交錯之中，三人被迫重新理解父親，也重新審視自己在這片土地上的位置。
synopsis_en:
★ Winner of the Best Supporting Actress at the 62nd Golden Horse Awards.

After years of working in Taiwan, Ah Yao returns to his hometown to handle his father’s funeral alongside his younger siblings. However, the proceedings are disrupted when the Religious Affairs Bureau intervenes, attempting to seize the father’s remains. In the face of this sudden conflict, the three siblings react in starkly different ways: the eldest brother, Ah Yao, chooses to yield; the younger brother, Ah Cai, opts for direct confrontation; and their sister, Shui Yun, struggles to maintain the sanctity of the ritual and order.

As the funeral progresses, long-buried family secrets begin to surface—tales of smuggling, migration, illness, and the lifelong struggle to obtain legal identification. Caught between memory and reality, the three are forced to re-examine their father and confront their own sense of belonging in this land.

movie_title: 超級瑪利歐銀河電影版

movie_title_en: Ready or Not: Here I Come
synopsis: 在變態富豪拉多馬斯家族的殺人躲貓貓遊戲中倖存後，新娘葛蕾絲（薩瑪拉威明 飾）本以為一切都在遊戲結束後，殺戮就隨之終止，沒想到發現自己卻進入了這場噩夢遊戲的下一階段！而這次，她疏遠已久的妹妹費絲（凱瑟琳紐頓 飾）也被牽扯進來。葛蕾絲只有一次機會能存活、保護她的妹妹，並奪下掌控世界的議會「至高之座」。同時面對四個為了王座而追殺她的敵對家族，而最終勝出者將能掌控一切。
synopsis_en: After surviving the sadistic Le Domas family’s lethal game of hide-and-seek, bride Grace (Samara Weaving) believed the bloodshed had finally ended. Instead, she finds herself thrust into the next stage of the nightmare. This time, her long-estranged sister, Faith (Kathryn Newton), is caught in the crossfire. Grace has one shot to survive, protect her sister, and seize "The High Seat"—the council that rules the world. Hunted by four rival families vying for the throne, only one will emerge to claim ultimate power.

synopsis:
曾走過江湖的她們，現在要向深愛的人   用最閃耀的歌聲，唱出最難忘的表白
一群因命運錯誤的安排而被關入監獄的女性  她們在相處中彼此扶持，重新看見生命的希望
synopsis_en: Once women of the underworld, they now use their most brilliant voices to sing an unforgettable confession to the ones they love. Imprisoned by a cruel twist of fate, these women find strength in one another, supporting each other as they rediscover hope for the future.

synopsis: 金獎導演內田英治再出擊，結合殺手動作與舞蹈表演全新類之作 一群年齡、性格迥異的職業殺手，接下一單高額賞金的任務。他們的目標是幹掉黑道老大本條平藏，唯一能接觸他的方式，竟然是贏得舞蹈比賽！沒有經驗、沒有默契、也沒有幹勁，一支臨時拼湊的隊伍，竟要挑戰認真的舞蹈比賽？因為「過去曾有舞蹈經驗」臨時成軍的奇葩隊伍，包括：現任孤兒院輔導員、實則為傳說級的前殺手「戴亞」；此次任務的召集人、風間組的二當家「熊城」；討厭群體行動的冷酷殺手「桐生」；性格火爆卻富有義氣的殺手「阿新」；落魄的前黑道大叔「村雨」。原本水火不容的殺手們逐漸被舞蹈的魅力吸引，不知不覺中成了名副其實的「舞林殺手」，一路過關斬將，朝冠軍之路晉級？！
tmdb_overview: 一群年齡、性格迥異的職業殺手，接下一單高額賞金的任務，目標是幹掉黑道老大本條平藏，而唯一能接觸他的方式，竟然是贏得舞蹈比賽！沒有經驗、沒有默契、也沒有幹勁，一支臨時拼湊的隊伍，竟要挑戰認真的舞蹈比賽？
tmdb_overview_en: Former assassin Daiya has long left the criminal world, but he decides to take up a mission to kill a rival gang boss for a huge payday. The catch: To kill his target at a talent show, he must go undercover and perform in a pop dance group.

synopsis: ★ 「金獎製造機」A24最新出品，打造史上最抓馬婚禮！ ★ 【夢行者保羅】克里斯多佛博格利自編自導， 前所未有的愛情喜劇新體驗
synopsis_en:
★ Based on the true story of a guide dog's life! Relive the heartwarming animal cinema classic that moved millions.
★ A rare exploration of the guide dog theme, using a delicate narrative to sincerely portray the profound bond between humans and dogs.
★ A nuanced portrayal of the challenges faced by the visually impaired, witnessing the emotional journey from initial resistance to ultimate trust.

Five adorable Labrador puppies are born into a Tokyo household. One stands out from the rest, marked by a unique cross-shaped black birthmark on its belly. Since the puppies' father was a guide dog, their owner harbors a long-held hope that one of them will follow in his footsteps and become an exceptional guide dog. Because the mother was not a guide dog, the owner’s requests are repeatedly rejected. Undeterred, her persistence finally pays off when a trainer from a guide dog school reluctantly agrees to take one of the puppies for a trial. The puppy with the birthmark is the one chosen, marking the very first separation of its life.

Movie Trailer

movie_title: 超級瑪利歐銀河電影版
synopsis: 【超級瑪利歐銀河電影版】是一部根據超級瑪利歐兄弟世界改編的動畫電影，故事延續【超級瑪利歐兄弟電影版】，該片於2023年締造全球13億美元的驚人票房紀錄。【超級瑪利歐銀河電影版】由再度回歸的導演亞倫霍瓦特以及麥可傑勒尼克執導，馬修福格也再度回擔任編劇，配樂師布萊恩泰勒也再度回歸編寫電影配樂。
synopsis_en: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie is an animated film based on the world of the Super Mario Bros. The story continues from The Super Mario Bros. Movie, which set a staggering global box office record of $1.3 billion in 2023. The Super Mario Galaxy Movie is directed by the returning duo Aaron Horvath and Michael Jelenic, with Matthew Fogel once again serving as screenwriter and composer Brian Tyler returning to craft the film's score.

movie_title: 超級瑪利歐銀河電影版
超級瑪利歐銀河電影版

synopsis: 一名年輕女子（薩琪畢茲 飾）必須在惡魔邪教操控下的威吉大樓熬過一晚，逃過神秘扭曲的死亡陷阱巢穴，否則就會成為下一個祭品。恐怖片經典《牠》名導安迪馬希提坐鎮監製，與創意十足的導演基里爾索科洛夫攜手合作，打造出宛如一場史詩般的恐怖、驚悚、喜劇之戰，交織著殺戮與邪惡的黑色幽默，更以獨特另類的狂放姿態震撼登場。
synopsis_en: A young woman (Zazie Beetz) must survive a night in the Vedge building, navigating a den of mysterious and twisted death traps controlled by a demonic cult, or risk becoming their next sacrifice. Produced by Andy Muschietti, the acclaimed director of the horror classic *IT*, and visionary director Kirill Sokolov, this film is an epic collision of horror, suspense, and comedy. Interweaving carnage with wicked dark humor, it makes a bold and shocking debut with its unique, wild, and alternative style.

synopsis: 世紀劫案震撼全城！天才盜匪「影子集團」劫走數億資產，卻憑借超強反偵察能力全身而退，戲耍警方「天眼」系統。一籌莫展之際，澳門司警局請回隱退多年的跟蹤專家黃德忠（成龍 飾），他培養年輕司警何秋果（張子楓 飾）等人，重組「神秘跟蹤隊」，最終鎖定了盜匪團的幕後狼王——傅隆生（梁家輝 飾）。當警方布下天羅地網，影子集團也派出天才駭客（此沙 飾）和行動首領（文俊輝 飾）設下完美局中局...
synopsis_en:
A heist of the century has shocked the city! The "Shadow Group," a gang of genius thieves, has made off with hundreds of millions in assets. Utilizing elite counter-surveillance skills, they managed to escape unscathed, making a mockery of the police's "Sky Eye" surveillance system. 

With the investigation at a standstill, the Macau Judiciary Police recall retired surveillance expert Huang Dezhong (Jackie Chan). Huang mentors young officer He Qiuguo (Zhang Zifeng) and others to reform the "Secret Surveillance Unit," eventually narrowing their sights on the mastermind behind the gang—the "Wolf King," Fu Longsheng (Tony Leung Ka-fai). But as the police lay an inescapable dragnet, the Shadow Group deploys a genius hacker (Ci Sha) and their tactical leader (Wen Junhui) to set a perfect trap within a trap...

director: 克里斯汀佩佐 Christian Petzold
synopsis: 2025法國電影筆記年度十大佳片 《過境情謎》、《水漾的女人》、《野火蔓延時》德國名導克里斯汀佩佐四度攜手柏林影后寶拉貝爾最新力作 鋼琴系學生蘿拉（寶拉貝爾 飾）在一次週末出遊途中，她意外捲入車禍，雖然毫髮無傷但男友卻重傷過世，內心則被巨大的驚嚇與空虛籠罩。在德國鄉間遇見一名目睹事故的婦人，對方因蘿拉神似早逝的女兒，而溫柔地收留她進入宛如世外桃源的家庭。這個看似溫暖的避風港，實則充滿難以言明的替代與投射，婦人試圖將失去女兒的空缺，填補在蘿拉身上，而蘿拉也在被關懷與被期待之間，逐漸感到窒息......。德國電影大師克里斯汀佩佐以新作《鏡之第三樂章》再次以冷靜而詩意的筆觸，勾勒出一段關於創傷、投射與「被需要」的危險關係。影片於 2025 年坎城影展導演雙週單元世界首映獲得極高評價，延續導演一貫的極簡風格與心理懸疑氣息。以近乎懸疑片的節奏，讓觀眾意識到這個神秘家庭並非單純的善意關懷，而是一場關於情感佔有與身份投射的暗流。 On a weekend trip to the countryside, Laura, a piano student from Berlin, miraculously survives a car crash. Physically unhurt but deeply shaken, she is taken in by a local woman who witnessed the accident and now cares for Laura with motherly devotion. When her husband and adult son also give up their initial resistance to Laura's presence, the four of them slowly build up some family-like routine and spend some days of happiness together. But soon they can no longer ignore their past, and Laura has to come to terms with her own life.
synopsis_en: ★ A Cahiers du Cinéma Top 10 Film of 2025. While on a weekend getaway, piano student Laura is involved in a car accident. Though she emerges physically unscathed, her boyfriend is killed, leaving her consumed by shock and a profound sense of emptiness. In the German countryside, she encounters a woman who witnessed the crash. Struck by Laura’s resemblance to her own late daughter, the woman kindly takes her into her idyllic family home. However, this seemingly warm sanctuary is fraught with unspoken projections and substitutions. As the woman attempts to fill the void of her loss with Laura, the young student begins to feel suffocated by the weight of the care and expectations thrust upon her.

synopsis: 查理在咖啡廳邂逅艾瑪，一場笨拙的搭話開啟了兩年的甜蜜愛戀。正當兩人深信彼此是唯一、著手籌備婚禮時，一場好友聚會卻掀起波瀾。在「分享最糟糕往事」的遊戲中，艾瑪意外坦白一段不為人知的震撼過去。這份秘密讓全場難以置信，也讓查理開始重新審視這份關係。在步入禮堂的最後關頭，兩人的愛情正經受誠信與信任的嚴峻考驗。
synopsis_en: Charlie met Emma at a cafe, where a clumsy icebreaker sparked a two-year romance. Just as the two were convinced they had found "the one" and began planning their wedding, a gathering with friends turned their world upside down. During a game of "sharing your worst past," Emma unexpectedly confesses a shocking secret from her history. The revelation leaves everyone in disbelief and forces Charlie to re-examine their entire relationship. On the verge of walking down the aisle, their love faces a grueling test of honesty and trust.

synopsis: 個性社恐的送書人卡爾，生活就像鐘錶一樣地精準。每天，他踩著相同的步伐，將一本本包裝精美的書，親手送到忠實顧客的家門口。他了解每個顧客的喜好，並以能為他們挑選到最合適的書而感到自豪。有天，卡爾井然有序的生活突然遭人闖入。9 歲的莎莎剛從失去母親悲傷走出來，決定加入卡爾的送書隊伍。她不僅從送書和閱讀中找到了慰藉，獨特的人生觀也幫卡爾敞開了心扉，一段意想不到的友誼就此展開。一場突如其來的變故，讓卡爾失去了工作。原本熱鬧、充滿書香的小鎮也逐漸走向沉寂。
synopsis_en:
Based on the heartwarming bestseller that topped the charts for 100 weeks, *The Door-to-Door Bookstore* is a box office sensation that earned over NT$200 million in Germany.

Carl, a dedicated "book walker," lives a life as precise as clockwork. Every day, he follows the exact same path, hand-delivering carefully wrapped books to the doorsteps of his loyal customers. He knows the tastes of everyone in town and takes great pride in his ability to select the perfect book for each person.

One day, Carl’s orderly world is unexpectedly interrupted. Nine-year-old Schascha, who is still healing from the loss of her mother, decides to join Carl on his rounds. Not only does she find solace in the books and the journey, but her unique perspective on life also helps Carl open his heart, sparking an unexpected friendship.

However, a sudden turn of events causes Carl to lose his job. The once-vibrant town, once filled with the fragrance of books, begins to fall into a lonely silence. As the community drifts apart, Schascha decides to rely on the power she believes in most: the magic of a good book to bring people together. Joining forces with Carl, she sets out to create a profound and positive change—not just for their readers, but for themselves as well.

movie_title_en: Ready or Not 2: Here I Come

synopsis: 科學家們開發將人類意識「上身」進高度擬真的機器動物體內，讓使用者以動物的樣貌與牠們溝通互動。主角梅寶是一位熱愛動物的大學生，她藉此機會將意識「上身」入機器河狸體內，認識了河狸國王喬治，理解並學習動物界的生存法則，比方看似佛系的「池塘準則」等等…。在這過程中，她也意外看透陰謀鬥爭：當市長傑瑞計畫開發自然棲地、破壞動物家園時，梅寶決定挺身而出，她與動物同伴們能否成功挽救自然棲地?
synopsis_en: Scientists have developed a way to "upload" human consciousness into hyper-realistic robotic animals, allowing users to communicate and interact with wildlife from their perspective. Mabel, an animal-loving college student, takes this opportunity to inhabit a robotic beaver. Through this experience, she meets King George the beaver and begins to learn the laws of the animal kingdom, including the seemingly zen "Pond Code." During her journey, she uncovers a sinister conspiracy: Mayor Jerry plans to develop the natural habitat, threatening to destroy the animals' homes. Mabel decides to take a stand, but can she and her animal companions successfully save their sanctuary?

movie_title: 超級瑪利歐銀河電影版

synopsis_en:
★ Based on the true story of a guide dog's life! Relive the heartwarming animal cinema classic that moved millions.
★ A rare exploration of the guide dog theme, using a delicate narrative to sincerely portray the profound bond between humans and dogs.
★ A nuanced portrayal of the challenges faced by the visually impaired, witnessing the emotional journey from initial resistance to ultimate trust.

Five adorable Labrador puppies are born into a Tokyo household. One stands out from the rest, marked by a unique cross-shaped black birthmark on its belly. Since the puppies' father was a guide dog, their owner harbors a long-held hope that one of them will follow in his footsteps and become an exceptional guide dog. Because the mother was not a guide dog, the owner’s requests are repeatedly rejected. Undeterred, her persistence finally pays off when a trainer from a guide dog school reluctantly agrees to take one of the puppies for a trial. The puppy with the birthmark is the one chosen, marking the very first separation of its life.

Movie Trailer

tmdb_overview: 透過一年的實地拍攝，展現烏克蘭師生在戰火下堅持教育的日常。此紀錄片在無訪談、無旁白、無重演的情況下，描繪烏克蘭距離戰火邊緣的師生，他們在於實體與線上教室間生活的脆弱與堅毅。
tmdb_overview_en: Despite the war, school life continues in Ukraine, with pupils and teachers striving to continue learning even under constant threat. The film is a mosaic of the everyday lives of teachers and students from different corners of Ukraine.

synopsis: 【黑豹】及【金牌拳手】導演萊恩庫格勒與麥可·B·喬丹聯手帶來最新恐怖鉅作。雙胞胎兄弟試圖擺脫不愉快的過往，回到家鄉想重新開始，但卻發現更為恐怖的邪惡勢力正等待著他們的回歸…
synopsis_en: From director Ryan Coogler and Michael B. Jordan, the duo behind *Black Panther* and *Creed*, comes a new masterpiece of horror. Twin brothers return to their hometown in an attempt to leave their troubled past behind and start anew, only to discover that an even more terrifying evil is waiting for their return...

tmdb_overview: 諭明（張孝全飾）與依庭（林依晨飾）在大學圖書館的「Deep Quiet Room」相識，兩人相愛並走入婚姻，原以為生活將平穩展開，卻在依庭懷孕後，過往的壓力與家庭陰影逐漸浮現，連帶改變了兩人的關係。
tmdb_overview_en: After his pregnant wife Yi-ting unexpectedly committed suicide, Ming decides to take care of his father-in-law, only to find out the unbearable truth of Yi-ting’s family that leads to her death.

tmdb_overview: 一對父子來到摩洛哥的沙漠邊緣，尋找失蹤已久的親人。他們先在一場午夜銳舞派對中發送協尋傳單，接著經由一群派對青年引導，直搗更深處、更荒涼的沙漠地帶。他們在日暮、音樂與沙漠間搖擺，逐漸逼近那條在伊斯蘭傳說中象徵天堂與地獄之間、纖細如髮絲的 Sirāt 西拉特橋......
tmdb_overview_en: A man and his son arrive at a rave lost in the mountains of Morocco. They are looking for Marina, their daughter and sister, who disappeared months ago at another rave. Driven by fate, they decide to follow a group of ravers in search of one last party, in hopes Marina will be there.

synopsis: ★超越【寒戰】、【無雙】，引爆亞洲犯罪電影票房新紀錄！ 世紀劫案震撼全城！天才盜匪「影子集團」劫走數億資產，卻憑借超強反偵察能力全身而退，戲耍警方「天眼」系統。一籌莫展之際，澳門司警局請回隱退多年的跟蹤專家黃德忠（成龍 飾），他培養年輕司警何秋果（張子楓 飾）等人，重組「神秘跟蹤隊」，最終鎖定了盜匪團的幕後狼王——傅隆生（梁家輝 飾）。當警方布下天羅地網，影子集團也派出天才駭客（此沙 飾）和行動首領（文俊輝 飾）設下完美局中局... 在這場千變萬化、龍入狼群的極限較量裡，誰能成為最後的贏家？ 電影預告 其他熱映 now showing

synopsis: ★ 入圍第62屆金馬獎七項大獎（最佳新導演、攝影、美術設計、男女主角等） 諭明與依庭在大學圖書館的「Deep Quiet Room」相識，兩人相愛並走入婚姻，原以為生活將平穩展開，卻在依庭懷孕後，過往的壓力與家庭陰影逐漸浮現，連帶改變了兩人的關係。行動不便的岳父搬入同住，諭明努力維繫這個家，過著陌生客套的窒息生活。始終無法猜透依庭內心的諭明，直到他讀到依庭正在編輯的書，才驚覺她所承受的，遠超過自己所理解的一切。

tmdb_overview_en: After his pregnant wife Yi-ting unexpectedly committed suicide, Ming decides to take care of his father-in-law, only to find out the unbearable truth of Yi-ting’s family that leads to her death.

movie_title: 超級瑪利歐銀河電影版
synopsis: 【超級瑪利歐銀河電影版】是一部根據超級瑪利歐兄弟世界改編的動畫電影，故事延續【超級瑪利歐兄弟電影版】，該片於2023年締造全球13億美元的驚人票房紀錄。【超級瑪利歐銀河電影版】由再度回歸的導演亞倫霍瓦特以及麥可傑勒尼克執導，馬修福格也再度回擔任編劇，配樂師布萊恩泰勒也再度回歸編寫電影配樂。
synopsis_en: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie is an animated film based on the world of the Super Mario Bros. The story continues from The Super Mario Bros. Movie, which set a staggering global box office record of $1.3 billion in 2023. The Super Mario Galaxy Movie is directed by the returning duo Aaron Horvath and Michael Jelenic, with Matthew Fogel once again serving as screenwriter and composer Brian Tyler returning to craft the film's score.

synopsis: 柏林影展觀眾票選獎 改編自風靡全球、銷售突破30國的暢銷小說〈送書人〉，是一部溫暖、幽默、令人心情瞬間變亮的療癒系喜劇。電影講述一段跨越世代的奇妙友誼，也傳遞一個簡單卻強大的訊息：好故事能療癒人心，好書則永遠具備連繫人心的力量，獲德國影媒【Spielfilm】讚譽是「獻給文學愛好者的童話故事」。個性執著的送書人卡爾，生活就像鐘錶一樣地精準。每天，他踩著相同的步伐，將一本本包裝好的書，親手送到忠實顧客的家門口。他了解鎮上每個顧客的喜好，並以能為他們挑選到最合適的書而感到自豪。 有天，卡爾井然有序的生活卻突然遭人闖入。9歲的莎莎剛從失去母親悲傷走出來，決定加入卡爾的送書人小組。她不僅從送書和閱讀中找到慰藉，獨特的人生觀也幫卡爾敞開了心扉，一段意想不到的友誼就此展開。 一場突如其來的變故，讓卡爾失去了工作。原本熱鬧、充滿書香的小鎮也逐漸走向沉寂。就在顧客逐漸散落之際，莎莎決定靠自己最相信的力量：好書的魔力，能讓人們再次團聚一起。她與卡爾攜手合作，不僅為讀者們，也為他們自己，帶來了意義深遠的正面改變。 The 70-year old Carl Kollhoff works in a little bookshop in a small town, where he wraps up books to deliver them by foot. One day the 9-year old girl Schascha joins him on his delivering-tours. She calls him the "Buchspazierer".
tmdb_overview: 每天，卡爾都細心地將書籍包裝好，親自送到鎮上熟客手中。他了解每個顧客的喜好，並以能為他們挑選到最合適的書而感到自豪。有天，卡爾井然有序的生活突然遭人闖入。九歲的莎莎剛從失去母親的悲傷走出來，決定加入卡爾的送書隊伍。她不僅從送書和閱讀中找到了慰藉，莎莎獨特的人生觀也幫卡爾敞開了心扉，一段意想不到的友誼就此展開。
tmdb_overview_en: Carl’s life runs like clockwork: every day, he goes door-to-door delivering books to a handful of loyal customers. He knows their preferences and takes pride in selecting the perfect story for each of them. But his well-ordered life is turned upside down by a cheerful nine-year-old girl, Schascha, who decides to join him on his daily book round. Schascha’s unique outlook on life helps Carl to come out of his shell and realise that his customers are so much more than just that to him. But when Carl unexpectedly loses his job, this vibrant community starts to fall apart - and it will take the power of books and all Schascha’s determination to bring them back together again.

再見了，可魯：數位經典重映
synopsis: 在東京一個溫暖的家庭裡，五隻拉布拉多幼犬悄然誕生。其中一隻格外與眾不同，不僅腹部有著獨特的十字黑色胎記，性格既溫順又聰明。女主人滿懷期盼，希望牠能成為守護視障者的導盲犬；經過不懈努力，終於將牠送往導盲犬訓練中心，開啟專業培訓之路。牠是「可魯」，第一次離開熟悉的家，也是生命中首度面對真正的考驗。在寄養家庭的悉心照顧下，可魯慢慢學會與人建立信任與默契，並準備面對嚴格的訓練與未知的挑戰。牠將透過與生俱來的忠誠，陪伴視障者渡邊（小林薰飾演）走過平凡日常中的每一個...
synopsis_en:
In a cozy home in Tokyo, five Labrador puppies are born. One among them stands out, possessing a unique cross-shaped black birthmark on his belly and a temperament that is both gentle and intelligent. Filled with hope, his owner dreams of him becoming a guide dog for the visually impaired. Through her tireless efforts, he is eventually sent to a training center to begin his professional journey.

His name is Quill. Leaving his familiar home for the first time, he faces the first true test of his life. Under the devoted care of a foster family, Quill gradually learns to build trust and a deep bond with humans, preparing himself for rigorous training and the challenges ahead. With his innate loyalty, he will accompany Watanabe (played by Kaoru Kobayashi), a visually impaired man, through every moment of their daily lives...

director: 克里斯汀佩佐 Christian Petzold
synopsis: ★2025法國電影筆記年度十大佳片 鋼琴系學生蘿拉在一次週末出遊途中，意外捲入車禍，雖然毫髮無傷但男友卻重傷過世，內心則被巨大的驚嚇與空虛籠罩。在德國鄉間遇見一名目睹事故的婦人，對方因蘿拉神似早逝的女兒，而溫柔地收留她進入宛如世外桃源的家庭。這個看似溫暖的避風港，實則充滿難以言明的替代與投射，婦人試圖將失去女兒的空缺，填補在蘿拉身上，而蘿拉也在被關懷與被期待之間，逐漸感到窒息……。
synopsis_en: ★ A Cahiers du Cinéma Top 10 Film of 2025. While on a weekend getaway, piano student Laura is involved in a car accident. Though she emerges physically unscathed, her boyfriend is killed, leaving her consumed by shock and a profound sense of emptiness. In the German countryside, she encounters a woman who witnessed the crash. Struck by Laura’s resemblance to her own late daughter, the woman kindly takes her into her idyllic family home. However, this seemingly warm sanctuary is fraught with unspoken projections and substitutions. As the woman attempts to fill the void of her loss with Laura, the young student begins to feel suffocated by the weight of the care and expectations thrust upon her.

synopsis: 17歲的欣，身處去哪都不超過三十分鐘的澳門。她的生活平凡，直到遇見學姐菲才開始思考自己是否可以過更多姿多彩的生活。22歲時，她在台灣就讀新聞系，與女友晴同居，但畢業季的波瀾讓她陷入困境，無法決定未來。34歲的欣在香港打拼，試圖擺脫「一片導演」的魔咒，亦面對來自適婚女友貝的壓力。最終在貝的假結婚狂想中，欣領悟到做自己是最佳的生存之道。
synopsis_en:
★ 2025 Official Selection, "Vision" Competition, 30th Busan International Film Festival
★ 2025 Nominee, Best Supporting Actress, 62nd Golden Horse Awards

As time flows, love is sought across three cities.

Hong Kong, age 34: She is a director whose latest project has stalled. Trapped in a creative drought and caught at a crossroads with her girlfriend over the question of "marriage," she finds herself paralyzed by indecision.

Taiwan, age 22: She is a stranger studying abroad alone. Wandering the boundary between freedom and bewilderment, she is locked in a volatile, love-hate relationship, burning with a passion that leaves the future blurred.

Macau, age 17: She is a gentle, obedient girl. But after meeting an older student that summer, the windows to her heart are flung open, igniting a sudden longing for the world—even if the cost remains unknown.

synopsis: 個性執著的送書人卡爾，生活就像鐘錶一樣地精準。每天，他踩著相同的步伐，將一本本包裝好的書，親手送到忠實顧客的家門口。他了解鎮上每個顧客的喜好，並以能為他們挑選到最合適的書而感到自豪。 有天，卡爾井然有序的生活卻突然遭人闖入。9歲的莎莎剛從失去母親悲傷走出來，決定加入卡爾的送書人小組。她不僅從送書和閱讀中找到慰藉，獨特的人生觀也幫卡爾敞開了心扉，一段意想不到的友誼就此展開。 一場突如其來的變故，讓卡爾失去了工作。原本熱鬧、充滿書香的小鎮也逐漸走向沉寂。就在顧客逐漸散落之際，莎莎決定靠自己最相信的力量：好書的魔力，能讓人們再次團聚一起。她與卡爾攜手合作，不僅為讀者們，也為他們自己，帶來了意義深遠的正面改變。 電影預告 其他熱映
synopsis_en:
★ Based on the true story of a guide dog's life! Relive the heartwarming animal cinema classic that moved millions.
★ A rare exploration of the guide dog theme, using a delicate narrative to sincerely portray the profound bond between humans and dogs.
★ A nuanced portrayal of the challenges faced by the visually impaired, witnessing the emotional journey from initial resistance to ultimate trust.

Five adorable Labrador puppies are born into a Tokyo household. One stands out from the rest, marked by a unique cross-shaped black birthmark on its belly. Since the puppies' father was a guide dog, their owner harbors a long-held hope that one of them will follow in his footsteps and become an exceptional guide dog. Because the mother was not a guide dog, the owner’s requests are repeatedly rejected. Undeterred, her persistence finally pays off when a trainer from a guide dog school reluctantly agrees to take one of the puppies for a trial. The puppy with the birthmark is the one chosen, marking the very first separation of its life.

synopsis: 一名年輕女子（薩琪畢茲 飾）必須在惡魔邪教操控下的威吉大樓熬過一晚，逃過神秘扭曲的死亡陷阱巢穴，否則就會成為下一個祭品。恐怖片經典《牠》名導安迪馬希提坐鎮監製，與創意十足的導演基里爾索科洛夫攜手合作，打造出宛如一場史詩般的恐怖、驚悚、喜劇之戰，交織著殺戮與邪惡的黑色幽默，更以獨特另類的狂放姿態震撼登場。
synopsis_en: A young woman (Zazie Beetz) must survive a night in the Vedge building, navigating a den of mysterious and twisted death traps controlled by a demonic cult, or risk becoming their next sacrifice. Produced by Andy Muschietti, the acclaimed director of the horror classic *IT*, and visionary director Kirill Sokolov, this film is an epic collision of horror, suspense, and comedy. Interweaving carnage with wicked dark humor, it makes a bold and shocking debut with its unique, wild, and alternative style.

synopsis: 1990 年的伊拉克，戰火與制裁讓城市像被抽乾色彩，物資稀缺到連糖都成了奢侈。此時，總統海珊卻下令全國為他慶生，每個班級都必須獻上一個蛋糕，否則將面臨難以想像的懲罰。九歲的拉米雅完全沒料到，自己竟被抽中負責這項任務。她與祖母相依為命，家裡連麵包都難得製作，更別提華麗的蛋糕。為了避免全班遭殃，她抱著心愛的公雞，跟著祖母踏上前往城鎮的旅途，以為只是去收集材料，卻沒想到等待她的是更加複雜、充滿未知的冒險。在動盪的城市中，她看見大人們為了生存而變形的面孔：有...
synopsis_en:
★ Iraq’s official entry for the 2026 Academy Award for Best International Feature Film, a dark horse that advanced to the top 15 shortlist.

In 1990 Iraq, war and sanctions have drained the color from the cities, and supplies are so scarce that even sugar has become a luxury. Amidst this hardship, President Saddam Hussein orders the entire nation to celebrate his birthday, decreeing that every school class must present him with a cake or face unimaginable consequences. Nine-year-old Lamia never expected that she would be the one chosen for this daunting task.

Living alone with her grandmother, they can barely afford to bake bread, let alone a grand cake. To save her classmates from punishment, Lamia clutches her beloved rooster and sets off with her grandmother on a journey to the city. What she thought would be a simple trip to gather ingredients turns into a complex and perilous adventure. In the heart of a turbulent city, she witnesses the many faces of adults struggling to survive: the kind and the cunning, those who offer a helping hand, and those who would betray her in a heartbeat.

movie_title_en: Ready or Not 2: Here I Come

synopsis: 日本攝影教主 蜷川實花 電影導演首作重登大銀幕 年僅八歲的清葉被賣到吉原玉菊屋開啟藝妓生涯，天生反骨又好強的她，在領她入門的藝妓粧衣帶領下，日益綻放出奪目的光彩，長大後成為眾所矚目的焦點。浮沉於紙醉金迷的花花世界，不同於其他藝妓的溫柔可人，向來不受禮法約束的她，把「冷酷跩」當成釣男人的終極手段，隨著歲月流逝，清葉一步步經歷了和前輩們一樣的道路，為情所困、對愛失望、放浪不羈、全力以赴投身事業，最終成為吉原的首席花魁。然而就在清葉站上事業頂點，一場令她永生難忘的櫻花雨將再次改變她的人生，她叛逆的最終抉擇更讓所有人瞠目結舌。 日本攝影教主蜷川實花導演處女作，改編自安野夢洋子漫畫原作，日本搖滾天后椎名林檎擔任音樂總監，日本知名模特兒、歌手、演員土屋安娜主演，可謂日本電影的女力大爆發，共創一場視覺與聽覺的饗宴。
tmdb_overview: 清葉八歲時，就被賣到酒家學做藝妓。天生反骨好強的個性，加上領她入門的藝妓粧妃（菅野美穗 飾）技術高超，讓長大後的清葉（土屋安娜 飾）成了眾所矚目的焦點。然而她不慎迷戀恩客反遭拋棄，讓她對愛情完全失望，決心全力以赴投入工作，遂即當上首席藝妓－花魁。這時，她遇上一個肯為她付出一切的武士將軍－倉之助（椎名桔平 飾）。將軍不惜鉅資完成了清葉的心願，讓清葉十分感動並決定嫁給將軍…。
tmdb_overview_en: Kiyoha rises from the lowly courtesan ranks to the high class position of Oiran in the steamy red-light district of Yoshiwara. She is determined to stand on her own two feet and live life as she pleased.

Movie, which set a staggering global box office record of $1.3 billion in 2023. synopsis: 一群年齡、性格迥異的職業殺手，接下一單高額賞金的任務。他們的目標是幹掉黑道老大本條平藏，唯一能接觸他的方式，竟然是贏得舞蹈比賽！沒有經驗、沒有默契、也沒有幹勁，一支臨時拼湊的隊伍，竟要挑戰認真的舞蹈比賽？ 因為「過去曾有舞蹈經驗」臨時成軍的奇葩隊伍，包括：現任孤兒院輔導員、實則為傳說級的前殺手「戴亞」（佐久間大介 飾）；此次任務的召集人、風間組的二當家「熊城」（椎名桔平 飾）；討厭群體行動的冷酷殺手「桐生」（中本悠太／NCT 飾）；性格火爆卻富有義氣的殺手「阿新」（青柳翔 飾）；落魄的前黑道大叔「村雨」（小澤仁志 飾）。原本水火不容的殺手們逐漸被舞蹈的魅力吸引，不知不覺中成了名副其實的「舞林殺手」，一路過關斬將，朝冠軍之路晉級？！
tmdb_overview: 一群年齡、性格迥異的職業殺手，接下一單高額賞金的任務，目標是幹掉黑道老大本條平藏，而唯一能接觸他的方式，竟然是贏得舞蹈比賽！沒有經驗、沒有默契、也沒有幹勁，一支臨時拼湊的隊伍，竟要挑戰認真的舞蹈比賽？
tmdb_overview_en: Former assassin Daiya has long left the criminal world, but he decides to take up a mission to kill a rival gang boss for a huge payday. The catch: To kill his target at a talent show, he must go undercover and perform in a pop dance group.

synopsis: 一群年齡、性格迥異的職業殺手，接下一單高額賞金的任務。他們的目標是幹掉黑道老大本條平藏，唯一能接觸他的方式，竟然是贏得舞蹈比賽！沒有經驗、沒有默契、也沒有幹勁，一支臨時拼湊的隊伍，竟要挑戰認真的舞蹈比賽？ 因為「過去曾有舞蹈經驗」臨時成軍的奇葩隊伍，包括：現任孤兒院輔導員、實則為傳說級的前殺手「戴亞」（佐久間大介 飾）；此次任務的召集人、風間組的二當家「熊城」（椎名桔平 飾）；討厭群體行動的冷酷殺手「桐生」（中本悠太／NCT 飾）；性格火爆卻富有義氣的殺手 「阿新」 （青柳翔 飾）；落魄的前黑道大叔「村雨」（小澤仁志 飾）。原本水火不容的殺手們逐漸被舞蹈的魅力吸引，不知不覺中成了名副其實的「舞林殺手」，一路過關斬將，朝冠軍之路晉級？！
synopsis_en:
★ Based on the true story of a guide dog's life! Relive the heartwarming animal cinema classic that moved millions.
★ A rare exploration of the guide dog theme, using a delicate narrative to sincerely portray the profound bond between humans and dogs.
★ A nuanced portrayal of the challenges faced by the visually impaired, witnessing the emotional journey from initial resistance to ultimate trust.

Five adorable Labrador puppies are born into a Tokyo household. One stands out from the rest, marked by a unique cross-shaped black birthmark on its belly. Since the puppies' father was a guide dog, their owner harbors a long-held hope that one of them will follow in his footsteps and become an exceptional guide dog. Because the mother was not a guide dog, the owner’s requests are repeatedly rejected. Undeterred, her persistence finally pays off when a trainer from a guide dog school reluctantly agrees to take one of the puppies for a trial. The puppy with the birthmark is the one chosen, marking the very first separation of its life.

Movie Trailer

director: 亞倫霍瓦特、麥可傑勒尼克
synopsis: 故事延續《超級瑪利歐兄弟電影版》，該片於2023年締造全球13億美元的驚人票房紀錄。由再度回歸的導演亞倫霍瓦特以及麥可傑勒尼克執導，馬修福格也再度回擔任編劇，配樂師布萊恩泰勒也再度回歸編寫電影配樂。 電影預告 其他熱映 now showing view more

synopsis: 「今天我們結婚啊，不應該是最開心的嗎？」離異父母 ＋ 迷信岳父＝ 一天兩場婚禮，且雙方賓客不得相見！當本該是主角的新郎新娘，成為完成長輩心願的配角，這兩場世紀婚禮要怎麼進行下去？在各種極限任務與出包危機中，先說好——不管今天發生多少鳥事，我們都要，一起面對每一刻。
synopsis_en:
"Today is our wedding day; shouldn't it be the happiest day of our lives?" 

Between divorced parents and a superstitious father-in-law, the result is two weddings in a single day—and the guests from both sides are strictly forbidden from seeing one another! When the bride and groom, who should be the stars of the show, find themselves playing supporting roles just to fulfill their elders' wishes, how can these two "weddings of the century" possibly succeed? Amidst high-stakes missions and non-stop blunders, one promise remains: no matter how much chaos ensues today, we will face every moment together.

movie_title: 超級瑪利歐銀河電影版

movie_title_en: Ready or Not 2: Here I Come

movie_title: 超級瑪利歐銀河電影版

tmdb_overview: 在台灣工作的阿耀回到馬來西亞，與弟妹一起為父親舉辦喪禮，卻遇到宗教局人員突然來訪，帶走了父親的遺體。原來父親生前偷偷加入了回教，因此必須葬在回教墓園。不服氣的兄弟倆因而展開搶回遺體的旅程。過程中，阿耀回憶起小時候父親教他如何在這對華人不公平的社會狡猾求存，而妹妹水雲也發現了父親入回教的真正原因。
tmdb_overview_en: When Ah Yao returns to Malaysia for his father’s funeral, he expects grief, not chaos. But everything turns upside down when the religious police storm in, claiming his father—who secretly converted to Islam—must be buried in an Islamic cemetery. Refusing to let go, Ah Yao and his siblings set out on a wild, darkly comedic journey to reclaim the body, confronting cultural clashes, family secrets, and absurd obstacles along the way.

movie_title: (英) 超級瑪利歐銀河電影版

tmdb_overview: 查理在咖啡廳邂逅艾瑪，一場笨拙的搭話開啟了兩年的甜蜜愛戀。正當兩人深信彼此是唯一、著手籌備婚禮時，一場好友聚會卻掀起波瀾。在「分享最糟糕往事」的遊戲中，艾瑪意外坦白一段不為人知的震撼過去。這份祕密讓全場難以置信，也讓查理開始重新審視這份關係。在步入禮堂的最後關頭，兩人的愛情正受誠信與信任的嚴峻考驗。
tmdb_overview_en: A happily engaged couple is put to the test when an unexpected turn sends their wedding week off the rails.

synopsis: ★ 榮獲第62屆金馬獎最佳女配角獎 長年在台灣工作的阿耀返鄉，與弟妹一同處理父親的喪事，卻在葬禮過程中遭遇宗教局介入，企圖帶走父親遺體。面對突如其來的衝突，三兄妹各自展現截然不同的態度：哥哥阿耀選擇退讓、弟弟阿財正面衝撞、妹妹水雲則勉力維持儀式與秩序。隨著喪事推進，塵封的家族往事逐漸浮現——關於走私、遷徙、疾病，以及始終無法取得的身分證。在記憶與現實交錯之中，三人被迫重新理解父親，也重新審視自己在這片土地上的位置……。
tmdb_overview: 在台灣工作的阿耀回到馬來西亞，與弟妹一起為父親舉辦喪禮，卻遇到宗教局人員突然來訪，帶走了父親的遺體。原來父親生前偷偷加入了回教，因此必須葬在回教墓園。不服氣的兄弟倆因而展開搶回遺體的旅程。過程中，阿耀回憶起小時候父親教他如何在這對華人不公平的社會狡猾求存，而妹妹水雲也發現了父親入回教的真正原因。

synopsis: ★ 香港影史動畫票房冠軍！超越《麥兜故事》《小倩》，口碑與市場雙爆發 ★ 榮獲第62屆金馬獎「最佳動畫片」大獎肯定，並入圍「最佳原創電影音樂」、「最佳改編劇本」，創香港動畫片里程碑 ★ 改編自直木獎得主西條奈加催淚之作《千年鬼》，歷時七年匠心打造 ★ 國際影展大放異彩！入選被譽為「動畫界奧斯卡」的法國安錫國際動畫影展，並獲選蘇黎世、錫切斯、平遙、香港亞洲電影節等重量級影展，口碑持續發酵 ★ 豪華實力派配音卡司集結！金馬影后鍾雪瑩、柯煒林、張繼聰、謝安琪等金獎級演員跨界聲演，為角色注入細膩動人的情感層次

movie_title: 超級瑪利歐銀河電影版

synopsis: 霸居排行榜100週暢銷小說〈送書人〉改編 溫暖人心！口碑橫掃德國電影票房2億台幣 個性執著的送書人卡爾，生活就像鐘錶一樣地精準。每天，他踩著相同的步伐，將一本本包裝好的書，親手送到忠實顧客的家門口。他了解鎮上每個顧客的喜好，並以能為他們挑選到最合適的書而感到自豪。有天，卡爾井然有序的生活卻突然遭人闖入。9歲的莎莎剛從失去母親的悲傷走出來，決定加入卡爾的送書人小組。她不僅從送書和閱讀中找到慰藉，獨特的人生觀也幫卡爾敞開了心扉，一段意想不到的友誼就此展開。一場突如其來的變故，讓卡爾失去了工作。原本熱鬧、充滿書香的小鎮也逐漸走向沉寂。就在顧客逐漸散落之際，莎莎決定靠自己最相信的力量：好書的魔力，能讓人們再次團聚一起。她與卡爾攜手合作，不僅為讀者們，也為他們自己，帶來了意義深遠的正面改變。
tmdb_overview: 每天，卡爾都細心地將書籍包裝好，親自送到鎮上熟客手中。他了解每個顧客的喜好，並以能為他們挑選到最合適的書而感到自豪。有天，卡爾井然有序的生活突然遭人闖入。九歲的莎莎剛從失去母親的悲傷走出來，決定加入卡爾的送書隊伍。她不僅從送書和閱讀中找到了慰藉，莎莎獨特的人生觀也幫卡爾敞開了心扉，一段意想不到的友誼就此展開。
tmdb_overview_en: Carl’s life runs like clockwork: every day, he goes door-to-door delivering books to a handful of loyal customers. He knows their preferences and takes pride in selecting the perfect story for each of them. But his well-ordered life is turned upside down by a cheerful nine-year-old girl, Schascha, who decides to join him on his daily book round. Schascha’s unique outlook on life helps Carl to come out of his shell and realise that his customers are so much more than just that to him. But when Carl unexpectedly loses his job, this vibrant community starts to fall apart - and it will take the power of books and all Schascha’s determination to bring them back together again.

director: 克里斯汀佩佐 Christian Petzold
synopsis: 2025法國電影筆記年度十大佳片 《過境情謎》、《水漾的女人》、《野火蔓延時》德國名導克里斯汀佩佐四度攜手柏林影后寶拉貝爾最新力作 鋼琴系學生蘿拉（寶拉貝爾 飾）在一次週末出遊途中，她意外捲入車禍，雖然毫髮無傷但男友卻重傷過世，內心則被巨大的驚嚇與空虛籠罩。在德國鄉間遇見一名目睹事故的婦人，對方因蘿拉神似早逝的女兒，而溫柔地收留她進入宛如世外桃源的家庭。這個看似溫暖的避風港，實則充滿難以言明的替代與投射，婦人試圖將失去女兒的空缺，填補在蘿拉身上，而蘿拉也在被關懷與被期待之間，逐漸感到窒息......。德國電影大師克里斯汀佩佐以新作《鏡之第三樂章》再次以冷靜而詩意的筆觸，勾勒出一段關於創傷、投射與「被需要」的危險關係。影片於 2025 年坎城影展導演雙週單元世界首映獲得極高評價，延續導演一貫的極簡風格與心理懸疑氣息。以近乎懸疑片的節奏，讓觀眾意識到這個神秘家庭並非單純的善意關懷，而是一場關於情感佔有與身份投射的暗流。 On a weekend trip to the countryside, Laura, a piano student from Berlin, miraculously survives a car crash. Physically unhurt but deeply shaken, she is taken in by a local woman who witnessed the accident and now cares for Laura with motherly devotion. When her husband and adult son also give up their initial resistance to Laura's presence, the four of them slowly build up some family-like routine and spend some days of happiness together. But soon they can no longer ignore their past, and Laura has to come to terms with her own life.
synopsis_en: ★ A Cahiers du Cinéma Top 10 Film of 2025. While on a weekend getaway, piano student Laura is involved in a car accident. Though she emerges physically unscathed, her boyfriend is killed, leaving her consumed by shock and a profound sense of emptiness. In the German countryside, she encounters a woman who witnessed the crash. Struck by Laura’s resemblance to her own late daughter, the woman kindly takes her into her idyllic family home. However, this seemingly warm sanctuary is fraught with unspoken projections and substitutions. As the woman attempts to fill the void of her loss with Laura, the young student begins to feel suffocated by the weight of the care and expectations thrust upon her.

movie_title_en: Ready or Not 2: Here I Come

movie_title: 超級瑪利歐銀河電影版

tmdb_overview: 犯罪集團分子拓矢、阿護與梶谷遊走東京，誆騙孑然一身的男子出售身分。有人萬念俱灰、有人力求翻身，販賣人生成了一筆筆絕佳生意。隨著組織指派的任務越加泯滅人性，拓矢決心脫離、邁向新生活之際，卻慘遭上司背叛追緝。阿護倖免於難卻始終心繫拓矢，梶谷因任務陷入道德困局。三人亡命天涯，不堪的過往如影隨形，縱有贖罪抵抗的勇氣，重獲新生又談何容易？
tmdb_overview_en: To get by, Takuya and Mamoru pose as women in an online scheme, but when they try to leave this life, they must rely on their dangerous mentor for help.

synopsis:
曾走過江湖的她們，現在要向深愛的人   用最閃耀的歌聲，唱出最難忘的表白
一群因命運錯誤的安排而被關入監獄的女性  她們在相處中彼此扶持，重新看見生命的希望
synopsis_en: Once women of the underworld, they now use their most brilliant voices to sing an unforgettable confession to the ones they love. Imprisoned by a cruel twist of fate, these women find strength in one another, supporting each other as they rediscover hope for the future.

movie_title: 超級瑪利歐銀河電影版

synopsis: 癸酉靖難撼動整個朝鮮，年幼的君王李弘暐（朴志訓 飾）被迫讓位，還遭流放。另一方面，江原道寧越的深山村落廣川谷的村長嚴興道（柳海真 飾）為了生活艱困的村民們，努力將清泠浦變成流放地。然而，就在村長的滿心期盼下，終於迎來了被迫退位的李弘暐。負責監視李弘暐日常生活的村長，竟開始愈來愈在意失去求生意志的李弘暐……1457年的清泠浦，一場注定失敗的守護，一段永被銘記的情誼。
synopsis_en: The Gyeoyu Jeongnan coup shakes the foundations of Joseon, forcing the young King Yi Hong-wi (Park Ji-hoon) to abdicate and face exile. Meanwhile, in the remote mountain village of Gwangcheongok in Yeongwol, Gangwon Province, village head Eom Heung-do (Yoo Hae-jin) strives to have Cheongnyeongpo designated as an exile site to support his struggling villagers. Amidst the village head’s great expectations, the deposed Yi Hong-wi finally arrives. Tasked with monitoring the former king's daily life, Eom finds himself increasingly drawn to the young man, who has lost all will to live. In 1457 at Cheongnyeongpo, a doomed effort to protect him begins—a bond that will be remembered forever.

movie_title: 機動戰士鋼彈 閃光的哈薩威 喀耳刻的魔女
synopsis:
U.C.0105，夏亞叛亂的12年後——面對實施高壓統治的地球聯邦政府，「馬法提」展開暗殺高官的方式進行抵抗。其領袖的真實身分，正是曾與阿姆羅·雷在一年戰爭中並肩作戰的布萊特之子，哈薩威・諾亞。
哈薩威因神秘少女琪琪・安達露西亞展現出的奇異力量而喚起了過去的創傷記憶。在她的言語影響下，他一邊動搖，一邊準備馬法提的行動——襲擊阿得雷德會議。
synopsis_en:
U.C. 0105. Twelve years after Char’s Rebellion, the anti-Federation organization "Mafty" resists the Earth Federation Government’s oppressive rule through a campaign of assassinations targeting high-ranking officials. Its leader is none other than Hathaway Noa, the son of Bright Noa, who once fought alongside Amuro Ray during the One Year War. 

Hathaway finds his past traumas resurfacing after witnessing the mysterious power of a young woman named Gigi Andalucia. Influenced by her words and grappling with inner conflict, he prepares for Mafty’s next major operation: an assault on the high-level meeting in Adelaide.

synopsis: 薩克過世後村莊歸於平靜，直到喬伊奶奶被閃電擊中後身亡，卻又莫名其妙復活了，這並非奇蹟，而是某種存在被喚醒的開端。剛失去摯愛的圖普相信喬伊奶奶的復活隱藏著通往另一個世界的祕密，即便代價是要付出一切。
synopsis_en: Peace returned to the village after Sak’s passing, until Grandma Joy was struck by lightning and killed—only to mysteriously resurrect. This was no miracle, but rather the beginning of an awakening. Thup, who has just lost a loved one, believes Grandma Joy’s return holds the secret to the world beyond, and he is willing to pay any price to uncover it.

synopsis: 世紀劫案震撼全城！天才盜匪「影子集團」劫走數億資產，卻憑借超強反偵察能力全身而退，戲耍警方「天眼」系統。一籌莫展之際，澳門司警局請回隱退多年的跟蹤專家黃德忠（成龍 飾），他培養年輕司警何秋果（張子楓 飾）等人，重組「神秘跟蹤隊」，最終鎖定了盜匪團的幕後狼王——傅隆生（梁家輝 飾）。當警方布下天羅地網，影子集團也派出天才駭客（此沙 飾）和行動首領（文俊輝 飾）設下完美局中局...
synopsis_en:
A heist of the century has shocked the city! The "Shadow Group," a gang of genius thieves, has made off with hundreds of millions in assets. Utilizing elite counter-surveillance skills, they managed to escape unscathed, making a mockery of the police's "Sky Eye" surveillance system. 

With the investigation at a standstill, the Macau Judiciary Police recall retired surveillance expert Huang Dezhong (Jackie Chan). Huang mentors young officer He Qiuguo (Zhang Zifeng) and others to reform the "Secret Surveillance Unit," eventually narrowing their sights on the mastermind behind the gang—the "Wolf King," Fu Longsheng (Tony Leung Ka-fai). But as the police lay an inescapable dragnet, the Shadow Group deploys a genius hacker (Ci Sha) and their tactical leader (Wen Junhui) to set a perfect trap within a trap...

synopsis: 查理在咖啡廳邂逅艾瑪，一場笨拙的搭話開啟了兩年的甜蜜愛戀。正當兩人深信彼此是唯一、著手籌備婚禮時，一場好友聚會卻掀起波瀾。在「分享最糟糕往事」的遊戲中，艾瑪意外坦白一段不為人知的震撼過去。這份秘密讓全場難以置信，也讓查理開始重新審視這份關係。在步入禮堂的最後關頭，兩人的愛情正經受誠信與信任的嚴峻考驗。
synopsis_en: Charlie met Emma at a cafe, where a clumsy icebreaker sparked a two-year romance. Just as the two were convinced they had found "the one" and began planning their wedding, a gathering with friends turned their world upside down. During a game of "sharing your worst past," Emma unexpectedly confesses a shocking secret from her history. The revelation leaves everyone in disbelief and forces Charlie to re-examine their entire relationship. On the verge of walking down the aisle, their love faces a grueling test of honesty and trust.

movie_title_en: Ready or Not 2: Here I Come

synopsis: 出生自帶詛咒的潘娜（丘普朗阿瑞昆 飾）順利考取大學，原以為能埋葬過去、重啟新生。怎知她和好友小敏（萍瑪達柴莎索恩 飾）竟在新生活動後，慘遭六名學長姐殘酷霸凌。在導師制止後，對方反而變本加厲，私下求助降頭師施以致命巫術，卻意外喚醒潛藏在潘娜體內的「三眼神」邪力。獵人與獵物身份瞬間反轉。覺醒後的潘娜，信手捻來皆是索命降術，以牙還牙展開血色清算。一場終極獵殺就此引爆，誰也別想活著離開這場血色祭典！
synopsis_en: Born with a curse, Panna (Cherprang Areekul) successfully enrolls in university, hoping to bury her past and start anew. Little does she know that after a freshman orientation event, she and her close friend Min (Pimmada Chaisorn) will fall victim to brutal bullying at the hands of six seniors. When a faculty member intervenes, the seniors only escalate their cruelty, seeking out a sorcerer to cast a lethal curse. However, their actions inadvertently awaken the malevolent power of the "Three-Eyed God" dormant within Panna. In an instant, the roles of hunter and prey are reversed. Now awakened, Panna wields deadly curses with ease, launching a bloody reckoning to pay them back in kind. An ultimate hunt is ignited—and no one is getting out of this crimson ritual alive!

synopsis: 馬來西亞地產商宋龍辰以泰國降頭術奪取土地經營權，致多人喪命。泰國記者Fon懷疑其中有異，展開調查。四名年輕自媒體人前往泰國拍攝民俗，返國後接連遭遇怪事甚至喪生，Fon推測他們受降頭迫害，遂尋求高僧白師傅協助。宋龍辰繼續借黑巫師擴張勢力，與白師傅展開黑白降頭之戰。
synopsis_en: Malaysian real estate mogul Song Longchen uses Thai black magic to seize land development rights, leaving a trail of bodies in his wake. Suspecting foul play, Thai journalist Fon launches an investigation. Meanwhile, four young content creators travel to Thailand to document local folklore, only to be plagued by terrifying supernatural occurrences and mysterious deaths upon their return. Fon deduces they have fallen victim to a curse and seeks the aid of the venerable Master Bai. As Song continues to expand his empire through a dark sorcerer, a climactic battle between black and white magic erupts.

movie_title: 超級瑪利歐銀河電影版
劇場版「暗殺教室」：我們的時光
movie_title_en: Assassination Classroom the Movie: Our Time

movie_title: 秒速5公分 導演特別映像版
超級瑪利歐銀河電影版

movie_title: 超級瑪利歐銀河電影版
synopsis: 【超級瑪利歐銀河電影版】是一部根據超級瑪利歐兄弟世界改編的動畫電影，故事延續【超級瑪利歐兄弟電影版】，該片於2023年締造全球13億美元的驚人票房紀錄。【超級瑪利歐銀河電影版】由再度回歸的導演亞倫霍瓦特以及麥可傑勒尼克執導，馬修福格也再度回擔任編劇，配樂師布萊恩泰勒也再度回歸編寫電影配樂。
synopsis_en: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie is an animated film based on the world of the Super Mario Bros. The story continues from The Super Mario Bros. Movie, which set a staggering global box office record of $1.3 billion in 2023. The Super Mario Galaxy Movie is directed by the returning duo Aaron Horvath and Michael Jelenic, with Matthew Fogel once again serving as screenwriter and composer Brian Tyler returning to craft the film's score.

synopsis: 意想不到的人選，一場不可能完成的任務。
synopsis_en: An unexpected choice, an impossible mission.

synopsis: 改編自暢銷小說《哈姆奈特》 奧斯卡金像獎得主編劇兼導演趙婷全新力作，【哈姆奈特】講述了一段關於愛與失去的動人故事，而這段經歷啟發了莎士比亞創作出不朽經典名劇《哈姆雷特》。 電影預告 其他熱映 now showing
synopsis_en:
★ Based on the true story of a guide dog's life! Relive the heartwarming animal cinema classic that moved millions.
★ A rare exploration of the guide dog theme, using a delicate narrative to sincerely portray the profound bond between humans and dogs.
★ A nuanced portrayal of the challenges faced by the visually impaired, witnessing the emotional journey from initial resistance to ultimate trust.

Five adorable Labrador puppies are born into a Tokyo household. One stands out from the rest, marked by a unique cross-shaped black birthmark on its belly. Since the puppies' father was a guide dog, their owner harbors a long-held hope that one of them will follow in his footsteps and become an exceptional guide dog. Because the mother was not a guide dog, the owner’s requests are repeatedly rejected. Undeterred, her persistence finally pays off when a trainer from a guide dog school reluctantly agrees to take one of the puppies for a trial. The puppy with the birthmark is the one chosen, marking the very first separation of its life.

Movie Trailer

movie_title_en: Ready or Not: Here I Come
synopsis: 在變態富豪拉多馬斯家族的殺人躲貓貓遊戲中倖存後，新娘葛蕾絲（薩瑪拉威明 飾）本以為一切都在遊戲結束後，殺戮就隨之終止，沒想到發現自己卻進入了這場噩夢遊戲的下一階段！而這次，她疏遠已久的妹妹費絲（凱瑟琳紐頓 飾）也被牽扯進來。葛蕾絲只有一次機會能存活、保護她的妹妹，並奪下掌控世界的議會「至高之座」。同時面對四個為了王座而追殺她的敵對家族，而最終勝出者將能掌控一切。
synopsis_en: After surviving the sadistic Le Domas family’s lethal game of hide-and-seek, bride Grace (Samara Weaving) believed the bloodshed had finally ended. Instead, she finds herself thrust into the next stage of the nightmare. This time, her long-estranged sister, Faith (Kathryn Newton), is caught in the crossfire. Grace has one shot to survive, protect her sister, and seize "The High Seat"—the council that rules the world. Hunted by four rival families vying for the throne, only one will emerge to claim ultimate power.

movie_title_en: Ready or Not 2: Here I Come
