tmdb_overview_en: Former assassin Daiya has long left the criminal world, but he decides to take up a mission to kill a rival gang boss for a huge payday. The catch: To kill his target at a talent show, he must go undercover and perform in a pop dance group.

movie_title: 超級瑪利歐銀河電影版

tmdb_overview: 透過一年的實地拍攝，展現烏克蘭師生在戰火下堅持教育的日常。此紀錄片在無訪談、無旁白、無重演的情況下，描繪烏克蘭距離戰火邊緣的師生，他們在於實體與線上教室間生活的脆弱與堅毅。
tmdb_overview_en: Despite the war, school life continues in Ukraine, with pupils and teachers striving to continue learning even under constant threat. The film is a mosaic of the everyday lives of teachers and students from different corners of Ukraine.

movie_title_en: Ready or Not 2: Here I Come

movie_title: 超級瑪利歐銀河電影版

synopsis: 金獎導演內田英治再出擊，結合殺手動作與舞蹈表演全新類之作 一群年齡、性格迥異的職業殺手，接下一單高額賞金的任務。他們的目標是幹掉黑道老大本條平藏，唯一能接觸他的方式，竟然是贏得舞蹈比賽！沒有經驗、沒有默契、也沒有幹勁，一支臨時拼湊的隊伍，竟要挑戰認真的舞蹈比賽？因為「過去曾有舞蹈經驗」臨時成軍的奇葩隊伍，包括：現任孤兒院輔導員、實則為傳說級的前殺手「戴亞」；此次任務的召集人、風間組的二當家「熊城」；討厭群體行動的冷酷殺手「桐生」；性格火爆卻富有義氣的殺手「阿新」；落魄的前黑道大叔「村雨」。原本水火不容的殺手們逐漸被舞蹈的魅力吸引，不知不覺中成了名副其實的「舞林殺手」，一路過關斬將，朝冠軍之路晉級？！
tmdb_overview: 一群年齡、性格迥異的職業殺手，接下一單高額賞金的任務，目標是幹掉黑道老大本條平藏，而唯一能接觸他的方式，竟然是贏得舞蹈比賽！沒有經驗、沒有默契、也沒有幹勁，一支臨時拼湊的隊伍，竟要挑戰認真的舞蹈比賽？
tmdb_overview_en: Former assassin Daiya has long left the criminal world, but he decides to take up a mission to kill a rival gang boss for a huge payday. The catch: To kill his target at a talent show, he must go undercover and perform in a pop dance group.

tmdb_overview: 每天，卡爾都細心地將書籍包裝好，親自送到鎮上熟客手中。他了解每個顧客的喜好，並以能為他們挑選到最合適的書而感到自豪。有天，卡爾井然有序的生活突然遭人闖入。九歲的莎莎剛從失去母親的悲傷走出來，決定加入卡爾的送書隊伍。她不僅從送書和閱讀中找到了慰藉，莎莎獨特的人生觀也幫卡爾敞開了心扉，一段意想不到的友誼就此展開。
tmdb_overview_en: Carl’s life runs like clockwork: every day, he goes door-to-door delivering books to a handful of loyal customers. He knows their preferences and takes pride in selecting the perfect story for each of them. But his well-ordered life is turned upside down by a cheerful nine-year-old girl, Schascha, who decides to join him on his daily book round. Schascha’s unique outlook on life helps Carl to come out of his shell and realise that his customers are so much more than just that to him. But when Carl unexpectedly loses his job, this vibrant community starts to fall apart - and it will take the power of books and all Schascha’s determination to bring them back together again.

tmdb_overview: 17歲的欣住在去哪都不超過30分鐘的澳門，她生活平凡，直到遇見學姐菲，才開始思考是否可以過更多彩的生活。22歲時，她在臺灣念新聞系，與女友晴同居，但畢業季讓她陷入困境，無法決定未來。34歲的欣在香港打拼，試圖擺脫一片導演的魔咒，但面對適婚女友貝的壓力，最終在假結婚狂想中領悟到做自己是最佳的生存之道。
tmdb_overview_en: At 17, Xin lived a simple life in Macau. She enjoyed exploring the “world” with her DV camera, understanding the value of ordinary life. However, everything changed when she met her senior schoolmate Fei, who brought a new rhythm to Xin’s life. At 22, Xin embraced a free life in Taiwan, studying journalism and living with her girlfriend, Qing. Despite seeming ordinary, her life was also marked by graduation uncertainties. Xin wanted to stay in Taiwan but faced obstacles, and returning to Macau meant confronting her family. At 34, Xin lived a busy life shuttling between Hong Kong and Macau. Anxious to break free from the curse of being an assistant director, she felt pressured by her eligible actress girlfriend, Bei, to become independent. Facing external worries and internal conflicts, Xin finally realized that embracing her true self and being carefree might be the best way to survive.

synopsis: ★ 榮獲第62屆金馬獎最佳女配角獎 長年在台灣工作的阿耀返鄉，與弟妹一同處理父親的喪事，卻在葬禮過程中遭遇宗教局介入，企圖帶走父親遺體。面對突如其來的衝突，三兄妹各自展現截然不同的態度：哥哥阿耀選擇退讓、弟弟阿財正面衝撞、妹妹水雲則勉力維持儀式與秩序。隨著喪事推進，塵封的家族往事逐漸浮現——關於走私、遷徙、疾病，以及始終無法取得的身分證。在記憶與現實交錯之中，三人被迫重新理解父親，也重新審視自己在這片土地上的位置……。
tmdb_overview: 在台灣工作的阿耀回到馬來西亞，與弟妹一起為父親舉辦喪禮，卻遇到宗教局人員突然來訪，帶走了父親的遺體。原來父親生前偷偷加入了回教，因此必須葬在回教墓園。不服氣的兄弟倆因而展開搶回遺體的旅程。過程中，阿耀回憶起小時候父親教他如何在這對華人不公平的社會狡猾求存，而妹妹水雲也發現了父親入回教的真正原因。
tmdb_overview_en: When Ah Yao returns to Malaysia for his father’s funeral, he expects grief, not chaos. But everything turns upside down when the religious police storm in, claiming his father—who secretly converted to Islam—must be buried in an Islamic cemetery. Refusing to let go, Ah Yao and his siblings set out on a wild, darkly comedic journey to reclaim the body, confronting cultural clashes, family secrets, and absurd obstacles along the way.

movie_title: 超級瑪利歐銀河電影版

synopsis: 薩克過世後村莊歸於平靜，直到喬伊奶奶被閃電擊中後身亡，卻又莫名其妙復活了，這並非奇蹟，而是某種存在被喚醒的開端。剛失去摯愛的圖普相信喬伊奶奶的復活隱藏著通往另一個世界的祕密，即便代價是要付出一切。
synopsis_en: Peace returned to the village after Sak’s passing, until Grandma Joy was struck by lightning and killed—only to mysteriously resurrect. This was no miracle, but rather the beginning of an awakening. Thup, who has just lost a loved one, believes Grandma Joy’s return holds the secret to the world beyond, and he is willing to pay any price to uncover it.

synopsis: 世紀劫案震撼全城！天才盜匪「影子集團」劫走數億資產，卻憑借超強反偵察能力全身而退，戲耍警方「天眼」系統。一籌莫展之際，澳門司警局請回隱退多年的跟蹤專家黃德忠（成龍 飾），他培養年輕司警何秋果（張子楓 飾）等人，重組「神秘跟蹤隊」，最終鎖定了盜匪團的幕後狼王——傅隆生（梁家輝 飾）。當警方布下天羅地網，影子集團也派出天才駭客（此沙 飾）和行動首領（文俊輝 飾）設下完美局中局...
synopsis_en:
A heist of the century has shocked the city! The "Shadow Group," a gang of genius thieves, has made off with hundreds of millions in assets. Utilizing elite counter-surveillance skills, they managed to escape unscathed, making a mockery of the police's "Sky Eye" surveillance system. 

With the investigation at a standstill, the Macau Judiciary Police recall retired surveillance expert Huang Dezhong (Jackie Chan). Huang mentors young officer He Qiuguo (Zhang Zifeng) and others to reform the "Secret Surveillance Unit," eventually narrowing their sights on the mastermind behind the gang—the "Wolf King," Fu Longsheng (Tony Leung Ka-fai). But as the police lay an inescapable dragnet, the Shadow Group deploys a genius hacker (Ci Sha) and their tactical leader (Wen Junhui) to set a perfect trap within a trap...

synopsis: 查理在咖啡廳邂逅艾瑪，一場笨拙的搭話開啟了兩年的甜蜜愛戀。正當兩人深信彼此是唯一、著手籌備婚禮時，一場好友聚會卻掀起波瀾。在「分享最糟糕往事」的遊戲中，艾瑪意外坦白一段不為人知的震撼過去。這份秘密讓全場難以置信，也讓查理開始重新審視這份關係。在步入禮堂的最後關頭，兩人的愛情正經受誠信與信任的嚴峻考驗。
synopsis_en: Charlie met Emma at a cafe, where a clumsy icebreaker sparked a two-year romance. Just as the two were convinced they had found "the one" and began planning their wedding, a gathering with friends turned their world upside down. During a game of "sharing your worst past," Emma unexpectedly confesses a shocking secret from her history. The revelation leaves everyone in disbelief and forces Charlie to re-examine their entire relationship. On the verge of walking down the aisle, their love faces a grueling test of honesty and trust.

movie_title_en: Ready or Not 2: Here I Come

synopsis: 出生自帶詛咒的潘娜（丘普朗阿瑞昆 飾）順利考取大學，原以為能埋葬過去、重啟新生。怎知她和好友小敏（萍瑪達柴莎索恩 飾）竟在新生活動後，慘遭六名學長姐殘酷霸凌。在導師制止後，對方反而變本加厲，私下求助降頭師施以致命巫術，卻意外喚醒潛藏在潘娜體內的「三眼神」邪力。獵人與獵物身份瞬間反轉。覺醒後的潘娜，信手捻來皆是索命降術，以牙還牙展開血色清算。一場終極獵殺就此引爆，誰也別想活著離開這場血色祭典！
synopsis_en: Born with a curse, Panna (Cherprang Areekul) successfully enrolls in university, hoping to bury her past and start anew. Little does she know that after a freshman orientation event, she and her close friend Min (Pimmada Chaisorn) will fall victim to brutal bullying at the hands of six seniors. When a faculty member intervenes, the seniors only escalate their cruelty, seeking out a sorcerer to cast a lethal curse. However, their actions inadvertently awaken the malevolent power of the "Three-Eyed God" dormant within Panna. In an instant, the roles of hunter and prey are reversed. Now awakened, Panna wields deadly curses with ease, launching a bloody reckoning to pay them back in kind. An ultimate hunt is ignited—and no one is getting out of this crimson ritual alive!

synopsis: 馬來西亞地產商宋龍辰以泰國降頭術奪取土地經營權，致多人喪命。泰國記者Fon懷疑其中有異，展開調查。四名年輕自媒體人前往泰國拍攝民俗，返國後接連遭遇怪事甚至喪生，Fon推測他們受降頭迫害，遂尋求高僧白師傅協助。宋龍辰繼續借黑巫師擴張勢力，與白師傅展開黑白降頭之戰。
synopsis_en: Malaysian real estate mogul Song Longchen uses Thai black magic to seize land development rights, leaving a trail of bodies in his wake. Suspecting foul play, Thai journalist Fon launches an investigation. Meanwhile, four young content creators travel to Thailand to document local folklore, only to be plagued by terrifying supernatural occurrences and mysterious deaths upon their return. Fon deduces they have fallen victim to a curse and seeks the aid of the venerable Master Bai. As Song continues to expand his empire through a dark sorcerer, a climactic battle between black and white magic erupts.

synopsis: ★2011 SCHLiNGEL兒少影展最佳國際劇情片、最佳歐洲兒童電影 ★2011 荷蘭電影節最佳製作設計 ★2011 林布蘭獎最佳荷蘭電影、最佳荷蘭女演員提名 卓姆是非常活潑開朗的孩子，他很誠實，只不過有點胖，他跟家人搬到瘦子鎮之後，原本快樂的生活全都走樣了，他父親在當地開了一間餐廳，但是在瘦子鎮，大家都很不愛出門，而且沒有胖子。卓姆在愛上全鎮最瘦的麗芙後，想盡辦法要討她的歡心，他要讓這裡的人看見他的內心真正的美。 https://reurl.cc/npoxq8
tmdb_overview: 卓姆是非常活潑開朗的孩子，他很誠實，只不過有點胖，他跟家人搬到瘦子鎮之後，原本快樂的生活全都走樣了，他父親在當地開了一間餐廳，但是在瘦子鎮，大家都很不愛出門，而且沒有胖子。卓姆在愛上全鎮最瘦的麗芙後，想盡辦法要討她的歡心，他要讓這裡的人看見他的內心真正的美。
tmdb_overview_en: Fat adolescent Dik Trom enjoys growing up in a hedonistic town devoted to food and fun. When a restaurant chain offers his father the life-long-dreamed opportunity to run his own, the Trom family moves. Their new home town Dunhoven is however inhabited by health freaks who prefer only fitness to dietary sobriety.

country: 澳大利亞、比利時、英國、美國、荷蘭、俄羅斯
synopsis: ★ 全球票房1億3千萬臺幣 ★ 2021 澳洲導演協會獎最佳動畫導演提名 ★改編自童書作家潔恩萊昂斯作品 福來弟魯賓即將繼位成為狼人家族的領袖，他也相信自己有如父親福霸一般，會成為史上最威猛的狼人......然而，在福來弟14歲生日第一次變身時，他居然變成一隻名副其實的......貴賓犬？！在明天日出之前，他需要證明自己夠格當狼人，否則他就會因資格不符永遠遭到家族放逐。鼓起勇氣踏上探險之路的福來弟，在夜晚大城市的街道失去了方向，一隻流浪狗大姊大貝貝陰錯陽差幫助了他，卻同時被捕狗隊抓住，他必須在今晚克服超萌的外表，逃出捕狗隊的牢籠，還有人類瘋哥一直來攪局，讓他證明自己是100%狼人之路更顯困難重重。 https://reurl.cc/2ar7N9
synopsis_en:
★ Global Box Office: 130 Million TWD ★ 2021 Australian Directors' Guild Award Nominee for Best Direction in an Animation ★ Based on the book by children's author Jayne Lyons.

Freddy Lupin is set to succeed as the leader of his werewolf pack. He is confident that, just like his father Flasheart, he will become the most fearsome werewolf in history. However, during his first transformation on his 14th birthday, things go hilariously wrong when he turns into a literal... poodle?!

Freddy has until sunrise tomorrow to prove he has the heart of a wolf, or he faces permanent exile from the family. Summoning his courage, he embarks on an adventure but quickly loses his way in the dark city streets. He crosses paths with a streetwise stray named Batty, who helps him out, only for them both to be captured by dog catchers. Now, Freddy must overcome his adorable exterior, escape the pound, and deal with the meddling of a human named Foxwell Cripp. His journey to prove he is 100% Wolf has never been more challenging.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
synopsis: 1962 電影旬報年度十大日本影片（第三名） Top 10 Japanese Films (3rd Place), Kinema Junpo 1963 坎城影展 評審團 特別獎 1963 日本電影藍絲帶獎最佳男主角、劇本 Best Actor & Best Screenplay, Blue Ribbon Award 寬永七年（1630年），德川幕府第三代將軍家光的中央集權統治，削弱大名武家勢力，曾威武風光的武士淪為浪人。彼時，許多浪人至大名家以切腹要脅、敲詐錢財，令人不堪其擾，其中包括名門井伊家。某日，老浪人津雲半四郎登門借地切腹，家臣決定將計就計，讓他自行了斷。但隨著老浪人娓娓道出此行始末，他的本意也逐漸揭露。 繼《人間的條件》後，仲代達矢與小林正樹再次合作。以瀧口康彥的小說《異聞浪人記》為本，橋本忍執筆 編劇 ，用倒敘法鋪陳懸疑氛圍。由擅長大場面的宮島義勇再次掌鏡，刻畫悲憤而殘酷的復仇。在推崇武士道的國家與時代，本片卻反其道而行大膽批判，仲代達矢曾多次表示欣賞此精神，並將 本片 列為最愛之作。
tags: 坎城影展評審團特別獎
無名．仲代達矢紀念特集
screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-大影格
tmdb_overview: 影片根據瀧口康彥的小說《異聞浪人記》改編，圍繞展現武士道精神的終極形式——切腹展開了一個別開生面的故事。影片根據瀧口康彥的小說《異聞浪人記》改編，圍繞展現武士道精神的終極形式——切腹展開了一個別開生面的故事。導演通過這個故事，對武士道精神做了一番討論，批判了所謂武士的體面這種虛假可憎的東西，謳歌了貧困武士堅守尊嚴的精神，同時對他們的不幸生活遭遇表示出深切的同情，揭露出封建社會的黑暗和不公。這是一部構思巧妙、製作精良、發人深省的傑作。本片在戛納電影界上獲得了讚譽，在日本國內贏得了每日電影評選的最佳影片獎，出演半四郎的仲代達矢憑借此片獲得了數座最佳男主演獎獎盃。
tmdb_overview_en: Down-on-his-luck veteran Tsugumo Hanshirō enters the courtyard of the prosperous House of Iyi. Unemployed, and with no family, he hopes to find a place to commit seppuku—and a worthy second to deliver the coup de grâce in his suicide ritual. The senior counselor for the Iyi clan questions the ronin’s resolve and integrity, suspecting Hanshirō of seeking charity rather than an honorable end. What follows is a pair of interlocking stories which lay bare the difference between honor and respect, and promises to examine the legendary foundations of the Samurai code.

synopsis: 改編自文學家駱以軍的作品《小兒子》，有糊里糊塗的爸爸 、嫻熟優雅的媽媽、害羞而正經的大兒子、機靈萬分卻常脫線演出的小兒子，以及陪伴這個家庭成長的小黃狗端端。他們的生活有時爆笑、有時溫馨、有時衝突，但總讓人會心一笑。 家庭不就是這樣？儘管有時跌跌撞撞，卻總盡力彼此療癒，共同成長。
synopsis_en: Adapted from the work *My Little Boys* by author Luo Yi-chun, the story features a muddle-headed father, an elegant and graceful mother, a shy and serious older son, and a clever yet quirky younger son, along with their loyal yellow dog, Duan Duan. Their lives are sometimes hilarious, sometimes heartwarming, and occasionally full of conflict, but they always bring a knowing smile to your face. Isn’t that exactly what family is? Despite the occasional stumbles, they always do their best to heal one another and grow together.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
movie_title_en: Nakadai Tatsuya: to Live for Acting
synopsis: 1975年，仲代達矢與其重要創作夥伴 兼 妻子宮崎恭子，共同創立演員養成所「無名塾」。仲代親自參與新人選拔和集訓，早六晚八嚴格訓練；對戲時，他收斂自身存在，惟留下角色與對手衝撞。無名塾不只指導演員，更培育能立身於世的「人」，50年來人才輩出。但褪下老師身分與角色外衣，仲代的真實面貌，一直是用毛筆謄寫台詞，並貼在寢室牆上反覆背誦的樸實演員。 導演 稻 塚秀孝歷時一年多貼身跟拍，聚焦無名塾的訓練過程及劇場公演，穿插仲代和弟子的訪談，記錄他鮮為人知的一面。拍攝時，仲代已年屆80，仍毅然佇立於心愛的舞台，與日漸衰退的記性和體力抗衡。 他 始終懷抱身為無名小卒時的初心，貫徹此生志向──為演員而活，並將這份信念傳承給下個世代。
tags: 無名．仲代達矢紀念特集
screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-大影格
tmdb_title: Nakadai Tatsuya: to Live for Acting
tmdb_title_en: Nakadai Tatsuya: to Live for Acting
tmdb_original_title: 仲代達矢　「役者」を生きる
tmdb_overview: 1975年，仲代達矢與其重要創作夥伴兼妻子宮崎恭子，共同創立演員養成所「無名塾」。仲代親自參與新人選拔和集訓，早六晚八嚴格訓練；對戲時，他收斂自身存在，惟留下角色與對手衝撞。無名塾不只指導演員，更培育能立身於世的「人」，50年來人才輩出。但褪下老師身分與角色外衣，仲代的真實面貌，一直是用毛筆謄寫台詞，並貼在寢室牆上反覆背誦的樸實演員。
tmdb_overview_en: Founded in 1975 by Nakadai Tatsuya and his late wife Miyazaki Yasuko, the actor training school Mumeijuku has shaped generations of performers. Nakadai personally leads rigorous training, instilling discipline and humanity. Filmed over a year, this documentary follows the octogenarian actor as he continues to stand on stage, living for his craft and passing his unwavering devotion to the next generation.

synopsis: 無名青年在傾頹的城市漫遊，在一場場與不同階級、身分的陌生男人的性愛中探索。盜用上個男人的隻言片語，重構自我印記。邂逅波斯詩人、擁抱泰國移民、親吻黑人演員，在一場場私密的事後對話中困惑、掙扎、重生。
tmdb_overview: 俊美少年沉浸在交友軟體與一段段性冒險中，在每次短暫接觸中盜用對方話語、性格與職業背景，並在下一場約會重塑自己的身分。眾生相浮華流轉，唯有內心的渴望猶存。
tmdb_overview_en: A gay man impersonates men he has had sex with and brings this new persona with him to his next hook-up. Only by pretending to be someone else can he be truly himself.

movie_title: 生命之詩：4K數位修復版－早安！周日經典電影院

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
synopsis: 1981 日本藍絲帶獎最佳男主角、男配角 Best Actor & Supporting Actor, Blue Ribbon Awards 1981 電影旬報讀者票選獎 Readers' Choice Award, Kinema Junpo 1981 日本電影學院獎最佳男主角、攝影、燈光獲獎；最佳影片、導演、劇本、女配角、美術設計、配樂、音效提名 Winners of Best Supporting Actor, Cinematography 明治維新讓日本躋身一流強國，擴張野心劍指中國東北與朝鮮，因此 觸怒 歐洲傳統強權俄羅斯帝國，戰火一觸即發。為了掌握旅順港的控制權，俄軍在鄰近的「二百三高地」修築了號稱戰爭史上最堅固的要塞，準備給日軍迎頭痛擊；誓死效忠天皇的陸軍大將乃木希典，則率領裝備精良的第三軍團，不惜一切奪取戰略要地。 有別於同年的《影武者》，仲代達矢在本片 詮釋日俄戰爭名將 乃木希典，收放自如的情緒堆疊，令無數觀眾動容落淚。東映耗費鉅資打造華麗布景，延請以戰爭電影聞名的舛田利雄執導，殘酷慘烈的血戰場面對比極致純粹的武士道精神，上映前後皆引發激烈熱議，掀起戰爭大片風潮。1972年日中建交後，台灣禁止進口日片，本片於1980年第一屆「金馬獎國際觀摩影展」中首度放映，此後便無上映機會。 that same year, Nakadai Tatsuya portrays the "War God" Nogi with restrained, commanding authority. His nuanced performance captures the crushing emotional toll of duty, a legendary portrayal that moved audiences to tears.
tags: 日本藍絲帶獎最佳男主角
無名．仲代達矢紀念特集
screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-大影格
tmdb_overview: 明治37年2月起到38年7月為止，約一年半的期間，日本與蘇俄之間，為了朝鮮與滿州的支配權紛爭而引發了戰爭(日俄戰爭)。而勝敗的關鍵在於乃木大將軍所率領的第七師團於"二零三高地"攻防一役。此一肉搏之戰造成日軍方面近一萬人的死傷，巨大的人員損傷下換來了日軍的勝利。本作品描寫一群在激烈戰區"二零三高地"上進行絕望性的戰鬥中的日本軍士們之間所產生的同袍之情，同時透過與"日俄戰爭"的此一史實有所關聯的人們的生活態度去了解，一個只能生產稻米及絹布，人口總數不過四千六百萬人的弱小民族日本，為何敢挑起與大國蘇俄作戰的原因，以及戰鬥的過程。利用壯闊的場景，使其重現世人眼前。至於演員方面，由仲代達矢擔綱演出乃木大將，老牌演員丹波哲郎飾演兒玉源太郎，三船敏郎飾演明治天皇，森繁久彌飾演伊藤博文。其他還有青輝彥、夏目雅子等豪華陣容共同演出。  導演方面由受到一致好評的舛田利雄執導。劇本由名作「絕仁絕義戰鬥」系列的笠原和夫執筆。本片是一部耗時3年歲月與15億日幣鉅資投入的感人超大巨作。與由佐田雅志所演唱的主題曲一起，被稱為現代日本的根源的明治的歷史鮮活的甦醒過來。
tmdb_overview_en: Depicts the bloody siege of the fortress of Port Arthur, one of the most strongly fortified positions in the world, during the Russo-Japanese War of (1904 - 1905). In the story dominated the character Lt Takeshi Kogyo (Teruhiko Aoi), teachers, and a reserve officer who became commander of the platoon and later company. At the same time monitors the conduct of the army commander general Nogi (Tatsuya Nakadai), which was commissioned of the emperor Matsuhito (Toshirô Mifune) to the conquest of the fort.

movie_title_en: Yiyi: A One and a Two
synopsis: 八歲的洋洋成長於台北的一個中產家庭，身為電腦公司總經理的父親面臨生意及婚姻的交叉口，母親敏敏面對一成不變、成日照顧家中病倒的母親的生活，決心尋求改變，就讀北一女的姊姊婷婷則是處於悸動的青春年華。洋洋喜歡拿著相機拍人的後腦勺，以他的視角來看大人們的世界，拍攝家人看不到的「背面」，城市中的人們看似接近，但都各自有著無可逃避、必須面對的苦惱，面對人生的提問，答案或許沒有這麼複雜，卻總是不完美。
synopsis_en: Eight-year-old Yang-Yang is growing up in a middle-class family in Taipei. His father, the general manager of a computer company, finds himself at a crossroads in both his business and his marriage. His mother, Min-Min, overwhelmed by the monotony of caring for her bedridden mother, decides to seek a change. Meanwhile, his older sister Ting-Ting, a student at Taipei First Girls' High School, is navigating the restless stirrings of youth. Yang-Yang enjoys taking photos of the backs of people's heads, observing the adult world through his own lens to capture the "hidden side" that his family cannot see. In the city, people appear close, yet each carries their own unavoidable struggles. When faced with life’s questions, the answers may not be complex, but they are never quite perfect.

movie_title: FINALFANTASYXIV 光之老爸 劇場版
movie_title_en: Brave Father Online: Our Story of Final Fantasy XIV
synopsis: ★改編自日本部落客Maidy真實故事 ★《最終幻想》遊戲系列首度進軍真人電影 退休的工作狂老爸，開始在線上遊戲組隊打怪，卻不知道神隊友竟然就是...... 即將升遷的工作狂老爸（吉田鋼太郎飾），某天卻突然辭職。家人大感傻眼之餘，也只能看著老爸終日對著電視機發呆的背影。光生（坂口健太郎飾）真的很想知道老爸在想什麼，他想起小時候曾經和老爸一起打電動的那個晚上，那是唯一一次父子之間真心的交流，於是他決定啟動「光之老爸」計畫。他送給老爸最新一代的《最終幻想》遊戲，作為退休禮物，邀請老爸進入充滿回憶的線上世界。光生隱藏自己的真實身分，以神秘女玩家Maidy為名，組隊帶著菜鳥老爸一起過關斬將，在這之中，光生在得到許多不知長相、不知姓名的夥伴相助，而迷上線上遊戲的老爸也逐漸開始向隊友卸下心房，原來，老爸心中有個從未對任何人說出口的秘密...... https://reurl.cc/K2ANxR
synopsis_en:
★ Based on the true story of Japanese blogger Maidy
★ The first live-action film adaptation from the "Final Fantasy" game series

A retired workaholic father starts teaming up to slay monsters in an online game, never suspecting that his legendary teammate is actually...

One day, a workaholic father (played by Kotaro Yoshida) on the verge of a major promotion suddenly resigns. His family is left bewildered, able only to watch his back as he spends his days staring blankly at the television. Akio (played by Kentaro Sakaguchi) desperately wants to know what his father is thinking. Recalling a single night in his childhood when they played a video game together—the only time they ever truly connected—he decides to initiate "Project Hikari" (The Father of Light).

He gifts his father the latest "Final Fantasy" game as a retirement present, inviting him into an online world full of memories. Hiding his true identity, Akio adopts the persona of a mysterious female player named Maidy, teaming up to guide his rookie father through the game's many challenges. Supported by a group of anonymous online comrades, Akio watches as his father becomes hooked on the game and slowly begins to open up to his teammates. As it turns out, his father is harboring a secret he has never shared with anyone...

movie_title: 【嬰兒車電影院】小超人大老虎

synopsis: ★1991 奧斯卡最佳原創配樂、最佳原創歌曲提名 ★1991 金球獎音樂喜劇類最佳影片、音樂喜劇類最佳男主角提名 ★屹立三十年喜劇經典，全球票房4.7億美元創下真人喜劇片新紀錄 凱文是一個大家庭中最年幼的成員，本來舉家飛往巴黎歡度聖誕節時，他卻意外地被遺留在家中，而更不幸的是，凱文的家成為了一對賊匪(史登和派西)的目標，小鬼凱文努力抵檔這兩個匪徒，不惜翻天覆地，引發連場刺激惹笑的場面。 https://reurl.cc/npoeD1
tags: 影人專題：克里斯哥倫布
synopsis_en:
★ 1991 Academy Award nominations for Best Original Score and Best Original Song
★ 1991 Golden Globe nominations for Best Motion Picture – Musical or Comedy and Best Actor – Musical or Comedy
★ A comedy classic for over thirty years, it set a new record for live-action comedies with a global box office of $470 million.

Kevin is the youngest member of a large family. When the entire family flies to Paris to celebrate Christmas, he is accidentally left behind at home. To make matters worse, Kevin's house becomes the target of a pair of burglars (Stern and Pesci). Young Kevin must do everything he can to fend off the intruders, turning the house upside down in a series of thrilling and hilarious confrontations.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
synopsis: 1959 電影旬報年度十大日本影片（第九名） Top 10 Japanese Films (9th Place), Kinema Junpo 1960 金球獎最佳外語片 Best Foreign Language Film, Golden Globe Awards 1960 坎城影展評審團獎 Jury Prize, Cannes FF 古董鑑定師劍持為對抗衰老，異想天開地設計一場危險佈局：引導女兒的醫師未婚夫木村介入自己與妻子郁子之間，企圖利用「嫉妒」來重振自身雄風。隨著窺伺視角頻頻切換，端莊妻子的慾望覺醒、準女婿的躁動野心與女兒的冷眼旁觀逐一浮現——為了慾望機關算盡，幾人最終將迎來如何的結局？ 仲代達矢連續兩年和導演市川崑合作了兩部作品，《鍵》是第二部，他為木村設定知性而隱含邪惡氣息的冷調表演，與同時期《人間的條件》中的道德形象形成鮮明對比，也確立了仲代 游刃於正反角色之間 的演技。改編自谷崎潤一郎同名小說，市川崑與編劇和田夏十及長谷部慶次，將原著陰翳耽美的官能書寫，重構為一齣黑色諷刺喜劇。由宮川一夫掌鏡，搭配高度風格化的光影調度，冷靜地貼近角色慾望。 Antique appraiser Kenmochi, desperate to defy aging, draws his daughter's physician fiancé Kimura into a dangerous scheme to revive his waning virility through jealousy. Adapted from Tanizaki Junichiro's novel, Ichikawa Kon reshapes its shadowed eroticism into a dark satirical comedy, with Miyagawa Kazuo's stylized lighting coolly charting desire and Nakadai delivering a chilling performance in stark contrast to his moral role in

tmdb_overview_en: A middle-aged husband of a younger woman finds her youth intimidating to the point that he cannot become aroused. His solution involves the introduction of his daughter's lover to his wife.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
synopsis: 俠士金山戈原本打算從軍報國，投靠張哲元帥麾下，不料卻被栽贓成殺害丞相之子的兇手，遭元帥發配邊疆。押解途中遇上 金兵，金山戈 趁亂 自 行解開枷鎖，打敗金兵逃脫。張哲被金人元帥完顏所殺，張哲之女恩珠，在王封的幫助下逃到陸莊。為了報仇雪恨，他們廣招英雄。金山戈剛好行經比武大會，武藝超群的他為王封賞識，力邀抗金。金山戈欣然答應，但條件是要娶恩珠為妻。恩珠為了報父仇只好答應，但前提是金山戈必須先提著完顏的人頭回來。 金山戈先以頹廢、無賴甚至帶點登徒子的輕佻形象出現，顛覆傳統武俠片中「俠」之形象；隨著劇情裡眾人齊力抗金的經過，也讓這位非典型俠客漸漸平反形象，最終瀟灑地如西部英雄般退場。
screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-小影格
tmdb_overview: Set in Sung Dynasty at a tumultuous time when China is invaded by the northern Jin Empire, the story revolves around swordsman Ge (David Tong Wai), who is wronged for murdering the son of the Prime Minister. Luckily, his superb kung fu helps him escape. But when the Sung General Chang is killed by the Jin Admiral Wanyan, and Chang's beautiful daughter Chu (Han Hsiang Chin) is seeking a patriotic hero to avenge his father's death, Ge pledges to assassinate Wanyan within ten days and marry Chu. But he has to first deal with the four kung fu masters serving under the Jin Admiral.

synopsis: （註：本片分級為輔12） ★2025 慕尼黑電影節 剛出獄的湯姆繼承了一棟價值不菲的房產，正當他計畫賣掉房子、遠赴西班牙展開新生活時，卻發現最大的阻礙竟是患有唐氏症的同父異母弟弟羅蘭，由於羅蘭擁有法律保障的終身居住權，讓湯姆的如意算盤徹底落空，為了將這塊絆腳石逐出家門，湯姆使出渾身解數，這對性格南轅北轍的兄弟就此展開一段雞飛狗跳、衝突不斷的同居生活。 https://reurl.cc/qpgaeq
synopsis_en:
(Note: Rated PG-12) ★ 2025 Munich Film Festival

Fresh out of prison, Tom inherits a valuable estate. Just as he plans to sell the property and move to Spain to start a new life, he discovers his biggest obstacle: his half-brother Roland, who has Down syndrome. Because Roland holds a legally protected lifelong right of residence, Tom’s grand scheme is completely derailed. Determined to remove this "stumbling block," Tom pulls out all the stops to drive him out, sparking a chaotic and conflict-ridden cohabitation between two brothers who couldn't be more different.

synopsis: ★《極度不妥！》牧島輝、《陸王》和田正人主演 猫塚的貓咪走失了，他到寵物偵探事務所請求協助，猿渡調查後發現牠在某對夫婦家幸福地生活，猫塚無力支付調查費，只好在事務所打工償還，有一天，裕太因貓咪不見而到事務所求助，他的父母正在調停離婚，同樣父母離異的猫塚能體會男孩感受，於是猫塚和裕太一起去找他的貓咪權太，找到權太時，裕太家出現了奇蹟…... https://reurl.cc/K2Aq6R
tmdb_original_title: 海岸通りのネコミミ探偵
tmdb_overview: 猫塚因貓咪走失而到寵物偵探事務所請求協助，後因無力支付調查費，而在事務所打工償還。某日，裕太因貓咪不見而到事務所求助，他的父母正在調停離婚，同樣父母離異的猫塚能體會男孩感受，於是一起協助裕太尋找他的貓咪。
tmdb_overview_en: In the coastal region of Shonan, a young man enlists the help of a eccentric local pet detective to search for his missing pet cat. When the man is unable to pay for the detective's help, he joins the unusual agency to pay off the debt.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
movie_title_en: Palimpsest: The Story of a Name
country: 法國 France﹑香港 Hong Kong﹑台灣 Taiwan
synopsis: 2025 多倫多影展 Toronto IFF 2025 阿姆斯特丹國際紀錄片影展 IDFA 2025 金馬獎最佳紀錄長片、最佳剪輯 Best Documentary Feature & Best Editing, Golden Horse Awards 擁有東方面孔的華裔資深剪輯師雪美蓮，卻有著洋化姓氏：Stephen。她透過父親留下的筆記，深入鮮為人知的家族歷史，驚覺父母皆有著曾經隱姓埋名、真假難辨的過往：父親似乎是澳洲原住民漁民後裔；曾有著文學夢的母親，過去又似乎與英國小說家吳爾芙的家族成員在中國的戀情有著幽微牽連。 為了探尋「Stephen」之名的真偽，她翻找家庭電影與老照片，在那段殖民擴張與動盪的時代中，重新建構一段比現實更趨近真相的私密家族史。她在多重敘事中追問身分認同，探尋個體如何在離散的迷霧中，透過重寫歷史而重新翱翔，拼湊出跨越國境與世紀風雲的生命圖像。 Veteran editor Mary Stephen investigates a lifelong enigma: why does she possess a Chinese face but the Western surname "Stephen"? This personal story uncovers her parents' assumed names and hidden lives, from an Australian aboriginal lineage to a secret link with Virginia Woolf's nephew. Set against a colonial backdrop, the film reveals a history long obscured by the fog of displacement. Stephen navigates a maze of conflicting narratives, piecing together a profound cinematic portrait of identity and the resilience of the self.
screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-大影格
tmdb_title: Palimpsest: the Story of a Name
tmdb_title_en: Palimpsest: the Story of a Name
tmdb_overview: 資深剪輯師雪美蓮，總納悶自己到底姓史蒂芬，還是姓雪、姓陳？明明亞洲臉，又非混血，怎取洋人姓？一查不得了，父親竟來自澳洲！母親曾有文學夢，似還牽涉吳爾芙姪子的中國戀情？她化身偵探親自執導，翻找父親傳記、家庭電影、老照片，以「史蒂芬」為圓心，拼出一幅與世紀風雲、名人交織的私密家族史，追問殖民與身分認同。血緣纏如網，個體仍能重寫自我，乘故事翱翔。
tmdb_overview_en: Veteran filmmaker Mary Stephen digs into her own family past to uncover the long-hidden origins of her Western surname, revealing a story of culture shock, colonialism, and contested remembrance.

synopsis: 9年後，他們於巴黎再次重逢。 Jesse將那晚在維也納的邂逅，寫成了暢銷小說，這天，他來到巴黎的新書發表會。Celine看到這個消息，來到了現場。 而大概90分鐘後，Jesse即將啟程返回美國。 各自展開新生活的他們喝了杯咖啡，走在浪漫的巴黎城市小徑裡，乘著船在塞納河畔的夕陽下。從帶有一點自尊的防衛式聊天，到重新卸下心防.....
synopsis_en: Nine years later, they reunite in Paris. Jesse has turned their brief encounter in Vienna into a bestselling novel, and today he is in the city for a book signing. Having seen the news, Celine arrives at the event. With only about 90 minutes before Jesse must depart for the United States, the two—who have since built separate lives—share a coffee and wander through the romantic backstreets of Paris, eventually boarding a boat on the Seine as the sun begins to set. Their conversation shifts from guarded, prideful exchanges to slowly letting their defenses down once again...

synopsis: 鄉下女孩Holly憧憬著紐約的美好，就像她熱切凝望櫥窗中的第凡內珠寶，可望而不可及，只能過著自欺欺人的生活。 放棄寫作的Paul，接受了貴婦的包養，忍氣吞聲的活著。 他們像是屋簷下躲雨的兩隻倉皇野貓。 能夠給予溫暖的，只有彼此......
tmdb_overview: 本片是根據楚門凱波特（Truman Capote）的小說改編的名片，由永遠的玉女明星奧黛麗赫本領銜主演。 出身鄉下的年輕姑娘荷莉（奧黛麗赫本）在紐約曼哈頓當高級交際花，她一心盼望能嫁個年長的金龜婿；荷莉的新鄰居（喬治比柏）是個被有錢女人包養的小白臉，但他卻一直夢想將來能成為作家。 這齣經典文藝片贏得1960年的奧斯卡最佳原著音樂及最佳主題曲（"Moon River"），導演布萊克愛德華也以本片奪得最佳導演。
tmdb_overview_en: Holly Golightly is an eccentric New York City playgirl determined to marry a Brazilian millionaire. But when young writer Paul Varjak moves into her apartment building, her past threatens to get in their way.

movie_title: 菲利斯之永夜島歷險記
movie_title_en: Felix and the Treasure of Morgaa
synopsis: ★2022 魁北克電影節最佳非魁北克電影、最佳首部長片提名 12歲的菲利斯相信兩年前在海上失蹤的父親仍然活著，於是他決定出發尋找父親的下落。陪他一起出海的夥伴有退休的漁夫老湯姆、愛偷東西的獨腳鸚鵡阿嘎，以及生性像狗的貓咪來福。他們一路漂流到永夜島，那裡有一座地下城，住著一個秘密社群，由狂妄自大的莫嘉所統治，那裏擁有令人難以置信的寶藏。 https://reurl.cc/ppgoxl
synopsis_en: Nominated for Best Non-Quebec Film and Best First Feature Film at the 2022 Quebec Film Festival. Twelve-year-old Felix is convinced that his father, who disappeared at sea two years ago, is still alive. Determined to find him, Felix sets out on a quest accompanied by Old Tom, a retired fisherman; Squawk, a thieving one-legged parrot; and Rover, a cat who acts just like a dog. Their journey leads them to the Island of Eternal Night, home to an underground city and a secret society ruled by the megalomaniacal Morgaä, where incredible treasures are hidden.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
synopsis: ｜ 很久很久以前，在充滿飛龍和魔法的世界裡，有一位長髮公主蕾蘋絲，她有著最長、最美麗的秀髮。女巫葛朵將蕾蘋絲藏在禁忌森林深處的高塔裡，由巨龍休果負責看守，四周更用一道魔法高牆包圍。一天到晚，蕾蘋絲被葛朵的僕人使喚著；而她最喜歡的畫畫，只能 趁四下無人時 偷偷進行。陰錯陽差之下，蕾蘋絲無意間找到一個古老的地道，冒著被葛朵發現的危險，她獨自前往外面的世界。 改編自格林童話《長髮公主》，動畫讓飛龍、女巫、高塔栩栩如生，且為故事注入意想不到的魔法。芭比飾演的蕾蘋絲擁有一支魔法畫筆，畫出的任何東西都會成真。創意和魔法便成為她的武器，讓芭比勇敢突破詛咒。
screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-小影格
synopsis_en: Long, long ago, in a world filled with dragons and magic, there lived a princess named Rapunzel, who had the longest and most beautiful hair in the land. The witch Gothel kept Rapunzel hidden in a high tower deep within the Forbidden Forest, guarded by a dragon named Hugo and surrounded by an enchanted wall. Day and night, Rapunzel was at the beck and call of Gothel’s servants; her favorite passion, painting, could only be done in secret when no one was watching. By a twist of fate, Rapunzel accidentally discovers an ancient tunnel and, risking Gothel’s wrath, ventures out into the world alone. Adapted from the Brothers Grimm fairy tale "Rapunzel," this animation brings dragons, witches, and towers to life while infusing the story with unexpected magic. Rapunzel, portrayed by Barbie, possesses a magic paintbrush that makes anything she paints come true. With creativity and magic as her weapons, Barbie bravely breaks free from the curse.

synopsis: 在留尼旺的一個社區裡，宰牲節快要到了，小朋友卻因為家裡的傳統被同學嘲笑成「動物殺手」。當一隻山羊真的被送來時，他決定想辦法保護牠—可是，鄰居正偷偷盯著看。這是一個關於勇氣、選擇和友誼的動人故事。
tmdb_overview: 在留尼旺島上，12歲小男孩在路邊養著一頭可愛羔羊。即將到來的古爾邦節，讓他擔心羔羊會被獻祭並煮成餐桌上的菜餚，他聯手剛搬來的鄰居女孩，決心拯救最親愛的動物夥伴。本片透過青春活潑的童趣調性，展現島民獨特的風土民情，以及馬約特人、科摩羅人、穆斯林等多元族群的宗教與文化異同，展現重要且難得的人文紀錄。
tmdb_overview_en: In a Reunion Island housing project, as the time of the sacrifice for the Aïd el-Kebir approaches, Ibrahim, 12 years old and of Comoran descent, is bullied by Evan, a neighbor of the same age, who accuses him of being an animal killer. When Ibrahim learns that a goat is about to be delivered to his building he decides to save it . . . but Evan is watching. The rescue of the goat leads to some unlikely alliances as Ibrahim attempts to succeed at the rescue against all odds.

synopsis: 一隻黑色小鳥和一隻白色小鳥住在一棵大樹上，過著平和快樂的生活。然而每當有新鮮事發生，他們便吵吵鬧鬧想爭個高下。透過簡單的兩隻小鳥主人翁的日常生活，用生動有趣的方式和孩子談論關於包容，妒忌和友情⋯⋯
synopsis_en: A little black bird and a little white bird live together in a big tree, leading a peaceful and happy life. However, whenever something new happens, they start bickering, each trying to outdo the other. Through the simple daily lives of these two feathered protagonists, this story uses a lively and engaging way to talk to children about tolerance, jealousy, and friendship...

synopsis: 德國動畫導演朱莉婭．奧克作品，畫風色彩簡約、故事節奏明快，別具風格、趣味橫生，是輕鬆愉快的喜劇小動畫。
synopsis_en: A work by German animation director Julia Ocker, this short animated comedy features a minimalist visual style and brisk pacing. Unique and full of humor, it is a lighthearted and delightful experience.

synopsis: 一大早的兔子班一陣騷動，因為班上來了個轉學生，而且竟然是隻青蛙！身為班上最特別的存在，蛙蛙不管做什麼都引人注目，然而和同學們語言不通，吃飯習慣也大不相同，蛙蛙覺得孤單又寂寞，有人會伸出援手，和他做朋友嗎？
synopsis_en: The Rabbit Class is in a stir this morning because a new transfer student has arrived—and he’s a frog! As the most unique member of the class, Froggy draws attention no matter what he does. However, between the language barrier and his very different eating habits, Froggy feels lonely and isolated. Will anyone reach out a helping hand and become his friend?

synopsis: 因為戰爭，阿弗雷不得不帶著家當遠離家鄉。他挨家挨戶請求幫助，卻一次一次被拒於門外。直到他遇到了願意釋出善意，遞出熱咖啡來溫暖他的夥伴。
synopsis_en: Displaced by war, Alfred is forced to flee his home with all his belongings. He goes from door to door seeking help, only to be rejected time and time again. That is, until he meets a kind soul who offers him a warm cup of coffee and the comfort of companionship.

synopsis: 卡皮巴拉一家逃進雞舍避難，可是雞群覺得牠們「好奇怪！」沒想到，一隻小雞先伸出翅膀說：「嗨，我想跟你們當朋友！」從那天起，農場裡有了不一樣的笑聲。因為當我們學會打開心門，世界也會變得更大一點。
synopsis_en: A family of capybaras flees to a chicken coop for shelter, but the chickens find them "so strange!" Unexpectedly, a little chick reaches out a wing and says, "Hi! I want to be your friend." From that day on, a new kind of laughter filled the farm. For when we learn to open our hearts, the world becomes a little bit wider.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
synopsis: 、 Color｜101min 2012 鹿特丹影展 IFF 2012 釜山影展 2013 大阪亞洲影展特別提及 Special Mention, Osaka Asian 摯愛髮妻意外猝逝，頹唐獨子中年失業，重病纏身的老木匠自知時日無多，決定將房門釘死，斷絕飲食，並囑咐兒子在找到工作前不要破門，以便續領年金維持生計。曾經三代同堂、幸福美滿，如今天人永別、僅餘苦難，人生一夜失色。一門之隔的父子二人，能否尋回彼此的羈絆，重拾生之慾，走完生之路？ 當年80歲的仲代達矢仍活躍於銀幕及舞台，戲中的他洗盡鉛華，詮釋生無可戀的憂傷老父，在大量特寫鏡頭下，將角色的陰暗絕望演繹得淋漓盡致，對戲的實力派演員北村一輝與柏林影后寺島忍亦有亮眼表現。繼同樣描繪「衰老與死亡」的《跟著春天去旅行》，仲代與小林政廣再續前緣，改編知名奇案，聚焦日本高齡社會寫實議題。小林特地為仲代量身打造角色，以寫遺書的心情拍出沉重卻真實的生死命題，直面311災後創傷心理圖景。
tags: 大阪亞洲影展特別提及
無名．仲代達矢紀念特集
screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-大影格
tmdb_overview: 摯愛髮妻意外猝逝，頹唐獨子中年失業，重病纏身的老木匠自知時日無多，決定將房門釘死，斷絕飲食，並囑咐兒子在找到工作前不要破門，以便續領年金維持生計。曾經三代同堂、幸福美滿，如今天人永別、僅餘苦難，人生一夜失色。一門之隔的父子二人，能否尋回彼此的羈絆，重拾生之慾，走完生之路？
tmdb_overview_en: In 2010, 31,560 people ended their own lives and about 20,000 people died or went missing with the earthquake. Unemployed widower Fujio Murai’s family tragedy contains instances of both; diagnosed with lung cancer, Fujio refuses surgery and returns home with his son Yoshio.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
synopsis: 1980 坎城影展金棕櫚獎 Palme d'Or, Cannes FF 1981 每日電影獎最佳影片、導演、男演員、美術指導、音樂 Best Film, Director, Actor, Art direction & Music awards, Mainichi Film Awards 1981 奧斯卡金像獎最佳外語片、最佳美術指導提名 Nominated for Best Foreign Language Film & Art Direction, Academy Awards 日本戰國烽火正熾，武田信玄憑卓越統御能力雄霸一方，卻在戰場上意外中鎗。垂危之際，他囑咐親信隱瞞死訊，以維持士氣並牽制宿敵。接掌大局的家臣迫不得已，只能勸服一名外貌極似信玄的市井罪犯出任「影武者」。面對時勢變化如風，強敵環伺如林，戰況延燒如火，影武者能否搬演信玄虎威，運籌帷幄不動如山？ 本片開拍初期，黑澤明與原定主演發生衝突，仲代達矢臨危受命接演武田信玄及影武者，成功地在名將風範與匹夫鄙氣間切換自如，層次繁複的深刻演技助黑澤明拿下坎城金棕櫚，也讓兩位巨匠為《亂》的合作充分暖身。然而，此一時代鉅作 製作資金 一度幾近斷炊，端賴名導喬治盧卡斯與法蘭西斯柯波拉跨海協力籌資才得以完成，蔚為影壇佳話。
tags: 無名．仲代達矢紀念特集
screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-大影格
tmdb_overview: 日本戰國烽火正熾，武田信玄憑卓越統御能力雄霸一方，卻在戰場上意外中鎗。垂危之際，他囑咐親信隱瞞死訊，以維持士氣並牽制宿敵。接掌大局的家臣迫不得已，只能勸服一名外貌極似信玄的市井罪犯出任「影武者」。面對時勢變化如風，強敵環伺如林，戰況延燒如火，影武者能否搬演信玄虎威，運籌帷幄不動如山？
tmdb_overview_en: Akira Kurosawa's lauded feudal epic presents the tale of a petty thief who is recruited to impersonate Shingen, an aging warlord, in order to avoid attacks by competing clans. When Shingen dies, his generals reluctantly agree to have the impostor take over as the powerful ruler. He soon begins to appreciate life as Shingen, but his commitment to the role is tested when he must lead his troops into battle against the forces of a rival warlord.

synopsis: ☀️ 希望天氣很好，我們屋頂見。
synopsis_en: I hope the weather is beautiful. See you on the rooftop.

synopsis: 如果你能打開一扇門，走進去重溫人生中的關鍵時刻，會發生什麼事？莎拉和大衛是兩位素未謀面的單身男女，在一次共同朋友的婚禮上相遇，因為各種出人意料的命運轉折，他們踏上一段大膽、奇幻又美麗的旅程。這是一場充滿趣味與奇想的冒險，他們得以重返各自過去的重要時刻，重新理解自己如何走到今天的現在，甚至有機會改寫自己的未來。
synopsis_en: What if you could open a door and step back into the pivotal moments of your life? Sarah and David are two strangers who meet at a mutual friend's wedding. Through a series of unexpected twists of fate, they embark on a bold, fantastical, and beautiful journey. In this whimsical adventure, they revisit key moments from their pasts, gaining a new understanding of how they arrived at the present—and perhaps even finding a chance to rewrite their future.

synopsis: 剛經歷失婚打擊的作家Frances，在好友的鼓勵下前往義大利托斯卡尼旅遊。原本只是想散散心，卻在陰錯陽差之下，衝動買下了一棟名為「Bramasole」的老舊別墅。這棟房子破舊不堪、雜草叢生，就像她當時支離破碎的生活。 Frances決定留下來，親手修復這棟老屋。在整修的過程中，她遇見了古怪卻溫暖的鄰居、一群熱情的工人，以及無數個意想不到的驚喜。
synopsis_en: Frances, a writer reeling from a recent divorce, travels to Tuscany, Italy, at the encouragement of her best friend. What was meant to be a simple getaway takes an unexpected turn when, through a twist of fate, she impulsively buys a crumbling villa named "Bramasole." Dilapidated and overgrown, the house is a reflection of her own fractured life. Frances decides to stay and restore the villa herself. Throughout the renovation, she encounters eccentric yet warm-hearted neighbors, a group of spirited workers, and countless unexpected surprises.

movie_title: 頭文字D(4K修復版)－早安！周日經典電影院

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
movie_title_en: Palimpsest: The Story of a Name
country: 法國 France﹑香港 Hong Kong﹑台灣 Taiwan
synopsis: 2025 多倫多影展 Toronto IFF 2025 阿姆斯特丹國際紀錄片影展 IDFA 2025 金馬獎最佳紀錄長片、最佳剪輯 Best Documentary Feature & Best Editing, Golden Horse Awards 擁有東方面孔的華裔資深剪輯師雪美蓮，卻有著洋化姓氏：Stephen。她透過父親留下的筆記，深入鮮為人知的家族歷史，驚覺父母皆有著曾經隱姓埋名、真假難辨的過往：父親似乎是澳洲原住民漁民後裔；曾有著文學夢的母親，過去又似乎與英國小說家吳爾芙的家族成員在中國的戀情有著幽微牽連。 為了探尋「Stephen」之名的真偽，她翻找家庭電影與老照片，在那段殖民擴張與動盪的時代中，重新建構一段比現實更趨近真相的私密家族史。她在多重敘事中追問身分認同，探尋個體如何在離散的迷霧中，透過重寫歷史而重新翱翔，拼湊出跨越國境與世紀風雲的生命圖像。 Veteran editor Mary Stephen investigates a lifelong enigma: why does she possess a Chinese face but the Western surname "Stephen"? This personal story uncovers her parents' assumed names and hidden lives, from an Australian aboriginal lineage to a secret link with Virginia Woolf's nephew. Set against a colonial backdrop, the film reveals a history long obscured by the fog of displacement. Stephen navigates a maze of conflicting narratives, piecing together a profound cinematic portrait of identity and the resilience of the self.

tmdb_overview: 資深剪輯師雪美蓮，總納悶自己到底姓史蒂芬，還是姓雪、姓陳？明明亞洲臉，又非混血，怎取洋人姓？一查不得了，父親竟來自澳洲！母親曾有文學夢，似還牽涉吳爾芙姪子的中國戀情？她化身偵探親自執導，翻找父親傳記、家庭電影、老照片，以「史蒂芬」為圓心，拼出一幅與世紀風雲、名人交織的私密家族史，追問殖民與身分認同。血緣纏如網，個體仍能重寫自我，乘故事翱翔。
tmdb_overview_en: Veteran filmmaker Mary Stephen digs into her own family past to uncover the long-hidden origins of her Western surname, revealing a story of culture shock, colonialism, and contested remembrance.

synopsis: ★2021 金馬影展 自閉症者天生不懂得，也學不會一般人表達感情的方式，難以應付主流社會複雜的人際互動，但他們往往固?於特定愛好，進而在特定範疇如繪畫、音樂、寫作上，展現特有的天分。韓淑華老師十多年來教導自閉症者繪畫，白天的星星對他們獨特的美學風格屢感驚艷，2003年她成立多寶藝術學堂，為成年泛自閉症者提供持續創作的避風港。林正盛導演也從那時開始，記錄他們的日常。本片透過對四位泛自閉者近身的紀錄，觀察他們與同儕、親人和老師的互動，呈現他們與生俱來不同於一般人情感表達方式的獨特生命狀態。 https://reurl.cc/V2EmY5
tmdb_overview: 「老師說我一輩子都學不會，我很痛苦、我很生氣，卻又無法出言反駁。」患有口語表達障礙的廷瑋，常有幻聽、幻覺的大學生沛軒，無法適應學校生活的惠綸，感情充沛卻不擅表達的樹緯，他們在地球上迷了航，卻在多寶藝術學堂韓淑華老師的引領下，用動人的詩句和音樂，以及多彩畫筆，突破冷漠疏離，揮灑出內心熱烈的小宇宙。
tmdb_overview_en: In 2010, director Lin Cheng-sheng made Twinkle Twinkle Little Star, a documentary about autistic children and their teacher Han Shu-hua, who taught her young charges to express themselves through art. In this moving follow-up, Lin once again follows Han, who has since founded a shelter institute where autistic children can nurture their talents in painting and music. Because of their inability to effectively communicate their emotions and thoughts, people with autism can often be treated like outsiders. To inspire empathy for them, Lin made this moving documentary that embraces the diversity that these talented individuals and their stirring works of art bring to our lives.

synopsis: 探險家徐仁修用50年行走荒野雨林，透過鏡頭與文字記錄自然的壯麗與脆弱。他不只是觀察者，更是與自然共生的行者。 然而，2019 年，他歷經人生首次手術，身體發出時間的警訊，也啟動一場他稱為「最後的探險」，深入亞馬遜，只為追尋夢想多年的藍閃蝶。
tmdb_overview: 四十五年來，徐仁修透過攝影與文字探索自然，既記錄其壯麗，亦警示其消亡。2019 年的一場手術，讓他首次感受到時間的重量。本片跟隨他踏上可能是人生最後的旅程——不僅深入荒野，更直面生死。當這位自然哲人走向終極遠征時，拍攝團隊也在過程中蛻變，開始思索生命、自然與人類共同的局限。
tmdb_overview_en: For 45 years, Jen-Shiu Hsu has used photography and writing to explore the intricate universe of nature. He has tirelessly shared his discoveries with the world, exposing both its beauty and the destruction caused by human civilization. But in 2019, after undergoing surgery for the first time in his life, he became acutely aware of time. Suddenly, his lifelong rhythm of exploration faced an unavoidable limit. His final, unfinished expedition—will it be the closing chapter of his journey, or the start of something new? This documentary observes a man who has always sought the core of nature, now faced with the reality of his own mortality. As he embarks on one last great adventure, the film also captures how the filmmaking team, through their own journeys, begins to question their relationship with nature and their understanding of life itself.

synopsis: 安詳辭世 A Very Easy Death 雪美蓮 Mary STEPHEN｜加拿大 Canada｜1975｜DCP ｜B&W、Color｜9min 大加拿大成人禮 Pawaganak: The Great Canadian Puberty Rite 雪美蓮 Mary STEPHEN｜加拿大 Canada｜1974｜DCP ｜B&W、Color｜19min 絲之影 Shades of Silk 雪美蓮 Mary STEPHEN｜法國 France﹑加拿大 Canada｜1978｜DCP ｜Color｜62min 2025 多倫多影展 Toronto IFF 2025 紐約影展 New York FF 2026 鹿特丹影展 IFF Rotterdam 在成為法國新浪潮大師艾力侯麥御用剪輯師前，雪美蓮早已透過鏡頭，捕捉流散者在異鄉與故土間的徘徊﹑身分認同的掙扎與成長陣痛。本次放映的四部早期作品，包括首部長片《絲之影》，以及三部風格迥異的珍稀短片——《迷宮》﹑《安詳辭世》﹑《大加拿大成人禮》，雪美蓮藉由音畫，將個人經歷化為感性的詩篇。 從加拿大的公路洗禮、巴黎學生宿舍的夢囈，到面對死亡的靜謐凝視，她的影像如絲綢般細膩且充滿韌性。這些作品如遊走於東西方文化之間的記憶碎片，以鏡頭記錄其對自我身份的感知和探求。 Before her legendary tenure as Éric Rohmer's editor, Mary Stephen was already a "tailor of images," using her camera to record a series of rites of passage. This screening anchors her debut feature,
screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-小影格
synopsis_en:
**A Very Easy Death**
Mary STEPHEN｜Canada｜1975｜DCP｜B&W, Color｜9min

**Pawaganak: The Great Canadian Puberty Rite**
Mary STEPHEN｜Canada｜1974｜DCP｜B&W, Color｜19min

**Shades of Silk**
Mary STEPHEN｜France, Canada｜1978｜DCP｜Color｜62min

2025 Toronto IFF
2025 New York FF
2026 IFF Rotterdam

Long before her legendary tenure as Éric Rohmer’s long-time editor, Mary Stephen was already a "tailor of images," using her camera to capture the displacement of the diaspora, the struggle for identity, and the growing pains of coming of age. This screening features four of her early works, including her debut feature *Shades of Silk* and three rare shorts of distinct styles—*Labyrinth*, *A Very Easy Death*, and *Pawaganak: The Great Canadian Puberty Rite*. Through the interplay of sound and image, Stephen transforms personal experience into evocative visual poetry. From a Canadian road-trip baptism and the somniloquy of a Parisian student dorm to a quiet gaze at death, her imagery is as delicate and resilient as silk. These works serve as memory fragments drifting between Eastern and Western cultures, documenting her perception and search for selfhood.

synopsis: 1941 奧斯卡金像獎最佳影片、黑白攝影 Best Picture & Best Cinematography (Black-and-White), Academy Awards 2018 美國國家電影保護局典藏影片 National Film Registry, National Film Preservation Board 妙齡女子在異地邂逅英國紳士，墜入情網後旋即閃婚，隨丈夫返回康沃爾郡的宏偉莊園。豈料古宅並非蜜月愛巢，而是男人亡妻幽影徘徊的迷宮：從擺設、舊衣到房間每個角落，都彷彿低語她的存在。少婦深陷焦慮，冷若冰霜的女管家更時時提醒：她永遠無法取代前任女主人。當一艘失事船隻被打撈上岸，莊園深藏的謊言與死亡謎團，也悄然浮出水面。 希區考克首部美國電影，改編杜莫里哀1938年的同名小說，以高對比黑白光影重現驚悚迷情，在海斯法典的嚴格限制下觸及婚內出軌、女女情愫等禁忌。女作家杜莫里哀乃哥德羅曼史名家，文風不僅啟發《地獄新娘》的原著小說《米蘭夫人》，更一度被誤認為該書的真正作者。
screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-大影格
synopsis_en:
Winner of the 1941 Academy Awards for Best Picture and Best Cinematography (Black-and-White), and selected for preservation in the National Film Registry in 2018. 

A young woman meets a British gentleman in a foreign land, falls head over heels, and marries him in a whirlwind romance. However, upon returning to his grand estate in Cornwall, she discovers the ancient manor is no honeymoon nest, but a labyrinth haunted by the shadow of his late wife. From the furnishings and old clothes to every corner of the house, everything seems to whisper her presence. As the young bride sinks into anxiety, the ice-cold housekeeper constantly reminds her that she can never replace her predecessor. When a shipwreck is salvaged and brought ashore, the lies and mysteries of death hidden deep within the estate begin to surface.

Alfred Hitchcock’s first American film, adapted from Daphne du Maurier’s 1938 novel of the same name, uses high-contrast black-and-white cinematography to recreate a world of suspense and obsession. Despite the strict constraints of the Hays Code, the film subtly touches on taboos such as marital infidelity and lesbian undertones. Du Maurier, a master of Gothic romance, possessed a style so influential that it inspired the novel *Mistress of Milan* (the basis for *Corpse Bride*) and even led some to believe she was its true author.

synopsis: ★2024 SCHLiNGEL兒少影展兒童電影類最佳國際劇情片、最佳兒童演員鑽石獎；兒童評審團最佳影片、一般評審團最佳影片等5項提名 ★2025 魁北克電影節最佳影片、最佳男主角等6項提名 ★《臭皮匠發財夢》、《星叭克超有種》安托萬貝特朗領銜主演 菲利普是一位缺乏靈感的歌劇作曲家，他被迫收留他的侄女西蒙娜，一個叛逆、古怪的孤兒，而她的最好的朋友是一隻臭鼬。儘管性格截然相反，菲利普和西蒙娜很快就發現，他們可能比最初想像的更需要彼此。 https://reurl.cc/X2WpGR
tmdb_overview: 11歲的孤兒少女西蒙妮，在祖母死後，必須離開農場的家，而菲利普，一位曾創作出傑作但靈感枯竭很久的歌劇作曲家，則被迫收留他那叛逆又古怪的姪女西蒙妮，跟著她一起入住的死黨，竟然是一隻臭鼬！儘管兩人的個性南轅北轍，菲利普和西蒙妮很快發現，他們可能比自己想像的還需要彼此。

Despite their diametrically opposed personalities, Philippe and Simone quickly discover that they may need each other more than they first thought.

synopsis: 俠士金山戈原本打算從軍報國，投靠張哲元帥麾下，不料卻被栽贓成殺害丞相之子的兇手，遭元帥發配邊疆。押解途中遇上 金兵，金山戈 趁亂 自 行解開枷鎖，打敗金兵逃脫。張哲被金人元帥完顏所殺，張哲之女恩珠，在王封的幫助下逃到陸莊。為了報仇雪恨，他們廣招英雄。金山戈剛好行經比武大會，武藝超群的他為王封賞識，力邀抗金。金山戈欣然答應，但條件是要娶恩珠為妻。恩珠為了報父仇只好答應，但前提是金山戈必須先提著完顏的人頭回來。 金山戈先以頹廢、無賴甚至帶點登徒子的輕佻形象出現，顛覆傳統武俠片中「俠」之形象；隨著劇情裡眾人齊力抗金的經過，也讓這位非典型俠客漸漸平反形象，最終瀟灑地如西部英雄般退場。

tmdb_overview: Set in Sung Dynasty at a tumultuous time when China is invaded by the northern Jin Empire, the story revolves around swordsman Ge (David Tong Wai), who is wronged for murdering the son of the Prime Minister. Luckily, his superb kung fu helps him escape. But when the Sung General Chang is killed by the Jin Admiral Wanyan, and Chang's beautiful daughter Chu (Han Hsiang Chin) is seeking a patriotic hero to avenge his father's death, Ge pledges to assassinate Wanyan within ten days and marry Chu. But he has to first deal with the four kung fu masters serving under the Jin Admiral.

synopsis: 1986 日本藍絲帶獎最佳影片 Best Film, Blue Ribbon Awards 1986 每日電影獎最佳影片、導演、男配角 Best Film, Director, 1986 奧斯卡金像獎 最佳服裝設計獲獎；最佳導演、攝影、美術設計提名 戰國大名一文字秀虎曾經縱橫沙場、不可一世，年逾七十後卻常感力不從心，決意退位養老。未料將城池分給三兄弟後，長子隨即翻臉羞辱，逼他出走，次子也暗謀逆反，冷眼相待。唯因直言敢諫而被逐出家門的三子，不僅暗中派人護駕，更溫暖迎納流亡老父。目睹家系骨肉相殘，心受過往惡業折磨，梟雄秀虎漸成瘋魔，無語能對命運荒波。 角色設定與《影武者》天地對望並更臻化境，將莎翁悲劇《李爾王》縫入日本戰國時代，仲代達矢以深厚演劇功底創造極強情緒渲染力，堪稱本片宏偉史詩氣韻最重要的元素。劇組雖沿用了《影武者》的服裝與道具，仍耗資千萬美金調度浩大戰爭場面，刷新當時日本影史最高拍攝成本，也成就黑澤明匯聚畢生心血的顛峰之作。

synopsis: ★2025 尤西獎最佳突破角色提名 ★《女性日常》導演珍妮托沃涅米最新作品 在芬蘭熱鬧的夏季，29歲的西莉和她樂觀的父親彼得里在探戈節上展開了一場觀念對決，西莉總說「不」，而彼得里總說「是」，兩人性格南轅北轍，誤會和意外層出不窮，西莉忙碌處理老闆的婚姻危機；彼得里則掩飾內心混亂，用優雅的探戈假裝一切正常，當最後一支探戈落幕，冰冷的現實迫使他們正視彼此的謊言。 https://reurl.cc/GamQgA

tmdb_overview_en: Siiri, a hardworking millennial, wants to be successful in her job as the advisor to the Minister of Economic Affairs. She craves a promotion. Siiri’s job takes her and the hard-to-handle minister, an unpredictable eccentric boss lady, to a big tango festival in a small Finnish town. Siiri’s father Petri, a former tango artist and an overly optimistic middle-aged man, wants to make himself useful to Siiri while trying to hide the fact that he himself is homeless, bankrupt and finally at his wits end. Over the course of one summer weekend both Siiri’s and Petri’s facade comes tumbling down but the tango keeps going on in the sweet Finnish summer night.

synopsis: （註：本片分級為輔12） ★孫耀威、方力申領銜主演 香港有一所另類的「國際學校」名叫勵志中學。大部分的學生以南亞裔為主，其中也包括內地新移民和成績較差的本地學生。學生操行問題、教學支援不足等惡劣條件，令學校師生間氣氛長期處在緊張狀態。為提升學生們對學校的歸屬感，ParkSir（孫耀威飾）及MissLaw（葉芷如飾）藉著每年一度的校際才藝大賽，希望讓6E班的同學能學會團隊合作，同時打破學生之間的種族隔閡。然而，就在練習進行得如火如荼之際，幾個學生陸續出現各種問題...... https://reurl.cc/4laqvV

synopsis: ☀️ 希望天氣很好，我們屋頂見。
tmdb_overview: 千葉敦子是一家精神醫療中心的年輕女醫生，她一直致力於最尖端的精神醫療技術與臨床應用的研究，她和天才科學家時田浩作一起發明了一種能監測病患夢境、可以窺視人們心中與腦袋瓜裡秘密的儀器「DC MINI」，除了監控夢境，這個儀器更可以改變病患的夢境，在精神治療方面相當有效；不料，這個儀器突然被盜走，接著，這項研究的相關人員相繼在夢中遭到不測。敦子為此展開了調查，但也遭到暗算；然而，敦子可不是普通人物，她擁有另一個身分——「盜夢偵探紅辣椒」。  紅辣椒具有同步體驗他人夢境的特殊能力，曾多次成功治愈患者的心靈創傷；紅辣椒與利用「DC MINI」進行破壞的夢境恐怖分子展開了一場激烈纏鬥，犯人究竟是誰？他的目的何在？出人意料的真相在夢境與現實交錯的瞬間顯現……

synopsis: 芭比飾演克萊拉，在聖誕夜收到阿姨送給她的胡桃 鉗 士兵 。夜晚，當家人都入睡時，邪惡的老鼠國王帶著軍隊闖入克萊拉的客廳，原本不會動的胡桃鉗突然活過來，對抗入侵的敵人。激烈的戰鬥驚醒了克萊拉，她起身幫忙，卻被老鼠國王用邪惡魔法變小！為了破解魔咒，克萊拉與胡桃鉗進入奇幻的世界，展開精彩的冒險，尋找糖糖公主讓一切恢復原狀。 童話故事和古典音樂結合，創作出奇幻又典雅的芭比世界。這是芭比的首部動畫電影，在改編自霍夫曼經典原著《胡桃鉗與鼠王》的影片中，芭比隨著柴可夫斯基著名芭蕾舞劇《胡桃鉗》的舞曲，和胡桃鉗在夢幻王國中翩翩起舞。

synopsis_en:
Barbie stars as Clara, who receives a wooden Nutcracker soldier from her aunt on Christmas Eve. That night, while the rest of the family is asleep, the evil Mouse King and his army invade Clara’s living room. Suddenly, the Nutcracker springs to life to fend off the invaders. The fierce battle wakes Clara, and as she rushes to help, the Mouse King casts an evil spell that shrinks her! To break the curse, Clara and the Nutcracker embark on a spectacular adventure through a fantasy world, searching for the Sugarplum Princess to set everything right.

Blending fairy tales with classical music, this film creates a magical and elegant Barbie world. In Barbie’s first-ever animated movie, adapted from E.T.A. Hoffmann’s classic "The Nutcracker and the Mouse King," Barbie dances through a dreamlike kingdom with the Nutcracker to the iconic music of Tchaikovsky’s famous ballet.

synopsis: 1986 日本藍絲帶獎最佳影片 Best Film, Blue Ribbon Awards 1986 每日電影獎最佳影片、導演、男配角 Best Film, Director, 1986 奧斯卡金像獎 最佳服裝設計獲獎；最佳導演、攝影、美術設計提名 戰國大名一文字秀虎曾經縱橫沙場、不可一世，年逾七十後卻常感力不從心，決意退位養老。未料將城池分給三兄弟後，長子隨即翻臉羞辱，逼他出走，次子也暗謀逆反，冷眼相待。唯因直言敢諫而被逐出家門的三子，不僅暗中派人護駕，更溫暖迎納流亡老父。目睹家系骨肉相殘，心受過往惡業折磨，梟雄秀虎漸成瘋魔，無語能對命運荒波。 角色設定與《影武者》天地對望並更臻化境，將莎翁悲劇《李爾王》縫入日本戰國時代，仲代達矢以深厚演劇功底創造極強情緒渲染力，堪稱本片宏偉史詩氣韻最重要的元素。劇組雖沿用了《影武者》的服裝與道具，仍耗資千萬美金調度浩大戰爭場面，刷新當時日本影史最高拍攝成本，也成就黑澤明匯聚畢生心血的顛峰之作。

movie_title_en: The Texture of Memory: Films by Mary Stephen
synopsis: 安詳辭世 A Very Easy Death 雪美蓮 Mary STEPHEN｜加拿大 Canada｜1975｜DCP ｜B&W、Color｜9min 大加拿大成人禮 Pawaganak: The Great Canadian Puberty Rite 雪美蓮 Mary STEPHEN｜加拿大 Canada｜1974｜DCP ｜B&W、Color｜19min 絲之影 Shades of Silk 雪美蓮 Mary STEPHEN｜法國 France﹑加拿大 Canada｜1978｜DCP ｜Color｜62min 2025 多倫多影展 Toronto IFF 2025 紐約影展 New York FF 2026 鹿特丹影展 IFF Rotterdam 在成為法國新浪潮大師艾力侯麥御用剪輯師前，雪美蓮早已透過鏡頭，捕捉流散者在異鄉與故土間的徘徊﹑身分認同的掙扎與成長陣痛。本次放映的四部早期作品，包括首部長片《絲之影》，以及三部風格迥異的珍稀短片——《迷宮》﹑《安詳辭世》﹑《大加拿大成人禮》，雪美蓮藉由音畫，將個人經歷化為感性的詩篇。 從加拿大的公路洗禮、巴黎學生宿舍的夢囈，到面對死亡的靜謐凝視，她的影像如絲綢般細膩且充滿韌性。這些作品如遊走於東西方文化之間的記憶碎片，以鏡頭記錄其對自我身份的感知和探求。 Before her legendary tenure as Éric Rohmer's editor, Mary Stephen was already a "tailor of images," using her camera to record a series of rites of passage. This screening anchors her debut feature,
screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-小影格
synopsis_en:
**A Very Easy Death**
Mary STEPHEN｜Canada｜1975｜DCP｜B&W, Color｜9min

**Pawaganak: The Great Canadian Puberty Rite**
Mary STEPHEN｜Canada｜1974｜DCP｜B&W, Color｜19min

**Shades of Silk**
Mary STEPHEN｜France, Canada｜1978｜DCP｜Color｜62min

2025 Toronto IFF
2025 New York FF
2026 IFF Rotterdam

Long before her legendary tenure as Éric Rohmer’s long-time editor, Mary Stephen was already a "tailor of images," using her camera to capture the displacement of the diaspora, the struggle for identity, and the growing pains of coming of age. This screening features four of her early works, including her debut feature *Shades of Silk* and three rare shorts of distinct styles—*Labyrinth*, *A Very Easy Death*, and *Pawaganak: The Great Canadian Puberty Rite*. Through the interplay of sound and image, Stephen transforms personal experience into evocative visual poetry. From a Canadian road-trip baptism and the somniloquy of a Parisian student dorm to a quiet gaze at death, her imagery is as delicate and resilient as silk. These works serve as memory fragments drifting between Eastern and Western cultures, documenting her perception and search for selfhood.

synopsis: ★1993 尼克頻道兒童選擇獎最受歡迎演員提名 ★1993 全美民選獎最受歡迎喜劇類電影 ★全球票房3.5億美元 凱文獨自一人在紐約，但是口袋裡有足夠的錢，整個城市都是他的遊樂場！但是這孤獨不會持續太久，因為臭名昭著的竊賊哈里和馬夫也來到了紐約，他們沒有忘記上次和凱文的交鋒，這次還策劃了一場假日大盜竊。但凱文也準備了迎接他們的到來，設計了一連串厲害的裝置，這些笨蛋盜賊們將永生難忘！ https://reurl.cc/EmnW9k

movie_title_en: Palimpsest: The Story of a Name
country: 法國 France﹑香港 Hong Kong﹑台灣 Taiwan
synopsis: 2025 多倫多影展 Toronto IFF 2025 阿姆斯特丹國際紀錄片影展 IDFA 2025 金馬獎最佳紀錄長片、最佳剪輯 Best Documentary Feature & Best Editing, Golden Horse Awards 擁有東方面孔的華裔資深剪輯師雪美蓮，卻有著洋化姓氏：Stephen。她透過父親留下的筆記，深入鮮為人知的家族歷史，驚覺父母皆有著曾經隱姓埋名、真假難辨的過往：父親似乎是澳洲原住民漁民後裔；曾有著文學夢的母親，過去又似乎與英國小說家吳爾芙的家族成員在中國的戀情有著幽微牽連。 為了探尋「Stephen」之名的真偽，她翻找家庭電影與老照片，在那段殖民擴張與動盪的時代中，重新建構一段比現實更趨近真相的私密家族史。她在多重敘事中追問身分認同，探尋個體如何在離散的迷霧中，透過重寫歷史而重新翱翔，拼湊出跨越國境與世紀風雲的生命圖像。 Veteran editor Mary Stephen investigates a lifelong enigma: why does she possess a Chinese face but the Western surname "Stephen"? This personal story uncovers her parents' assumed names and hidden lives, from an Australian aboriginal lineage to a secret link with Virginia Woolf's nephew. Set against a colonial backdrop, the film reveals a history long obscured by the fog of displacement. Stephen navigates a maze of conflicting narratives, piecing together a profound cinematic portrait of identity and the resilience of the self.
screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-小影格
tmdb_title: Palimpsest: the Story of a Name
tmdb_title_en: Palimpsest: the Story of a Name
tmdb_overview: 資深剪輯師雪美蓮，總納悶自己到底姓史蒂芬，還是姓雪、姓陳？明明亞洲臉，又非混血，怎取洋人姓？一查不得了，父親竟來自澳洲！母親曾有文學夢，似還牽涉吳爾芙姪子的中國戀情？她化身偵探親自執導，翻找父親傳記、家庭電影、老照片，以「史蒂芬」為圓心，拼出一幅與世紀風雲、名人交織的私密家族史，追問殖民與身分認同。血緣纏如網，個體仍能重寫自我，乘故事翱翔。
tmdb_overview_en: Veteran filmmaker Mary Stephen digs into her own family past to uncover the long-hidden origins of her Western surname, revealing a story of culture shock, colonialism, and contested remembrance.

Influenced by a buffoonish imaginary version of Adolf Hitler, he begins to question his beliefs and confront the conflict between propaganda and his own humanity.

movie_title: 2001太空漫遊─早安！周日經典電影院

synopsis: ★1983 奧斯卡最佳原創配樂、最佳音效等四項大獎；最佳影片、最佳導演等5項提名 ★1983 金球獎戲劇類最佳影片、最佳原創配樂；最佳導演、最佳劇本等3項提名 ★1983 土星獎最佳科幻電影、最佳編劇5項大獎；最佳導演、最佳男主角等3項提名 渴望父愛的平凡男孩艾略特，與家人過著尋常的日子，直到外型怪異的小外星人E.T. 闖進他的生活，改變了彼此的命運。兩個有所缺憾的靈魂，相互牽引聯繫，建立起一段不尋常卻無比真摯的友誼。然而好景不常，E.T. 的存在被大人發現了，為了幫助「他」逃離科學家與政府特工的追捕，順利坐上太空船回家，艾略特與哥哥妹妹聯手，一行人騎上腳踏車四下逃竄引開警方，展開一連串奇幻的追趕跑跳與飛行冒險…... https://reurl.cc/R208ax
synopsis_en:
★ 1983 Academy Awards: 4 wins including Best Original Score and Best Sound; 5 nominations including Best Picture and Best Director.
★ 1983 Golden Globe Awards: Best Motion Picture – Drama and Best Original Score; 3 nominations including Best Director and Best Screenplay.
★ 1983 Saturn Awards: 5 wins including Best Science Fiction Film and Best Writing; 3 nominations including Best Director and Best Actor.

Elliot, an ordinary boy longing for a father’s love, lives a routine life with his family until a strange-looking little alien, E.T., wanders into his world, changing both their destinies forever. Two lonely souls find themselves drawn together, forging an unusual yet profoundly sincere friendship. However, their bond is threatened when adults discover E.T.’s existence. To help him escape the clutches of scientists and government agents and return safely to his spaceship, Elliot teams up with his brother and sister. Mounting their bicycles to outrun the police, the group embarks on a series of fantastical chases and soaring adventures.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
movie_title: 人間的條件  第一部 純愛篇・第二部 激怒篇
movie_title_en: Human Condition I: No Greater Love
synopsis: 電影旬報年度十大日本影片（第五名）、最佳女演員 Top 10 Japanese Films (5th Place) & Best Actress, Kinema Junpo 1960 威尼斯影展聖喬治獎 San Giorgio Prize, Venice FF 1960 威尼斯影展帕西內蒂獎 Premio Pasinetti, Venice FF 1943年，懷抱人道主義理想的梶，偕同妻子美千子前往滿洲老虎嶺礦場，出任戰時勞工監工一職。他試圖在殖民體制內推行改革、改善戰俘待遇，卻屢遭官僚排擠與軍方威壓，亦無法取信於遭受虐待的中國勞工。戰爭機器不斷剝奪選擇的可能，梶的處境愈發孤立，該如何讓所有人保有生存的尊嚴？他又如何保有身而為人的良心？ 甫出茅廬的仲代達矢繼《黑河》後二度與小林正樹合作，以正氣而克制的表演詮釋梶的進退兩難，為仲代演藝之路的大躍進。這部現實主義鉅作乃小林正樹改編五味川純平的同名小說，為日本反戰電影的巔峰之作。攝影師宮島義勇的固定鏡頭與黑白寬銀幕攝影，形塑了沉穩莊重的視覺風格，使這部影像史詩回歸冷靜凜然的現實凝視。 In 1943, Kaji, guided by humanist ideals, travels with his wife to a mining site in Manchuria to serve as a wartime labor supervisor, attempting to reform an oppressive colonial system from within. Caught between military authority, bureaucratic pressure, and the distrust of abused Chinese laborers, his efforts only deepen his isolation. Faithfully adapted from Gomikawa Junpei's novel, Kobayashi Masaki's austere antiwar epic employs fixed camera compositions and black-and-white widescreen cinematography to stage a relentless moral inquiry—asking what dignity, and humanity itself, can mean under the machinery of war.

screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-大影格
tmdb_title: The Human Condition I: No Greater Love
tmdb_title_en: The Human Condition I: No Greater Love

tmdb_original_title: 人間の條件　第１部純愛篇／第２部激怒篇
tmdb_overview: 1943年，懷抱人道主義理想的梶，偕同妻子美千子前往滿洲老虎嶺礦場，出任戰時勞工監工一職。他試圖在殖民體制內推行改革、改善戰俘待遇，卻屢遭官僚排擠與軍方威壓，亦無法取信於遭受虐待的中國勞工。戰爭機器不斷剝奪選擇的可能，梶的處境愈發孤立，該如何讓所有人保有生存的尊嚴？他又如何保有身而為人的良心？
tmdb_overview_en: After handing in a report on the treatment of Chinese colonial labor, Kaji is offered the post of labour chief at a large mining operation in Manchuria, which also grants him exemption from military service. He accepts and moves with his newlywed wife Michiko, but when he tries to put his ideas of more humane treatment into practice, he finds himself at odds with scheming officials, cruel foremen, and the military police.

synopsis: 偷技高超的神偷唐姆柯比，對客戶委託的偷竊行動無往不利，但其行蹤卻涉遍最驚險、最神秘的潛意識範圍，他的目標是趁對象進入深沉的睡眠、心智遂呈現最脆弱狀態時，入侵其潛意識，將不可告人的機密手到擒來。天賦異稟加上高科技儀器，使柯比周旋於企業間的爾虞我詐，成為不二人想的商業間諜，相對也付出極大代價，不但淪為國際逃犯，也失去所愛的家人。因緣際會，柯比遇到一個平反的契機，能重新找回到失去的人生。
synopsis_en: Dom Cobb is a master thief, unparalleled in the high-stakes world of corporate espionage. His specialty lies in the most dangerous and mysterious realm: the subconscious. He infiltrates the minds of his targets while they are in their most vulnerable state—deep sleep—to steal their most guarded secrets. This extraordinary talent, combined with cutting-edge technology, has made him the ultimate prize in the world of corporate intrigue, but it has come at a devastating cost. Now an international fugitive, Cobb has lost the family he loves. However, a rare opportunity for redemption arises, offering him one last chance to reclaim the life he lost.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
movie_title_en: The Bride Who Has Returned from Hell (Restored)
synopsis: 華僑瑞美聽聞姊姊溺斃海中，隱瞞身分悄然返台，住進姊夫家擔任外甥女家教，暗中追查死因。朝夕相處間，她不僅修補外甥女的父女關係，亦與姊夫萌生情愫。鬼影幢幢的大宅、死者遺留的日記、錯綜的情愛糾葛……逐漸拼湊真相。當姊夫向她求婚，一場致命陰謀卻在婚禮前夕爆發。 英國女作家荷特承襲勃朗特姊妹、杜莫里哀等人文風，1960年以哥德羅曼史小說《米蘭夫人》聲名大噪，當年台灣報紙連載譯文後由皇冠出版社集結成冊，引發西洋羅曼史熱潮。辛奇將書中英式懸疑浪漫移植為淡水本土風情，成熟洗鍊的調度及運鏡，不僅展現工業水準，更印證台語影人不只能拍悲情通俗劇，更具備駕馭國際類型、文學改編的多元視野。
screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-小影格
synopsis_en:
Upon hearing that her sister has drowned, Rui-mei, an overseas Chinese woman, returns to Taiwan in secret. Concealing her true identity, she moves into her brother-in-law’s home as a tutor for her niece, determined to uncover the truth behind the tragedy. As they spend their days together, she not only helps mend the fractured bond between father and daughter but also finds herself falling for her brother-in-law. Amidst the shadows of a haunted mansion, the discovery of a secret diary, and a web of tangled emotions, the truth slowly begins to emerge. But just as her brother-in-law proposes, a deadly conspiracy erupts on the eve of their wedding.

Drawing inspiration from the Brontë sisters and Daphne du Maurier, British author Victoria Holt rose to fame in 1960 with her Gothic romance *Mistress of Mellyn*. After its serialization in Taiwanese newspapers and subsequent publication by Crown Press, the novel ignited a craze for Western romance across the island. Director Hsin Chi masterfully transplants the British suspense and romance of the original novel into the local atmosphere of Tamsui. With sophisticated staging and cinematography, the film not only demonstrates high production standards but also proves that Taiwanese filmmakers were capable of far more than just tragic melodramas—showcasing their ability to master international genres and literary adaptations with a diverse creative vision.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
synopsis: 俠士金山戈原本打算從軍報國，投靠張哲元帥麾下，不料卻被栽贓成殺害丞相之子的兇手，遭元帥發配邊疆。押解途中遇上 金兵，金山戈 趁亂 自 行解開枷鎖，打敗金兵逃脫。張哲被金人元帥完顏所殺，張哲之女恩珠，在王封的幫助下逃到陸莊。為了報仇雪恨，他們廣招英雄。金山戈剛好行經比武大會，武藝超群的他為王封賞識，力邀抗金。金山戈欣然答應，但條件是要娶恩珠為妻。恩珠為了報父仇只好答應，但前提是金山戈必須先提著完顏的人頭回來。 金山戈先以頹廢、無賴甚至帶點登徒子的輕佻形象出現，顛覆傳統武俠片中「俠」之形象；隨著劇情裡眾人齊力抗金的經過，也讓這位非典型俠客漸漸平反形象，最終瀟灑地如西部英雄般退場。
screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-小影格
tmdb_overview: Set in Sung Dynasty at a tumultuous time when China is invaded by the northern Jin Empire, the story revolves around swordsman Ge (David Tong Wai), who is wronged for murdering the son of the Prime Minister. Luckily, his superb kung fu helps him escape. But when the Sung General Chang is killed by the Jin Admiral Wanyan, and Chang's beautiful daughter Chu (Han Hsiang Chin) is seeking a patriotic hero to avenge his father's death, Ge pledges to assassinate Wanyan within ten days and marry Chu. But he has to first deal with the four kung fu masters serving under the Jin Admiral.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
movie_title_en: Nakadai Tatsuya: to Live for Acting
synopsis: 1975年，仲代達矢與其重要創作夥伴 兼 妻子宮崎恭子，共同創立演員養成所「無名塾」。仲代親自參與新人選拔和集訓，早六晚八嚴格訓練；對戲時，他收斂自身存在，惟留下角色與對手衝撞。無名塾不只指導演員，更培育能立身於世的「人」，50年來人才輩出。但褪下老師身分與角色外衣，仲代的真實面貌，一直是用毛筆謄寫台詞，並貼在寢室牆上反覆背誦的樸實演員。 導演 稻 塚秀孝歷時一年多貼身跟拍，聚焦無名塾的訓練過程及劇場公演，穿插仲代和弟子的訪談，記錄他鮮為人知的一面。拍攝時，仲代已年屆80，仍毅然佇立於心愛的舞台，與日漸衰退的記性和體力抗衡。 他 始終懷抱身為無名小卒時的初心，貫徹此生志向──為演員而活，並將這份信念傳承給下個世代。

tmdb_overview_en: Founded in 1975 by Nakadai Tatsuya and his late wife Miyazaki Yasuko, the actor training school Mumeijuku has shaped generations of performers. Nakadai personally leads rigorous training, instilling discipline and humanity. Filmed over a year, this documentary follows the octogenarian actor as he continues to stand on stage, living for his craft and passing his unwavering devotion to the next generation.

synopsis: ☀️ 希望天氣很好，我們屋頂見。
tmdb_overview: 古靈精怪的艾蜜莉喜歡發掘生活中的小細節，也喜歡幫助周遭的人們解決生活中的小缺憾，從走不出喪妻陰霾的爸爸到離群索居的老畫家，每個人的命運都因她而產生奇妙的轉變，而屬於艾蜜莉的幸福也正悄悄地走進她的生命裡…
tmdb_overview_en: At a tiny Parisian café, the adorable yet painfully shy Amélie accidentally discovers a gift for helping others. Soon Amelie is spending her days as a matchmaker, guardian angel, and all-around do-gooder. But when she bumps into a handsome stranger, will she find the courage to become the star of her very own love story?

synopsis: ★2016 印度覺醒電影節最佳女主角、最佳新導演 ★2017 印度電影觀眾獎最佳新導演 ★2017 寶萊塢電影記者獎最佳影片、最佳導演等4項提名 單親媽媽晨妲自從丈夫過世之後，一肩扛起撫養女兒阿佩莎的責任，為了讓女兒獲得最好的資源，晨妲四處奔波不遺餘力！但是，看著女兒在學校交到壞朋友，心中總是煩惱女兒不小心誤入歧途。這天，班上來了一位新同學，她叫晨妲，她要和大家交朋友，一起上課學習！ https://reurl.cc/ppgXye
tmdb_overview: 單親媽媽晨妲自從丈夫過世之後，一肩扛起撫養女兒阿佩莎的責任，為了讓女兒獲得最好的資源，晨妲四處奔波不遺餘力！但是，看著女兒在學校交到壞朋友，心中總是煩惱女兒不小心誤入歧途。這天，班上來了一位新同學，她叫晨妲，她要和大家交朋友，一起上課學習！
tmdb_overview_en: Behind the magnificent Taj Mahal lies a cluster of dingy homes where Chanda (35), a domestic help, lives with her 14-year-old daughter Appu. Chanda aspires and dreams that her daughter will study and embrace a better fate. When Appu tells her she wants to quit school and become a maid like her, Chanda takes a strong decision: she will herself go back to school, and even join the class of her daughter.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
director: 烏克蘭 Ukraine、美國 United States、英國 United Kingdom
synopsis: 俄烏戰爭爆發之際，為了貼身記錄戰場，導演自願入伍拍片，但軍旅生活遠比想像難以適應。隨著戰事膠著，血腥、殘酷與孤寂逐步侵蝕他作為記錄者的感性。當死亡摧殘親人戰友，徒留仇恨蔓延，生命卑微如草芥，人性是否已太過稀薄而無處容身？一旦成為毫不猶豫開槍的機器，還能找回愛與家庭這些曾經熟悉的事物嗎？ Filmed over three and a half years on Ukraine’s frontline, the film follows a young filmmaker who trades his camera for a rifle and joins the Territorial Defence Forces. As war reshapes his life, he moves from storyteller to soldier, documenting fear, loss and resilience amid chaos. 2025 Sheffield Doc/Fest 英國雪菲爾德紀錄片影展 2025 Toronto IFF 多倫多國際影展 ❐ ——— ❏ 𝟐 𝟎 𝟐 𝟔 𝐓 𝐈 𝐃 𝐅 ❏ ——— ❐ ➜ 5.01-5.10  國家影視聽中心｜台北獅子林新光影城｜光點華山電影館｜臺灣當代文化實驗場C-LAB ➜TIDF官網：​ ➜TIDF臉書： ➜TIDF IG：

tmdb_overview_en: Award-winning Ukrainian filmmaker and cinematographer Artem Ryzhykov transforms into a hardened professional soldier as he navigates the confusion, chaos, heartache and reality of modern warfare.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
synopsis: 在山海交界的都蘭部落，外省第二代的導演認識了阿美族藝術家希巨．蘇飛，得知於國共內戰時，有一群被帶往中國、永遠消失的少年階級。帶著對父執輩鄉愁的理解，相異生命經驗在此共振交會，共同踏上尋訪部落老兵的旅途。鏡頭下的個人面容交織為時代記憶；身分隨政局轉換的無奈困惑則在追憶眼神中一覽無遺。 In ‘Etolan, a coastal Indigenous community in eastern Taiwan, the director and Amis artist Siki Sufin uncover their fathers’ shared displacement. They trace a vanished generation of Taiwanese Indigenous youth taken to China during the civil war, bearing witness to the long-silenced histories of surviving veterans. 2009 Taipei Film Awards 台北電影獎 2009 DMZ Docs 南韓DMZ國際紀錄片影展 ❐ ——— ❏ 𝟐 𝟎 𝟐 𝟔 𝐓 𝐈 𝐃 𝐅 ❏ ——— ❐ ➜ 5.01-5.10  國家影視聽中心｜台北獅子林新光影城｜光點華山電影館｜臺灣當代文化實驗場C-LAB ➜TIDF官網：​ ➜TIDF臉書： ➜TIDF IG：

tmdb_overview: 《路有多長》是導演湯湘竹回家三部曲的最後一部，延續回家的主旨，這一次導演將鏡頭對準了一群在國民黨接收台灣之後，被帶往中國參加國共內戰的阿美族台籍兵。1949年，台籍兵不是戰死就是被迫滯留在中國回不了家，這種政治上的強迫分離，不只發生在台籍兵，也發生在中國。湯導演的第二部曲《山有多高》即拍攝自己的父親，一個跟隨國民黨來台，被迫滯留台灣，回不了湖南家鄉的老兵。戰爭的荒繆讓ㄧ群無辜的人民投入戰場，遠離家鄉。在山海交界的台東都蘭部落，導演湯湘竹認識了阿美族木雕藝術家希巨‧蘇飛，得知在都蘭部落有ㄧ群被帶往中國，永遠消失的少年階級，延續導演對於回家三部曲的一貫主題，及身為外省第二代，瞭解父執輩那一代對於家鄉的感念， 兩人遂以台東部落為起點，展開尋訪阿美族部落裡的台籍老兵，用影像紀錄這些被戰爭捲入的無奈人生。
tmdb_overview_en: Director Tang Shiang-chu first read about the Taiwanese veterans twenty years ago in the Ren-Jian Magazine, realizing that there were other people suffering the same fate as his father which a war took them away from their homes; and it wasn't after the cross-strait opened up forty years later that the remaining soldier were giving a chance to return home.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
country: 香港 Hong Kong、英國 United Kingdom
synopsis: 當一整個世代並非自願、而是被迫遺忘時，記憶如何被保存？友誼能否成為一種溫柔卻堅持的抵抗？攝影機伴隨導演與摯友重返記憶的黑洞，低調而內斂的影像，讓無法言說的情緒在闇夜中發酵。這不僅是一部紀錄片，更像一封寫給彼此的青春備忘錄，一場共同記住的練習——在陰鬱時代裡，透過愛與陪伴，拼湊出一代港人困惑卻真切的群像。 2026 CPH:DOX 哥本哈根國際紀錄片影展 【亞洲首映 Asian Premiere】 記憶座標 Map of Traces 陳巧真 CHAN Hau-chun｜香港 Hong Kong｜2025｜DCP｜Colour, B&W｜29 min 關於香港的風景與人們遺留的細微痕跡。在那些離開、留下或徘徊者的記憶裡，找一個親密的瞬間，聯結彼此。揉合香港交通要道的媒介記憶、獄中友人來往書信，以及藝術家的街道創作，探索「在場」與「缺席」之際，既精準又流動不定的時刻。 Unfolding as a tender letter, the film traces Hong Kong through its landscapes and lingering marks. Within memories of those who left, stayed, or drifted, it searches for intimate moments that quietly connect lives, attuned to the city’s subtle rhythms of change and stillness. 2025 Toronto IFF 多倫多國際影展 ❐ ——— ❏ 𝟐 𝟎 𝟐 𝟔 𝐓 𝐈 𝐃 𝐅 ❏ ——— ❐ ➜ 5.01-5.10  國家影視聽中心｜台北獅子林新光影城｜光點華山電影館｜臺灣當代文化實驗場C-LAB ➜TIDF官網：​ ➜TIDF臉書： ➜TIDF IG：
tags: TIDF 台灣國際紀錄片影展
screen_name: 台北獅子林新光影城 一廳
synopsis_en:
When an entire generation is forced to forget rather than choosing to, how can memory be preserved? Can friendship become a gentle yet persistent form of resistance? The camera follows the director and a close friend as they return to the black hole of memory; through low-key and restrained imagery, unspeakable emotions are left to ferment in the dark. More than just a documentary, this is a memorandum of youth written for one another—an exercise in collective remembering. Amidst gloomy times, through love and companionship, it pieces together a bewildered yet authentic portrait of a generation of Hong Kongers.

**2026 CPH:DOX Copenhagen International Documentary Film Festival 【Asian Premiere】**

**Map of Traces**
CHAN Hau-chun｜Hong Kong｜2025｜DCP｜Colour, B&W｜29 min

A reflection on the landscapes of Hong Kong and the subtle traces left behind by its people. Within the memories of those who have left, stayed, or drifted, the film searches for intimate moments to connect one another. Blending media memories of Hong Kong’s major thoroughfares, correspondence with friends in prison, and street art, it explores the precise yet fluid moments between "presence" and "absence."

Unfolding as a tender letter, the film traces Hong Kong through its landscapes and lingering marks. Within memories of those who left, stayed, or drifted, it searches for intimate moments that quietly connect lives, attuned to the city’s subtle rhythms of change and stillness.

**2025 Toronto IFF**

**2026 TIDF**
**May 1 – May 10**

director: 穆罕納德．亞庫比 Mohanad YAQUBI
country: 巴勒斯坦 Palestine、法國 France、卡達 Qatar、黎巴嫩 Lebanon
synopsis: 基於對巴勒斯坦電影與歷史的陌生和好奇，一名電影系學生以1948年的「災難日」為分水嶺，用檔案影像走過巴勒斯坦人的戰役與掙扎。從高達《我們的音樂》等經典作起始，拼湊出40餘載的命運。全片由1982年以前，選映於各國影展的巴勒斯坦影像為素材，直截彰顯流浪影像的再利用手法與意義。 A meditation on Palestinian self-representation through the Palestine Film Unit (PFU) of the 1960s–70s. Drawing on globally recovered archival footage, the film traces militant filmmakers reclaiming image and narrative through revolutionary cinema, reflecting on struggles revived on screen—and those that remain off frame. 2016 Toronto IFF 多倫多國際影展 2017 Berlinale 柏林影展 ❐ ——— ❏ 𝟐 𝟎 𝟐 𝟔 𝐓 𝐈 𝐃 𝐅 ❏ ——— ❐ ➜ 5.01-5.10  國家影視聽中心｜台北獅子林新光影城｜光點華山電影館｜臺灣當代文化實驗場C-LAB ➜TIDF官網：​ ➜TIDF臉書： ➜TIDF IG：

synopsis: 祈禱聲間，步槍上肩，信仰與武裝構成日常。虔誠的阿富汗兄弟身在其間：哥哥巡邏站崗，視殉道為夢想，亦為俗務心煩；弟弟尚未成年，放牧遊玩、背誦經文，以兄長為榜樣，天真全寫在臉上。鏡頭用開放取代評斷，微觀塔利班神權統治下的男性成長。外人眼中的洗腦灌輸，在他們心中是充實救贖，使觀眾擺盪於同感與震撼之間。 2025 Venice FF 威尼斯影展 2025 Zurich Film Festival 蘇黎世影展 ❐ ——— ❏ 𝟐 𝟎 𝟐 𝟔 𝐓 𝐈 𝐃 𝐅 ❏ ——— ❐ ➜ 5.01-5.10  國家影視聽中心｜台北獅子林新光影城｜光點華山電影館｜臺灣當代文化實驗場C-LAB ➜TIDF官網：​ ➜TIDF臉書： ➜TIDF IG：

screen_name: 台北獅子林新光影城 三廳
synopsis_en:
Amidst the echoes of prayer and rifles slung over shoulders, faith and weaponry define the everyday. Two devout Afghan brothers live within this world: the elder patrols his post, dreaming of martyrdom while burdened by mundane worries; the younger, still a child, spends his days herding, playing, and reciting scripture, looking up to his brother with an innocence written across his face. Eschewing judgment for an open lens, the film offers a microscopic look at the coming-of-age of males under Taliban theocracy. What outsiders perceive as indoctrination is, to them, a sense of fulfillment and redemption, leaving the audience caught between empathy and profound shock.

2025 Venice Film Festival
2025 Zurich Film Festival

movie_title: 綠的海平線+軍教男兒－台灣軍士教導團的故事
movie_title_en: Shonenko＋Suspended Duty: Taiwan Military Training Regiment
synopsis: 二戰末期，8,000多名台灣少年接受日本政府動員募集，前往海軍工廠生產軍機。戰後的他們立於時代與政權的間隙，選擇的歸處不一，卻同樣面臨適應求存的艱難。面對歷史之重，本片不見憤愾悲情，反以溫暖旁白串連檔案文獻及訪談，徐緩道出動盪時代下個人的奮力追求與無奈流轉，從中折射出立體交錯的身分歸屬與情感。 2006 Special Jury Award, Taipei Film Awards 台北電影獎評審團特別獎 2008 Grand Prize, Golden Harvest Awards 金穗獎首獎 軍教男兒－台灣軍士教導團的故事 Suspended Duty: Taiwan Military Training Regiment 郭亮吟 KUO Liang-yin｜台灣 Taiwan｜2010｜DCP｜Colour｜47 min 反共抗俄的年代，4,000多名青年於1950年參加「台灣軍士教導團」，擬於訓練期滿後擔任台灣新軍幹部。沒過多久卻突接「歸休」令，就此待命50多年，未能退伍。以諧擬政宣口吻的旁白，幽默串接訪談，看見政治力量如何箝制思想、規訓身體、噤聲異見，也藉親歷不同戰事的受訪者經歷，展開「為誰而戰」的思索。 Formed in 1950 under General Sun Li-jen, Taiwan’s Military Training Regiment recruited over 4,000 young men to build a new army. Abruptly ordered into ‘suspended duty’, they waited decades without discharge. Through interviews and satirical propaganda-style narration, the film examines how politics disciplines bodies, silences dissent, and asks: who were they meant to fight for? 2010 TIDF 台灣國際紀錄片雙年展 2011 Best Documentary, Golden Harvest Awards 金穗獎最佳紀錄片 ❐ ——— ❏ 𝟐 𝟎 𝟐 𝟔 𝐓 𝐈 𝐃 𝐅 ❏ ——— ❐ ➜ 5.01-5.10  國家影視聽中心｜台北獅子林新光影城｜光點華山電影館｜臺灣當代文化實驗場C-LAB ➜TIDF官網：​ ➜TIDF臉書： ➜TIDF IG：
tags: TIDF 台灣國際紀錄片影展
synopsis_en:
At the end of World War II, more than 8,000 Taiwanese youths were mobilized by the Japanese government to produce military aircraft at naval factories. In the post-war era, they stood in the fissures between different times and regimes; though their chosen paths varied, they all faced the same grueling struggle to adapt and survive. Facing the weight of history, the film avoids resentment and pathos, opting instead for a warm narration to thread together archival documents and interviews. It gently unfolds the personal strivings and helpless drifts of individuals in a turbulent age, reflecting the complex, overlapping layers of identity and belonging.

2006 Special Jury Award, Taipei Film Awards
2008 Grand Prize, Golden Harvest Awards

**Suspended Duty: Taiwan Military Training Regiment**
KUO Liang-yin｜Taiwan｜2010｜DCP｜Colour｜47 min

During the era of "Resisting Communism and Opposing Russia," over 4,000 young men joined the "Taiwan Military Training Regiment" in 1950, expecting to serve as cadres for a new Taiwanese army upon completing their training. Before long, they were hit with a sudden order of "suspended duty," leaving them on standby for over 50 years without ever being formally discharged. Using a satirical, propaganda-style narration to humorously bridge various interviews, the film reveals how political forces discipline the body, silence dissent, and manipulate thought. Through the firsthand accounts of those who lived through different wars, it invites a deeper contemplation on the question: "For whom do we fight?"

2010 Taiwan International Documentary Festival (TIDF)
2011 Best Documentary, Golden Harvest Awards

synopsis: 巴爾博納位在巴塞隆納郊區，因公路、鐵道與貝索斯河而隔絕於世。戰後煤工在此扎根，隨著各地移民湧入，儼然已成另類地球村。以黑白影像記錄流光歲月，以平實鏡頭錄下居民雜談，耆老追憶亡妻，移民述起俄烏戰爭餘波。在栽種中窺探植物細語，亦不忘吟唱生活。鐵路拆遷懸而未決，河畔狂歡後，小城何去何從。 On Barcelona’s edge, Vallbona lies enclosed by river, railway and highway. Antonio, son of Catalan workers, has tended flowers here for nearly ninety years alongside neighbours from many places. Through music, forbidden swims and budding romances, a quiet resistance emerges against urban change and social division. 2025 Jury Special Prize, San Sebastian IFF 西班牙聖賽巴斯提安國際影展評審團特別獎 2025 Yamagata IDFF 山形國際紀錄片影展 ❐ ——— ❏ 𝟐 𝟎 𝟐 𝟔 𝐓 𝐈 𝐃 𝐅 ❏ ——— ❐ ➜ 5.01-5.10  國家影視聽中心｜台北獅子林新光影城｜光點華山電影館｜臺灣當代文化實驗場C-LAB ➜TIDF官網：​ ➜TIDF臉書： ➜TIDF IG：

tmdb_overview_en: In a peripheral neighbourhood, where the rural and urban worlds meet, the houses of the first migrants who arrived after the post-war period coexist with the new blocks of the dormitory city, where the latest wave of migration is concentrated. This humble corner is now an authentic global village. Good Valley Stories is a sum of constructs, of social, generational and identity, urban and ecological conflicts, but it is also a calm and humanistic look at today’s world.

movie_title_en: Beyond the Killing Fields: Refugees on the Thai-Cambodian Border
synopsis: 1980年起，大量高棉與越南難民為躲避戰火逃到泰柬邊界，在那搭起一座座簡陋的難民營。五年後，台灣光啟社組隊前往當地，攝下難民為了物資，冒險行過地雷的慘境；也拍下砲火轟隆中，人們以歌聲與舞蹈慰藉亡靈的樂觀。國內首部關注國際難民的紀錄片，打破公營片廠長期獨占金馬獎最佳紀錄片的現象，亦是台灣紀錄片被重新定義與討論的濫觴。 From 1980, tens of thousands of Cambodian and Vietnamese refugees fled war to makeshift camps along the Thai–Cambodian border. Filmed by Taiwan’s Kuangchi Program Service, this documentary captures the peril of foraging in minefields and the resilience of song and dance amid bombardment. The first privately funded Golden Horse Best Documentary, it reshaped Taiwanese documentary discourse. 1986 Best Documentary, Best Documentary Director, Golden Horse Awards 金馬獎最佳紀錄片、最佳紀錄片導演 1986 Best Short Film Award, Asia Pacific Film Festival 亞太影展最佳短片獎 ❐ ——— ❏ 𝟐 𝟎 𝟐 𝟔 𝐓 𝐈 𝐃 𝐅 ❏ ——— ❐ ➜ 5.01-5.10  國家影視聽中心｜台北獅子林新光影城｜光點華山電影館｜臺灣當代文化實驗場C-LAB ➜TIDF官網：​ ➜TIDF臉書： ➜TIDF IG：
tags: TIDF 台灣國際紀錄片影展
tmdb_title: Beyond the Killing Fields: Refugees on the Thai-Cambodian Border
tmdb_title_en: Beyond the Killing Fields: Refugees on the Thai-Cambodian Border
tmdb_overview: 一九八○年代中期，有大約二十五萬高棉難民與少數越南難民為了躲避赤棉與越南占領軍翼護下的韓森政權進行的內戰，逃到了泰國與高棉邊界，被泰國政府安置在泰棉邊界的十多個難民營中。《殺戮戰場的邊緣》即試圖呈現這些居住在擁擠而物資缺乏的難民營中的生活情形、宗教與文化活動，並紀錄了飽受越南軍砲轟與地雷威脅的緊張氣氛與死傷情景。影片也採訪了當時流亡國外的前高棉國王施努雅、高棉反抗軍領袖、聯合國秘書長即來自各國的志願工作者，評估當時的局勢與難民問題。
synopsis_en:
Beginning in 1980, a massive influx of Cambodian and Vietnamese refugees fled the horrors of war to the Thai-Cambodian border, establishing makeshift camps. Five years later, a team from Taiwan’s Kuangchi Program Service traveled to the region, capturing the harrowing reality of refugees risking their lives in minefields to forage for supplies, as well as their resilience as they used song and dance to soothe the spirits of the departed amidst the roar of artillery. As the first Taiwanese documentary to focus on international refugees, it broke the long-standing monopoly of state-owned studios on the Golden Horse Award for Best Documentary and served as a catalyst for the redefinition and critical discussion of the genre in Taiwan.

1986 Golden Horse Awards: Best Documentary, Best Documentary Director
1986 Asia Pacific Film Festival: Best Short Film

movie_title: Videotage X Forum Lenteng：鱗光映盪
director: 丁婷・烏利亞 Tintin WULIA
synopsis: 「叩、叩、叩。」深夜的敲門聲劃破靜謐。起初，只有女子聽見；幾日後，相同的聲響再度出現，這一次，她的丈夫也聽見了。是誰在門外？是誰在暗中打擾他們？透過一對剛搬入新居的夫妻訪談，並用粉筆與照片等日常物品，逐字逐格還原這段驚悚經驗。原本私密的焦慮滲入印尼文化語境，編織出揮之不去的恐怖氛圍。 2003 SGIFF 新加坡國際電影節 2005 Yokohama Triennale 橫濱三年展 我們家的離與散 Diaspora (Generasi Sekian) 伊梵．卡尼 Ivonne KANI｜印尼 Indonesia｜2015｜DCP｜Colour｜19 min 2014年印尼總統大選前夕，人心惶惶。華裔導演隨家人逃往馬來西亞避風頭，但關於1998年排華暴亂的創傷記憶，仍縈繞在母親的心間。以觀察日記式的親密跟拍，追索一家人的流浪旅途，橫越印尼、馬來、台灣，拼貼記憶，尋訪親友。以交錯的言語，叩問年輕世代的身分掙扎，與家族世世代代的生存軌跡。 2015 ARKIPEL 雅加達紀錄與實驗影展 2016 FFD 印尼日惹紀錄片影展 海坐下來時沒有風 As I Imagine My Body Moving 葉奕蕾 Elysa WENDI｜香港 Hong Kong｜2022｜DCP｜Colour｜30 min 曾經的舞者，因一次突發意外，翻開深埋於身體20多年的傷痕。記憶不斷重構與拆毁，當下發病的身體不能移動，意識卻疑似穿梭時空，在不同城市間行走。時空邊界漸趨模糊，折射於覆疊的影像中，從而挖掘自身內在，探問過去與現在的偶然。 2022 Jumping Frames - Hong Kong 跳格—香港國際舞蹈影像節 2024 STFF 南方影展 我在別處看見那伽 I see พญานาค (Phaya Nāga) elsewhere 張喆 Weera-it ITTITEERARAK｜香港 Hong Kong｜2023｜DCP｜Colour｜12 min 藝術家第一次獨自回到曼谷，旅途中交錯著熟悉與陌生的感覺。他透過科技幻想另一個未曾踏足香港的自己，並經由對人工智慧的拷問，期盼得到一個答案；同時，也透過模仿當地年輕人的生活方式、信仰習慣，試圖挖掘對當下自身身分的理解。 2025 ARKIPEL 雅加達紀錄與實驗影展 O代表鴉片 O for Opium 何子彥 HO Tzu Nyen｜新加坡 Singapore｜2023｜DCP｜Colour｜12 min 19世紀初，英國為了將鴉片從印度轉運至中國，遂把新加坡打造成重要的貿易港口。作為長期創作計畫《東南亞批判辭典》的作品之一，本片結合檔案影像及文字史料，描繪這個跨越時間與地理疆界的毒品。層疊的影像和呢喃低語如煙霧繚繞，把鴉片的生產、流轉與消費皆編入辭典。O是鴉片，也是運載它的海洋。 ❐ ——— ❏ 𝟐 𝟎 𝟐 𝟔 𝐓 𝐈 𝐃 𝐅 ❏ ——— ❐ ➜ 5.01-5.10  國家影視聽中心｜台北獅子林新光影城｜光點華山電影館｜臺灣當代文化實驗場C-LAB ➜TIDF官網：​ ➜TIDF臉書： ➜TIDF IG：
tags: TIDF 台灣國際紀錄片影展
synopsis_en:
"Knock, knock, knock." A knock at the door in the dead of night shatters the silence. At first, only the woman hears it; a few days later, the same sound returns, and this time, her husband hears it too. Who is outside? Who is disturbing them from the shadows? Through interviews with a couple who have just moved into a new home, and using everyday objects like chalk and photographs, this thriller experience is reconstructed frame by frame. Private anxieties seep into the Indonesian cultural context, weaving a lingering atmosphere of horror.

2003 SGIFF Singapore International Film Festival
2005 Yokohama Triennale

**Diaspora (Generasi Sekian)**
Ivonne KANI｜Indonesia｜2015｜DCP

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
synopsis: 巴爾博納位在巴塞隆納郊區，因公路、鐵道與貝索斯河而隔絕於世。戰後煤工在此扎根，隨著各地移民湧入，儼然已成另類地球村。以黑白影像記錄流光歲月，以平實鏡頭錄下居民雜談，耆老追憶亡妻，移民述起俄烏戰爭餘波。在栽種中窺探植物細語，亦不忘吟唱生活。鐵路拆遷懸而未決，河畔狂歡後，小城何去何從。 On Barcelona’s edge, Vallbona lies enclosed by river, railway and highway. Antonio, son of Catalan workers, has tended flowers here for nearly ninety years alongside neighbours from many places. Through music, forbidden swims and budding romances, a quiet resistance emerges against urban change and social division. 2025 Jury Special Prize, San Sebastian IFF 西班牙聖賽巴斯提安國際影展評審團特別獎 2025 Yamagata IDFF 山形國際紀錄片影展 ❐ ——— ❏ 𝟐 𝟎 𝟐 𝟔 𝐓 𝐈 𝐃 𝐅 ❏ ——— ❐ ➜ 5.01-5.10  國家影視聽中心｜台北獅子林新光影城｜光點華山電影館｜臺灣當代文化實驗場C-LAB ➜TIDF官網：​ ➜TIDF臉書： ➜TIDF IG：

tmdb_overview: 巴爾博納位在巴塞隆納郊區，因公路、鐵道與貝索斯河而隔絕於世。戰後煤工在此扎根，隨著各地移民湧入，儼然已成另類地球村。以黑白影像記錄流光歲月，以平實鏡頭錄下居民雜談，耆老追憶亡妻，移民述起俄烏戰爭餘波。在栽種中窺探植物細語，亦不忘吟唱生活。鐵路拆遷懸而未決，河畔狂歡後，小城何去何從。
tmdb_overview_en: In a peripheral neighbourhood, where the rural and urban worlds meet, the houses of the first migrants who arrived after the post-war period coexist with the new blocks of the dormitory city, where the latest wave of migration is concentrated. This humble corner is now an authentic global village. Good Valley Stories is a sum of constructs, of social, generational and identity, urban and ecological conflicts, but it is also a calm and humanistic look at today’s world.

movie_title: 綠洲：4K數位修復版－早安！周日經典電影院

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
synopsis: 祈禱聲間，步槍上肩，信仰與武裝構成日常。虔誠的阿富汗兄弟身在其間：哥哥巡邏站崗，視殉道為夢想，亦為俗務心煩；弟弟尚未成年，放牧遊玩、背誦經文，以兄長為榜樣，天真全寫在臉上。鏡頭用開放取代評斷，微觀塔利班神權統治下的男性成長。外人眼中的洗腦灌輸，在他們心中是充實救贖，使觀眾擺盪於同感與震撼之間。 2025 Venice FF 威尼斯影展 2025 Zurich Film Festival 蘇黎世影展 ❐ ——— ❏ 𝟐 𝟎 𝟐 𝟔 𝐓 𝐈 𝐃 𝐅 ❏ ——— ❐ ➜ 5.01-5.10  國家影視聽中心｜台北獅子林新光影城｜光點華山電影館｜臺灣當代文化實驗場C-LAB ➜TIDF官網：​ ➜TIDF臉書： ➜TIDF IG：
tags: TIDF 台灣國際紀錄片影展
screen_name: 台北獅子林新光影城 三廳
synopsis_en:
Amidst the echoes of prayer and rifles slung over shoulders, faith and weaponry define the everyday. Two devout Afghan brothers live within this world: the elder patrols his post, dreaming of martyrdom while burdened by mundane worries; the younger, still a child, spends his days herding, playing, and reciting scripture, looking up to his brother with an innocence written across his face. Eschewing judgment for an open lens, the film offers a microscopic look at the coming-of-age of males under Taliban theocracy. What outsiders perceive as indoctrination is, to them, a sense of fulfillment and redemption, leaving the audience caught between empathy and profound shock.

2025 Venice Film Festival
2025 Zurich Film Festival

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
director: 烏克蘭 Ukraine、美國 United States、英國 United Kingdom
synopsis: 俄烏戰爭爆發之際，為了貼身記錄戰場，導演自願入伍拍片，但軍旅生活遠比想像難以適應。隨著戰事膠著，血腥、殘酷與孤寂逐步侵蝕他作為記錄者的感性。當死亡摧殘親人戰友，徒留仇恨蔓延，生命卑微如草芥，人性是否已太過稀薄而無處容身？一旦成為毫不猶豫開槍的機器，還能找回愛與家庭這些曾經熟悉的事物嗎？ Filmed over three and a half years on Ukraine’s frontline, the film follows a young filmmaker who trades his camera for a rifle and joins the Territorial Defence Forces. As war reshapes his life, he moves from storyteller to soldier, documenting fear, loss and resilience amid chaos. 2025 Sheffield Doc/Fest 英國雪菲爾德紀錄片影展 2025 Toronto IFF 多倫多國際影展 ❐ ——— ❏ 𝟐 𝟎 𝟐 𝟔 𝐓 𝐈 𝐃 𝐅 ❏ ——— ❐ ➜ 5.01-5.10  國家影視聽中心｜台北獅子林新光影城｜光點華山電影館｜臺灣當代文化實驗場C-LAB ➜TIDF官網：​ ➜TIDF臉書： ➜TIDF IG：
